52 template <typename AccessorTy>
53 __ESIMD_API SurfaceIndex get_surface_index(AccessorTy acc) {
54  if constexpr (std::is_same_v<detail::LocalAccessorMarker, AccessorTy> ||
55  sycl::detail::acc_properties::is_local_accessor_v<AccessorTy>) {
56  return detail::SLM_BTI;
57  } else {
58 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
59  static_assert(sycl::detail::acc_properties::is_image_accessor_v<AccessorTy>,
60  "The function get_surface_index() is available only for "
61  "image- and local-accessors in stateless-only memory mode. "
62  "Consider using "
63  "-fno-sycl-esimd-force-stateless-mem compilation switch.");
64 #endif // __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
65  return __esimd_get_surface_index(
66  detail::AccessorPrivateProxy::getQualifiedPtrOrImageObj(acc));
67  }
68 }
69 
70 namespace detail {
71 
72 // Format u8 and u16 to u8u32 and u16u32 by doing garbage-extension.
73 template <typename RT, typename T, int N>
74 ESIMD_INLINE simd<RT, N> lsc_format_input(simd<T, N> Vals) {
75  if constexpr (sizeof(T) == 1) {
76  // Extend bytes to RT.
77  return Vals.template bit_cast_view<uint8_t>();
78  } else if constexpr (sizeof(T) == 2) {
79  // Extend words to RT.
80  return Vals.template bit_cast_view<uint16_t>();
81  } else {
82  return Vals.template bit_cast_view<RT>();
83  }
84 }
85 
86 // Format u8u32 and u16u32 back to u8 and u16.
87 template <typename T, typename T1, int N>
88 ESIMD_INLINE simd<T, N> lsc_format_ret(simd<T1, N> Vals) {
89  auto Formatted = Vals.template bit_cast_view<T>();
90  if constexpr (sizeof(T) == sizeof(T1)) {
91  return Formatted;
92  } else {
93  constexpr int Stride = Formatted.length / N;
94  return Formatted.template select<N, Stride>(0);
95  }
96 }
97 
117 template <typename T, int NElts, lsc_data_size DS, typename PropertyListT,
118  int N, typename OffsetT>
119 __ESIMD_API simd<T, N * NElts> gather_impl(const T *p, simd<OffsetT, N> offsets,
120  simd_mask<N> pred,
121  simd<T, N * NElts> pass_thru) {
122  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<OffsetT>, "Unsupported offset type");
123  check_lsc_vector_size<NElts>();
124  check_lsc_data_size<T, DS>();
125  check_cache_hints<cache_action::load, PropertyListT>();
126  constexpr cache_hint L1H =
127  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(cache_hint::none);
128  constexpr cache_hint L2H =
129  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(cache_hint::none);
130  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
131  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
132  constexpr lsc_data_size EDS = expand_data_size(finalize_data_size<T, DS>());
133  constexpr lsc_vector_size VS = to_lsc_vector_size<NElts>();
134  constexpr auto Transposed = lsc_data_order::nontranspose;
135  using MsgT = typename lsc_expand_type<T>::type;
136  simd<uintptr_t, N> Addrs = reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(p);
137  Addrs += convert<uintptr_t>(offsets);
138  simd<MsgT, N * NElts> PassThruExpanded = lsc_format_input<MsgT>(pass_thru);
139  simd<MsgT, N * NElts> Result =
140  __esimd_lsc_load_merge_stateless<MsgT, L1H, L2H, AddressScale, ImmOffset,
141  EDS, VS, Transposed, N>(
142  pred.data(), Addrs.data(), PassThruExpanded.data());
143  return lsc_format_ret<T>(Result);
144 }
145 
162 template <typename T, int NElts, lsc_data_size DS, typename PropertyListT,
163  int N, typename Toffset>
164 __ESIMD_API void scatter_impl(T *p, simd<Toffset, N> offsets,
165  simd<T, N * NElts> vals, simd_mask<N> pred) {
166  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<Toffset>, "Unsupported offset type");
167  check_lsc_vector_size<NElts>();
168  check_lsc_data_size<T, DS>();
169  check_cache_hints<cache_action::store, PropertyListT>();
170  constexpr cache_hint L1H =
171  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(cache_hint::none);
172  constexpr cache_hint L2H =
173  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(cache_hint::none);
174  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
175  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
176  constexpr lsc_data_size EDS = expand_data_size(finalize_data_size<T, DS>());
177  constexpr lsc_vector_size VS = to_lsc_vector_size<NElts>();
178  constexpr lsc_data_order Transposed = lsc_data_order::nontranspose;
179  using MsgT = typename lsc_expand_type<T>::type;
180  simd<uintptr_t, N> addrs = reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(p);
181  addrs += convert<uintptr_t>(offsets);
182  simd<MsgT, N * NElts> Tmp = lsc_format_input<MsgT, T>(vals);
183  __esimd_lsc_store_stateless<MsgT, L1H, L2H, AddressScale, ImmOffset, EDS, VS,
184  Transposed, N>(pred.data(), addrs.data(),
185  Tmp.data());
186 }
187 
188 // Returns true iff it is Ok to use llvm.masked.gather and llvm.masked.scatter.
189 // By default (without use specifying __ESIMD_GATHER_SCATTER_LLVM_IR) it is
190 // not used because of an issue in GPU driver, which does not recognize
191 // those operations in SPIR-V when they are used in mixed (scalar and vector)
192 // kernels using invoke_simd() API.
193 constexpr bool isMaskedGatherScatterLLVMAvailable() {
194 #ifdef __ESIMD_GATHER_SCATTER_LLVM_IR
195  return true;
196 #else
197  return false;
198 #endif
199 }
200 
201 } // namespace detail
202 
242 
248 #ifndef __ESIMD_GATHER_SCATTER_LLVM_IR
251 #endif // __ESIMD_GATHER_SCATTER_LLVM_IR
274 template <typename T, int N, int VS, typename OffsetT,
275  typename PropertyListT =
276  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
277 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
278  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>, simd<T, N>>
279 gather(const T *p, simd<OffsetT, N / VS> byte_offsets, simd_mask<N / VS> mask,
280  simd<T, N> pass_thru, PropertyListT props = {}) {
281  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<OffsetT>, "Unsupported offset type");
282  static_assert(N / VS >= 1 && N % VS == 0, "N must be divisible by VS");
283 
284  constexpr size_t Alignment =
285  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, alignment_key>(sizeof(T));
286  static_assert(Alignment >= sizeof(T),
287  "gather() requires at least element-size alignment");
288 
289  // Use LSC lowering if cache-hints are used or VS > 1. Also, if
290  // llvm.masked.gather is not available, then LSC is the only lowering option.
291  if constexpr (detail::has_cache_hints<PropertyListT>() || VS > 1 ||
292  !detail::isMaskedGatherScatterLLVMAvailable()) {
293  static_assert(VS == 1 || sizeof(T) >= 4,
294  "VS > 1 is supprted only for 4- and 8-byte elements");
295  return detail::gather_impl<T, VS, detail::lsc_data_size::default_size,
296  PropertyListT>(p, byte_offsets, mask, pass_thru);
297  } else {
298  simd<uint64_t, N> Addrs(reinterpret_cast<uint64_t>(p));
299  Addrs = Addrs + convert<uint64_t>(byte_offsets);
300 
301  using MsgT = detail::__raw_t<T>;
302  return __esimd_gather_ld<MsgT, N, Alignment>(
303  Addrs.data(), mask.data(),
304  sycl::bit_cast<__ESIMD_DNS::vector_type_t<MsgT, N>>(pass_thru.data()));
305  }
306 }
307 
333 template <typename T, int N, int VS, typename OffsetT,
334  typename PropertyListT =
335  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
336 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
337  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>, simd<T, N>>
338 gather(const T *p, simd<OffsetT, N / VS> byte_offsets, simd_mask<N / VS> mask,
339  PropertyListT props = {}) {
340  constexpr size_t Alignment =
341  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, alignment_key>(sizeof(T));
342  static_assert(Alignment >= sizeof(T),
343  "gather() requires at least element-size alignment");
344 
345  if constexpr (detail::has_cache_hints<PropertyListT>() || VS > 1 ||
346  detail::isMaskedGatherScatterLLVMAvailable() ||
347  !detail::isPowerOf2(N, 32)) {
348  simd<T, N> PassThru; // it is intentionally undefined
349  return gather<T, N, VS>(p, byte_offsets, mask, PassThru, props);
350  } else {
351  simd<uintptr_t, N> Addrs = reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(p);
352  Addrs += convert<uintptr_t>(byte_offsets);
353  using MsgT = detail::__raw_t<T>;
354  if constexpr (sizeof(T) == 1) {
355  auto Ret = __esimd_svm_gather<MsgT, N, detail::ElemsPerAddrEncoding<4>(),
356  detail::ElemsPerAddrEncoding<1>()>(
357  Addrs.data(), mask.data());
358  return __esimd_rdregion<MsgT, N * 4, N, /*VS*/ 0, N, 4>(Ret, 0);
359  } else if constexpr (sizeof(T) == 2) {
360  auto Ret = __esimd_svm_gather<MsgT, N, detail::ElemsPerAddrEncoding<2>(),
361  detail::ElemsPerAddrEncoding<2>()>(
362  Addrs.data(), mask.data());
363  return __esimd_rdregion<MsgT, N * 2, N, /*VS*/ 0, N, 2>(Ret, 0);
364  } else {
365  return __esimd_svm_gather<MsgT, N, detail::ElemsPerAddrEncoding<1>(),
366  detail::ElemsPerAddrEncoding<1>()>(Addrs.data(),
367  mask.data());
368  }
369  }
370 }
371 
390 template <typename T, int N, int VS, typename OffsetT,
391  typename PropertyListT =
392  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
393 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
394  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>, simd<T, N>>
395 gather(const T *p, simd<OffsetT, N / VS> byte_offsets,
396  PropertyListT props = {}) {
397  simd_mask<N / VS> Mask = 1;
398  return gather<T, N, VS>(p, byte_offsets, Mask, props);
399 }

521 template <typename T, int N, int VS = 1, typename OffsetObjT,
522  typename OffsetRegionT,
523  typename PropertyListT =
524  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
525 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
526  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>, simd<T, N>>
527 gather(const T *p, simd_view<OffsetObjT, OffsetRegionT> byte_offsets,
528  simd_mask<N / VS> mask, simd<T, N> pass_thru, PropertyListT props = {}) {
529  return gather<T, N, VS>(p, byte_offsets.read(), mask, pass_thru, props);
530 }

557  typename PropertyListT =

560  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>, simd<T, N>>
561 gather(const T *p, simd_view<OffsetObjT, OffsetRegionT> byte_offsets,
562  simd_mask<N / VS> mask, PropertyListT props = {}) {
563  return gather<T, N, VS>(p, byte_offsets.read(), mask, props);

585  typename PropertyListT =

587 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
588  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>, simd<T, N>>
589 gather(const T *p, simd_view<OffsetObjT, OffsetRegionT> byte_offsets,
590  PropertyListT props = {}) {
591  return gather<T, N, VS>(p, byte_offsets.read(), props);

606 template <typename Tx, int N, typename Toffset>
607 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<std::is_integral_v<Toffset>, simd<Tx, N>>
608 gather(const Tx *p, Toffset offset, simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
609  return gather<Tx, N>(p, simd<Toffset, N>(offset), mask);
610 }

658 template <typename T, int N, int VS = 1, typename OffsetT,
659  typename PropertyListT =
660  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
661 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
662  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
663 scatter(T *p, simd<OffsetT, N / VS> byte_offsets, simd<T, N> vals,
664  simd_mask<N / VS> mask, PropertyListT props = {}) {
665  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<OffsetT>, "Unsupported offset type");
666  static_assert(N / VS >= 1 && N % VS == 0, "N must be divisible by VS");
667 
668  constexpr size_t Alignment =
669  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, alignment_key>(sizeof(T));
670  static_assert(Alignment >= sizeof(T),
671  "scatter() requires at least element-size alignment");
672 
673  // Use LSC lowering if cache-hints are used or VS > 1.
674  if constexpr (detail::has_cache_hints<PropertyListT>() || VS > 1 ||
675  (!__ESIMD_DNS::isPowerOf2(N, 32) &&
676  !detail::isMaskedGatherScatterLLVMAvailable())) {
677  static_assert(VS == 1 || sizeof(T) >= 4,
678  "VS > 1 is supprted only for 4- and 8-byte elements");
679  return detail::scatter_impl<T, VS, detail::lsc_data_size::default_size,
680  PropertyListT>(p, byte_offsets, vals, mask);
681  } else if constexpr (detail::isMaskedGatherScatterLLVMAvailable()) {
682  simd<uint64_t, N> Addrs(reinterpret_cast<uint64_t>(p));
683  Addrs = Addrs + convert<uint64_t>(byte_offsets);
684  using MsgT = detail::__raw_t<T>;
685  __esimd_scatter_st<MsgT, N, Alignment>(
686  sycl::bit_cast<__ESIMD_DNS::vector_type_t<MsgT, N>>(vals.data()),
687  Addrs.data(), mask.data());
688  } else {
689  using Tx = detail::__raw_t<T>;
690  simd<uint64_t, N> byte_offsets_i = convert<uint64_t>(byte_offsets);
691  simd<uint64_t, N> addrs(reinterpret_cast<uint64_t>(p));
692  addrs = addrs + byte_offsets_i;
693  if constexpr (sizeof(T) == 1) {
694  simd<T, N * 4> D = __esimd_wrregion<Tx, N * 4, N, /*VS*/ 0, N, 4>(
695  D.data(), vals.data(), 0);
696  __esimd_svm_scatter<Tx, N, detail::ElemsPerAddrEncoding<4>(),
697  detail::ElemsPerAddrEncoding<1>()>(
698  addrs.data(), D.data(), mask.data());
699  } else if constexpr (sizeof(T) == 2) {
700  simd<Tx, N * 2> D = __esimd_wrregion<Tx, N * 2, N, /*VS*/ 0, N, 2>(
701  D.data(), vals.data(), 0);
702  __esimd_svm_scatter<Tx, N, detail::ElemsPerAddrEncoding<2>(),
703  detail::ElemsPerAddrEncoding<2>()>(
704  addrs.data(), D.data(), mask.data());
705  } else
706  __esimd_svm_scatter<Tx, N, detail::ElemsPerAddrEncoding<1>(),
707  detail::ElemsPerAddrEncoding<1>()>(
708  addrs.data(), vals.data(), mask.data());
709  }
710 }
711

713 // typename PropertyListT = empty_properties_t>
714 // void scatter(T *p, simd<OffsetT, N / VS> byte_offsets, simd<T, N> vals,
715 // PropertyListT props = {}); // (usm-sc-2)
733 template <typename T, int N, int VS = 1, typename OffsetT,
734  typename PropertyListT =
735  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
736 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
737  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
738 scatter(T *p, simd<OffsetT, N / VS> byte_offsets, simd<T, N> vals,
739  PropertyListT props = {}) {
740  simd_mask<N / VS> Mask = 1;
741  scatter<T, N, VS>(p, byte_offsets, vals, Mask, props);
742 }

744 // template <typename T, int N, int VS = 1, typename OffsetSimdViewT,
745 // typename PropertyListT = empty_properties_t>
746 // void scatter(T *p, OffsetSimdViewT byte_offsets, simd<T, N> vals,
747 // simd_mask<N / VS> mask, PropertyListT props = {}); // (usm-sc-3)
768 template <typename T, int N, int VS = 1, typename OffsetSimdViewT,
769  typename PropertyListT =
770  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
771 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
772  detail::is_simd_view_type_v<OffsetSimdViewT> &&
773  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
774 scatter(T *p, OffsetSimdViewT byte_offsets, simd<T, N> vals,
775  simd_mask<N / VS> mask, PropertyListT props = {}) {
776  scatter<T, N, VS>(p, byte_offsets.read(), vals, mask, props);
777 }
778 
801 template <typename T, int N, int VS = 1, typename OffsetSimdViewT,
802  typename PropertyListT =
803  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
804 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
805  detail::is_simd_view_type_v<OffsetSimdViewT> &&
806  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
807 scatter(T *p, OffsetSimdViewT byte_offsets, simd<T, N> vals,
808  PropertyListT props = {}) {
809  simd_mask<N / VS> Mask = 1;
810  scatter<T, N, VS>(p, byte_offsets.read(), vals, Mask, props);
811 }

824 template <typename Tx, int N, typename Toffset>
825 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<std::is_integral_v<Toffset> && N == 1>
826 scatter(Tx *p, Toffset offset, simd<Tx, N> vals, simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
827  scatter<Tx, N, 1>(p, simd<Toffset, N>(offset), vals, mask);
828 }
829 
830 namespace detail {
831 // Accessors may get either 32-bit offset or 64-bit depending on
832 // the -fsycl-esimd-force-stateles-mem mode setting.
833 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
834 using DeviceAccessorOffsetT = uint64_t;
835 #else
836 using DeviceAccessorOffsetT = uint32_t;
837 #endif
838 
870 template <typename T, int NElts, typename PropertyListT>
871 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>, simd<T, NElts>>
872 block_load_impl(const T *p, simd_mask<1> pred, simd<T, NElts> pass_thru) {
873  // Verify input template arguments.
874  check_cache_hints<cache_action::load, PropertyListT>();
875  constexpr size_t Alignment =
876  PropertyListT::template get_property<alignment_key>().value;
877  static_assert(
878  (Alignment >= __ESIMD_DNS::OperandSize::DWORD && sizeof(T) <= 4) ||
879  (Alignment >= __ESIMD_DNS::OperandSize::QWORD && sizeof(T) > 4),
880  "Incorrect alignment for the data type");
881 
882  constexpr int SmallIntFactor64Bit = sizeof(uint64_t) / sizeof(T);
883  constexpr int SmallIntFactor32Bit =
884  sizeof(uint32_t) / sizeof(T) > 1 ? sizeof(uint32_t) / sizeof(T) : 1;
885  static_assert(NElts > 0 && NElts % SmallIntFactor32Bit == 0,
886  "Number of elements is not supported by Transposed load");
887 
888  // If alignment >= 8 and (NElts * sizeof(T)) % 8 == 0) we can load QWORDs.
889  // Don't do it for 4-byte vectors (unless it is greater than 256-bytes),
890  // because it would require a bit-cast, which is supposed to be NO-OP, but
891  // might confuse GPU BE sometimes. 1- and 2-byte vectors are casted anyways.
892  constexpr bool Use64BitData =
893  Alignment >= __ESIMD_DNS::OperandSize::QWORD &&
894  (NElts * sizeof(T)) % sizeof(uint64_t) == 0 &&
895  (sizeof(T) != sizeof(uint32_t) || NElts * sizeof(T) > 256);
896  constexpr int SmallIntFactor =
897  Use64BitData ? SmallIntFactor64Bit : SmallIntFactor32Bit;
898  constexpr int FactoredNElts = NElts / SmallIntFactor;
899  check_lsc_vector_size<FactoredNElts>();
900 
901  // Prepare template arguments for the call of intrinsic.
902  using LoadElemT = __ESIMD_DNS::__raw_t<
903  std::conditional_t<SmallIntFactor == 1, T,
904  std::conditional_t<Use64BitData, uint64_t, uint32_t>>>;
905  constexpr cache_hint L1H =
906  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(cache_hint::none);
907  constexpr cache_hint L2H =
908  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(cache_hint::none);
909 
910  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
911  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
912  constexpr lsc_data_size ActualDS =
913  Use64BitData ? lsc_data_size::u64 : lsc_data_size::u32;
914  constexpr lsc_vector_size VS = to_lsc_vector_size<FactoredNElts>();
915  constexpr auto Transposed = lsc_data_order::transpose;
916  constexpr int N = 1;
917 
918  // Prepare non-template arguments and call the intrinsic.
919  simd<uintptr_t, N> Addrs = reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(p);
920  simd<LoadElemT, FactoredNElts> PassThru =
921  pass_thru.template bit_cast_view<LoadElemT>();
922  simd<LoadElemT, FactoredNElts> Result =
923  __esimd_lsc_load_merge_stateless<LoadElemT, L1H, L2H, AddressScale,
924  ImmOffset, ActualDS, VS, Transposed, N>(
925  pred.data(), Addrs.data(), PassThru.data());
926  return Result.template bit_cast_view<T>();
927 }
928 
961 template <typename T, int NElts, typename PropertyListT, typename AccessorT>
962 __ESIMD_API
963  std::enable_if_t<detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<
964  AccessorT, detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
965  is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
966  simd<T, NElts>>
967  block_load_impl(AccessorT acc, DeviceAccessorOffsetT offset,
968  simd_mask<1> pred) {
969 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
970  simd<T, NElts> PassThru; // Intentionally undefined.
971  return block_load_impl<T, NElts, PropertyListT>(
972  accessorToPointer<T>(acc, offset), pred, PassThru);
973 #else // !__ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
974  // Verify input template arguments.
975  check_cache_hints<cache_action::load, PropertyListT>();
976  constexpr size_t Alignment =
977  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, alignment_key>(sizeof(T));
978  static_assert(
979  (Alignment >= __ESIMD_DNS::OperandSize::DWORD && sizeof(T) <= 4) ||
980  (Alignment >= __ESIMD_DNS::OperandSize::QWORD && sizeof(T) > 4),
981  "Incorrect alignment for the data type");
982 
983  constexpr int SmallIntFactor64Bit = sizeof(uint64_t) / sizeof(T);
984  constexpr int SmallIntFactor32Bit =
985  sizeof(uint32_t) / sizeof(T) > 1 ? sizeof(uint32_t) / sizeof(T) : 1;
986  static_assert(NElts > 0 && NElts % SmallIntFactor32Bit == 0,
987  "Number of elements is not supported by Transposed load");
988 
989  // If alignment >= 8 and (NElts * sizeof(T)) % 8 == 0) we can load QWORDs.
990  // Don't do it for 4-byte vectors (unless it is greater than 256-bytes),
991  // because it would require a bit-cast, which is supposed to be NO-OP, but
992  // might confuse GPU BE sometimes. 1- and 2-byte vectors are casted anyways.
993  constexpr bool Use64BitData =
994  Alignment >= __ESIMD_DNS::OperandSize::QWORD &&
995  (NElts * sizeof(T)) % sizeof(uint64_t) == 0 &&
996  (sizeof(T) != sizeof(uint32_t) || NElts * sizeof(T) > 256);
997  constexpr int SmallIntFactor =
998  Use64BitData ? SmallIntFactor64Bit : SmallIntFactor32Bit;
999  constexpr int FactoredNElts = NElts / SmallIntFactor;
1000  check_lsc_vector_size<FactoredNElts>();
1001 
1002  // Prepare template arguments for the call of intrinsic.
1003  using LoadElemT = __ESIMD_DNS::__raw_t<
1004  std::conditional_t<SmallIntFactor == 1, T,
1005  std::conditional_t<Use64BitData, uint64_t, uint32_t>>>;
1006  constexpr cache_hint L1H =
1007  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(cache_hint::none);
1008  constexpr cache_hint L2H =
1009  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(cache_hint::none);
1010  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
1011  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
1012  constexpr lsc_data_size ActualDS =
1013  Use64BitData ? lsc_data_size::u64 : lsc_data_size::u32;
1014  constexpr auto VS = to_lsc_vector_size<FactoredNElts>();
1015  constexpr auto Transposed = lsc_data_order::transpose;
1016  constexpr int N = 1;
1017 
1018  // Prepare non-template arguments and call the intrinsic.
1019  simd<uint32_t, N> Offsets = offset;
1020  auto SI = get_surface_index(acc);
1021  simd<LoadElemT, FactoredNElts> Result =
1022  __esimd_lsc_load_bti<LoadElemT, L1H, L2H, AddressScale, ImmOffset,
1023  ActualDS, VS, Transposed, N>(pred.data(),
1024  Offsets.data(), SI);
1025  return Result.template bit_cast_view<T>();
1026 #endif // !__ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
1027 }
1028 
1062 template <typename T, int NElts, typename PropertyListT, typename AccessorT>
1063 __ESIMD_API
1064  std::enable_if_t<detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<
1065  AccessorT, detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
1066  is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
1067  simd<T, NElts>>
1068  block_load_impl(AccessorT acc, DeviceAccessorOffsetT offset,
1069  simd_mask<1> pred, simd<T, NElts> pass_thru) {
1070 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
1071  return block_load_impl<T, NElts, PropertyListT>(
1072  accessorToPointer<T>(acc, offset), pred, pass_thru);
1073 #else // !__ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
1074  // Verify input template arguments.
1075  check_cache_hints<cache_action::load, PropertyListT>();
1076  constexpr size_t Alignment =
1077  PropertyListT::template get_property<alignment_key>().value;
1078  static_assert(
1079  (Alignment >= __ESIMD_DNS::OperandSize::DWORD && sizeof(T) <= 4) ||
1080  (Alignment >= __ESIMD_DNS::OperandSize::QWORD && sizeof(T) > 4),
1081  "Incorrect alignment for the data type");
1082 
1083  constexpr int SmallIntFactor64Bit = sizeof(uint64_t) / sizeof(T);
1084  constexpr int SmallIntFactor32Bit =
1085  sizeof(uint32_t) / sizeof(T) > 1 ? sizeof(uint32_t) / sizeof(T) : 1;
1086  static_assert(NElts > 0 && NElts % SmallIntFactor32Bit == 0,
1087  "Number of elements is not supported by Transposed load");
1088 
1089  // If alignment >= 8 and (NElts * sizeof(T)) % 8 == 0) we can load QWORDs.
1090  // Don't do it for 4-byte vectors (unless it is greater than 256-bytes),
1091  // because it would require a bit-cast, which is supposed to be NO-OP, but
1092  // might confuse GPU BE sometimes. 1- and 2-byte vectors are casted anyways.
1093  constexpr bool Use64BitData =
1094  Alignment >= __ESIMD_DNS::OperandSize::QWORD &&
1095  (NElts * sizeof(T)) % sizeof(uint64_t) == 0 &&
1096  (sizeof(T) != sizeof(uint32_t) || NElts * sizeof(T) > 256);
1097  constexpr int SmallIntFactor =
1098  Use64BitData ? SmallIntFactor64Bit : SmallIntFactor32Bit;
1099  constexpr int FactoredNElts = NElts / SmallIntFactor;
1100  check_lsc_vector_size<FactoredNElts>();
1101 
1102  // Prepare template arguments for the call of intrinsic.
1103  using LoadElemT = __ESIMD_DNS::__raw_t<
1104  std::conditional_t<SmallIntFactor == 1, T,
1105  std::conditional_t<Use64BitData, uint64_t, uint32_t>>>;
1106  constexpr cache_hint L1H =
1107  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(cache_hint::none);
1108  constexpr cache_hint L2H =
1109  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(cache_hint::none);
1110  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
1111  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
1112  constexpr lsc_data_size ActualDS =
1113  Use64BitData ? lsc_data_size::u64 : lsc_data_size::u32;
1114  constexpr auto VS = to_lsc_vector_size<FactoredNElts>();
1115  constexpr auto Transposed = lsc_data_order::transpose;
1116  constexpr int N = 1;
1117 
1118  // Prepare non-template arguments and call the intrinsic.
1119  simd<uint32_t, N> Offsets = offset;
1120  auto SI = get_surface_index(acc);
1121  simd<LoadElemT, FactoredNElts> PassThru =
1122  pass_thru.template bit_cast_view<LoadElemT>();
1123  simd<LoadElemT, FactoredNElts> Result =
1124  __esimd_lsc_load_merge_bti<LoadElemT, L1H, L2H, AddressScale, ImmOffset,
1125  ActualDS, VS, Transposed, N>(
1126  pred.data(), Offsets.data(), SI, PassThru.data());
1127  return Result.template bit_cast_view<T>();
1128 #endif // !__ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
1129 }
1130 
1131 template <typename T, int NElts, typename PropertyListT>
1132 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<detail::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
1133 block_store_impl(T *p, simd<T, NElts> vals, simd_mask<1> pred) {
1134  detail::check_cache_hints<cache_action::store, PropertyListT>();
1135  constexpr size_t Alignment =
1136  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, alignment_key>(sizeof(T));
1137  static_assert(
1138  (Alignment >= __ESIMD_DNS::OperandSize::DWORD && sizeof(T) <= 4) ||
1139  (Alignment >= __ESIMD_DNS::OperandSize::QWORD && sizeof(T) > 4),
1140  "Incorrect alignment for the data type");
1141 
1142  constexpr int SmallIntFactor64Bit = sizeof(uint64_t) / sizeof(T);
1143  constexpr int SmallIntFactor32Bit =
1144  sizeof(uint32_t) / sizeof(T) > 1 ? sizeof(uint32_t) / sizeof(T) : 1;
1145  static_assert(NElts > 0 && NElts % SmallIntFactor32Bit == 0,
1146  "Number of elements is not supported by Transposed store");
1147 
1148  // If alignment >= 8 and (NElts * sizeof(T)) % 8 == 0) we can store QWORDs.
1149  // Don't do it for 4-byte vectors (unless it is greater than 256-bytes),
1150  // because it would require a bit-cast, which is supposed to be NO-OP, but
1151  // might confuse GPU BE sometimes. 1- and 2-byte vectors are casted anyways.
1152  constexpr bool Use64BitData =
1153  Alignment >= __ESIMD_DNS::OperandSize::QWORD &&
1154  (NElts * sizeof(T)) % sizeof(uint64_t) == 0 &&
1155  (sizeof(T) != sizeof(uint32_t) || NElts * sizeof(T) > 256);
1156 
1157  constexpr int SmallIntFactor =
1158  Use64BitData ? SmallIntFactor64Bit : SmallIntFactor32Bit;
1159  constexpr int FactoredNElts = NElts / SmallIntFactor;
1160 
1161  check_lsc_vector_size<FactoredNElts>();
1162 
1163  using StoreType = __ESIMD_DNS::__raw_t<
1164  std::conditional_t<SmallIntFactor == 1, T,
1165  std::conditional_t<Use64BitData, uint64_t, uint32_t>>>;
1166  constexpr cache_hint L1H =
1167  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(cache_hint::none);
1168  constexpr cache_hint L2H =
1169  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(cache_hint::none);
1170  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
1171  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
1172  constexpr lsc_data_size ActualDS =
1173  Use64BitData ? lsc_data_size::u64 : lsc_data_size::u32;
1174  constexpr lsc_vector_size VS = to_lsc_vector_size<FactoredNElts>();
1175  constexpr auto Transposed = lsc_data_order::transpose;
1176  constexpr int N = 1;
1177  simd<uintptr_t, N> Addrs = reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(p);
1178 
1179  __esimd_lsc_store_stateless<StoreType, L1H, L2H, AddressScale, ImmOffset,
1180  ActualDS, VS, Transposed, N>(
1181  pred.data(), Addrs.data(),
1182  sycl::bit_cast<__ESIMD_DNS::vector_type_t<StoreType, FactoredNElts>>(
1183  vals.data()));
1184 }
1185 
1186 template <typename T, int NElts, typename PropertyListT, typename AccessorT>
1187 __ESIMD_API
1188  std::enable_if_t<detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<
1189  AccessorT, detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_write> &&
1190  detail::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
1191  block_store_impl(AccessorT acc, DeviceAccessorOffsetT offset,
1192  simd<T, NElts> vals, simd_mask<1> pred) {
1193 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
1194  block_store_impl<T, NElts, PropertyListT>(accessorToPointer<T>(acc, offset),
1195  vals, pred);
1196 #else
1197  // Verify input template arguments.
1198  check_cache_hints<cache_action::store, PropertyListT>();
1199  constexpr size_t Alignment =
1200  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, alignment_key>(sizeof(T));
1201  static_assert(
1202  (Alignment >= __ESIMD_DNS::OperandSize::DWORD && sizeof(T) <= 4) ||
1203  (Alignment >= __ESIMD_DNS::OperandSize::QWORD && sizeof(T) > 4),
1204  "Incorrect alignment for the data type");
1205 
1206  constexpr int SmallIntFactor64Bit = sizeof(uint64_t) / sizeof(T);
1207  constexpr int SmallIntFactor32Bit =
1208  sizeof(uint32_t) / sizeof(T) > static_cast<size_t>(1)
1209  ? sizeof(uint32_t) / sizeof(T)
1210  : static_cast<size_t>(1);
1211  static_assert(NElts > 0 && NElts % SmallIntFactor32Bit == 0,
1212  "Number of elements is not supported by Transposed store");
1213 
1214  // If alignment >= 8 and (NElts * sizeof(T)) % 8 == 0) we can store QWORDs.
1215  // Don't do it for 4-byte vectors (unless it is greater than 256-bytes),
1216  // because it would require a bit-cast, which is supposed to be NO-OP, but
1217  // might confuse GPU BE sometimes. 1- and 2-byte vectors are casted anyways.
1218  constexpr bool Use64BitData =
1219  Alignment >= __ESIMD_DNS::OperandSize::QWORD &&
1220  (NElts * sizeof(T)) % sizeof(uint64_t) == 0 &&
1221  (sizeof(T) != sizeof(uint32_t) || NElts * sizeof(T) > 256);
1222  constexpr int SmallIntFactor =
1223  Use64BitData ? SmallIntFactor64Bit : SmallIntFactor32Bit;
1224  constexpr int FactoredNElts = NElts / SmallIntFactor;
1225  check_lsc_vector_size<FactoredNElts>();
1226 
1227  // Prepare template arguments for the call of intrinsic.
1228  using StoreElemT = __ESIMD_DNS::__raw_t<
1229  std::conditional_t<SmallIntFactor == 1, T,
1230  std::conditional_t<Use64BitData, uint64_t, uint32_t>>>;
1231  constexpr cache_hint L1H =
1232  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(cache_hint::none);
1233  constexpr cache_hint L2H =
1234  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(cache_hint::none);
1235  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
1236  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
1237  constexpr lsc_data_size ActualDS =
1238  Use64BitData ? lsc_data_size::u64 : lsc_data_size::u32;
1239  constexpr auto VS = to_lsc_vector_size<FactoredNElts>();
1240  constexpr auto Transposed = lsc_data_order::transpose;
1241  constexpr int N = 1;
1242 
1243  // Prepare non-template arguments and call the intrinsic.
1244  simd<uint32_t, N> Offsets = offset;
1245  auto SI = get_surface_index(acc);
1246 
1247  __esimd_lsc_store_bti<StoreElemT, L1H, L2H, AddressScale, ImmOffset, ActualDS,
1248  VS, Transposed, N>(
1249  pred.data(), Offsets.data(),
1250  sycl::bit_cast<__ESIMD_DNS::vector_type_t<StoreElemT, FactoredNElts>>(
1251  vals.data()),
1252  SI);
1253 #endif
1254 }
1255 
1256 } // namespace detail
1257 
1272 template <typename Tx, int N,
1273  typename Flags = overaligned_tag<detail::OperandSize::OWORD>>
1274 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<is_simd_flag_type_v<Flags>>
1275 block_store(Tx *addr, simd<Tx, N> vals, Flags) {
1276  using T = typename detail::__raw_t<Tx>;
1277  using VecT = typename simd<T, N>::raw_vector_type;
1278  constexpr size_t Align = Flags::template alignment<simd<T, N>>;
1279  __esimd_svm_block_st<T, N, Align>(reinterpret_cast<VecT *>(addr),
1280  vals.data());
1281 }
1282 
1285 
1296 
1300 
1305 
1311 
1345 template <typename T, int N,
1346  typename PropertyListT =
1347  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
1348 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
1349  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>, simd<T, N>>
1350 block_load(const T *ptr, PropertyListT props = {}) {
1351  constexpr size_t DefaultAlignment = (sizeof(T) <= 4) ? 4 : sizeof(T);
1352  using NewPropertyListT =
1353  detail::add_alignment_property_t<PropertyListT, DefaultAlignment>;
1354  if constexpr (detail::has_cache_hints<PropertyListT>()) {
1355  simd<T, N> PassThru; // Intentionally undefined.
1356  simd_mask<1> Mask = 1;
1357  return detail::block_load_impl<T, N, NewPropertyListT>(ptr, Mask, PassThru);
1358  } else {
1359  constexpr size_t Alignment =
1360  NewPropertyListT::template get_property<alignment_key>().value;
1361  return block_load<T, N>(ptr, overaligned_tag<Alignment>{});
1362  }
1363 }
1364 
1400 template <typename T, int N,
1401  typename PropertyListT =
1402  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
1403 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
1404  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>, simd<T, N>>
1405 block_load(const T *ptr, size_t byte_offset, PropertyListT props = {}) {
1406  const T *AdjustedPtr = reinterpret_cast<const T *>(
1407  reinterpret_cast<const int8_t *>(ptr) + byte_offset);
1408  return block_load<T, N>(AdjustedPtr, props);
1409 }
1410 
1443 template <typename T, int N,
1444  typename PropertyListT =
1445  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
1446 __ESIMD_API
1447  std::enable_if_t<detail::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>, simd<T, N>>
1448  block_load(const T *ptr, simd_mask<1> pred, PropertyListT props = {}) {
1449  constexpr size_t DefaultAlignment = (sizeof(T) <= 4) ? 4 : sizeof(T);
1450  using NewPropertyListT =
1451  detail::add_alignment_property_t<PropertyListT, DefaultAlignment>;
1452  simd<T, N> PassThru; // Intentionally uninitialized.
1453  return detail::block_load_impl<T, N, NewPropertyListT>(ptr, pred, PassThru);
1454 }
1455 
1489 template <typename T, int N,
1490  typename PropertyListT =
1491  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
1492 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
1493  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>, simd<T, N>>
1494 block_load(const T *ptr, size_t byte_offset, simd_mask<1> pred,
1495  PropertyListT props = {}) {
1496  const T *AdjustedPtr = reinterpret_cast<const T *>(
1497  reinterpret_cast<const int8_t *>(ptr) + byte_offset);
1498  return block_load<T, N>(AdjustedPtr, pred, props);
1499 }
1500 
1533 template <typename T, int N,
1534  typename PropertyListT =
1535  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
1536 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
1537  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>, simd<T, N>>
1538 block_load(const T *ptr, simd_mask<1> pred, simd<T, N> pass_thru,
1539  PropertyListT props = {}) {
1540  constexpr size_t DefaultAlignment = (sizeof(T) <= 4) ? 4 : sizeof(T);
1541  using NewPropertyListT =
1542  detail::add_alignment_property_t<PropertyListT, DefaultAlignment>;
1543  return detail::block_load_impl<T, N, NewPropertyListT>(ptr, pred, pass_thru);
1544 }
1545 
1580 template <typename T, int N,
1581  typename PropertyListT =
1582  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
1583 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
1584  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>, simd<T, N>>
1585 block_load(const T *ptr, size_t byte_offset, simd_mask<1> pred,
1586  simd<T, N> pass_thru, PropertyListT props = {}) {
1587  const T *AdjustedPtr = reinterpret_cast<const T *>(
1588  reinterpret_cast<const int8_t *>(ptr) + byte_offset);
1589  return block_load<T, N>(AdjustedPtr, pred, pass_thru, props);
1590 }
1591 
1607 template <typename Tx, int N,
1608  typename Flags = overaligned_tag<detail::OperandSize::OWORD>>
1609 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<is_simd_flag_type_v<Flags>, simd<Tx, N>>
1610 block_load(const Tx *addr, Flags) {
1611  using T = typename detail::__raw_t<Tx>;
1612  using VecT = typename simd<T, N>::raw_vector_type;
1613  constexpr size_t Align = Flags::template alignment<simd<T, N>>;
1614  return __esimd_svm_block_ld<T, N, Align>(
1615  reinterpret_cast<const VecT *>(addr));
1616 }
1617 
1633 template <typename Tx, int N, typename AccessorTy,
1634  typename Flags = vector_aligned_tag,
1635  typename = std::enable_if_t<
1636  is_simd_flag_type_v<Flags> &&
1637  detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<
1638  AccessorTy, detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read>>,
1639  class T = detail::__raw_t<Tx>>
1640 __ESIMD_API simd<Tx, N> block_load(AccessorTy acc,
1641  detail::DeviceAccessorOffsetT byte_offset,
1642  Flags flags) {
1643 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
1644  return block_load<Tx, N>(__ESIMD_DNS::accessorToPointer<Tx>(acc, byte_offset),
1645  flags);
1646 #else
1647  std::ignore = flags;
1648  constexpr unsigned Sz = sizeof(T) * N;
1649  static_assert(Sz >= detail::OperandSize::OWORD,
1650  "block size must be at least 1 oword");
1651  static_assert(Sz % detail::OperandSize::OWORD == 0,
1652  "block size must be whole number of owords");
1653  static_assert(detail::isPowerOf2(Sz / detail::OperandSize::OWORD),
1654  "block must be 1, 2, 4 or 8 owords long");
1655  static_assert(Sz <= 8 * detail::OperandSize::OWORD,
1656  "block size must be at most 8 owords");
1657 
1658  auto surf_ind = __esimd_get_surface_index(
1659  detail::AccessorPrivateProxy::getQualifiedPtrOrImageObj(acc));
1660 
1661  if constexpr (Flags::template alignment<simd<T, N>> >=
1662  detail::OperandSize::OWORD) {
1663  return __esimd_oword_ld<T, N>(surf_ind, byte_offset >> 4);
1664  } else {
1665  return __esimd_oword_ld_unaligned<T, N>(surf_ind, byte_offset);
1666  }
1667 #endif
1668 }
1669 
1679 
1683 
1690 
1696 
1734 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorT,
1735  typename PropertyListT =
1736  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
1737 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
1738  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT> &&
1739  detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
1740  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read>,
1741  simd<T, N>>
1742 block_load(AccessorT acc, detail::DeviceAccessorOffsetT byte_offset,
1743  PropertyListT props = {}) {
1744 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
1745  return block_load<T, N>(detail::accessorToPointer<T>(acc, byte_offset),
1746  props);
1747 #else // !__ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
1748  constexpr auto L1Hint =
1749  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(
1750  cache_hint::none);
1751  constexpr auto L2Hint =
1752  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(
1753  cache_hint::none);
1754  static_assert(!PropertyListT::template has_property<cache_hint_L3_key>(),
1755  "L3 cache hint is reserved. The old/experimental L3 LSC cache "
1756  "hint is cache_level::L2 now.");
1757 
1758  // If the alignment property is not passed, then assume the pointer
1759  // is element-aligned.
1760  constexpr size_t DefaultAlignment = (sizeof(T) <= 4) ? 4 : sizeof(T);
1761  constexpr size_t Alignment =
1762  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, alignment_key>(DefaultAlignment);
1763 
1764  // Legacy surface index loads must be 1, 2, 4 or 8 owords long.
1765  constexpr size_t Size = sizeof(T) * N;
1766  constexpr size_t OWord = detail::OperandSize::OWORD;
1767  constexpr bool IsLegacySize = Size == OWord || Size == 2 * OWord ||
1768  Size == 4 * OWord || Size == 8 * OWord;
1769 
1770  using NewPropertyListT =
1771  detail::add_alignment_property_t<PropertyListT, DefaultAlignment>;
1772  if constexpr (detail::has_cache_hints<PropertyListT>() || !IsLegacySize) {
1773  return detail::block_load_impl<T, N, NewPropertyListT>(acc, byte_offset,
1774  simd_mask<1>(1));
1775  } else {
1776  constexpr size_t Alignment =
1777  NewPropertyListT::template get_property<alignment_key>().value;
1778  return block_load<T, N>(acc, byte_offset, overaligned_tag<Alignment>{});
1779  }
1780 #endif // !__ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
1781 }
1782 
1812 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorT,
1813  typename PropertyListT =
1814  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
1815 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
1816  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT> &&
1817  detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
1818  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read>,
1819  simd<T, N>>
1820 block_load(AccessorT acc, PropertyListT /* props */ = {}) {
1821  // Create new properties without the alignment property passed in 'props',
1822  // and add alignment<16> as it is usable and most favourable in this case.
1823  constexpr auto L1Hint =
1824  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(
1825  cache_hint::none);
1826  constexpr auto L2Hint =
1827  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(
1828  cache_hint::none);
1829  static_assert(!PropertyListT::template has_property<cache_hint_L3_key>(),
1830  "L3 cache hint is reserved. The old/experimental L3 LSC cache "
1831  "hint is cache_level::L2 now.");
1832  properties Props{cache_hint_L1<L1Hint>, cache_hint_L2<L2Hint>, alignment<16>};
1833  return block_load<T, N>(acc, 0, Props);
1834 }
1835 
1867 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorT,
1868  typename PropertyListT =
1869  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
1870 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
1871  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT> &&
1872  detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
1873  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read>,
1874  simd<T, N>>
1875 block_load(AccessorT acc, detail::DeviceAccessorOffsetT byte_offset,
1876  simd_mask<1> pred, simd<T, N> pass_thru,
1877  PropertyListT /* props */ = {}) {
1878  constexpr auto L1Hint =
1879  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(
1880  cache_hint::none);
1881  constexpr auto L2Hint =
1882  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(
1883  cache_hint::none);
1884  static_assert(!PropertyListT::template has_property<cache_hint_L3_key>(),
1885  "L3 cache hint is reserved. The old/experimental L3 LSC cache "
1886  "hint is cache_level::L2 now.");
1887 
1888  // If the alignment property is not passed, then assume the byte_offset
1889  // is element-aligned and is at leat 4-bytes.
1890  constexpr size_t DefaultAlignment = (sizeof(T) <= 4) ? 4 : sizeof(T);
1891  using NewPropertyListT =
1892  detail::add_alignment_property_t<PropertyListT, DefaultAlignment>;
1893  return detail::block_load_impl<T, N, NewPropertyListT>(acc, byte_offset, pred,
1894  pass_thru);
1895 }
1896 
1928 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorT,
1929  typename PropertyListT =
1930  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
1931 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
1932  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT> &&
1933  detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
1934  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read>,
1935  simd<T, N>>
1936 block_load(AccessorT acc, detail::DeviceAccessorOffsetT byte_offset,
1937  simd_mask<1> pred, PropertyListT props = {}) {
1938  simd<T, N> PassThru; // Intentionally uninitialized.
1939  return block_load<T, N>(acc, byte_offset, pred, PassThru, props);
1940 }

1969 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorT,
1970  typename PropertyListT =
1971  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
1972 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
1973  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT> &&
1974  detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
1975  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read>,
1976  simd<T, N>>
1977 block_load(AccessorT acc, simd_mask<1> pred, simd<T, N> pass_thru,
1978  PropertyListT /* props */ = {}) {
1979  // Create new properties without the alignment property passed in 'props',
1980  // and add alignment<16> as it is usable and most favourable in this case.
1981  constexpr auto L1Hint =
1982  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(
1983  cache_hint::none);
1984  constexpr auto L2Hint =
1985  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(
1986  cache_hint::none);
1987  static_assert(!PropertyListT::template has_property<cache_hint_L3_key>(),
1988  "L3 cache hint is reserved. The old/experimental L3 LSC cache "
1989  "hint is cache_level::L2 now.");
1990  properties Props{cache_hint_L1<L1Hint>, cache_hint_L2<L2Hint>, alignment<16>};
1991  return block_load<T, N>(acc, 0, pred, pass_thru, Props);

2020 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorT,
2021  typename PropertyListT =
2022  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
2023 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
2024  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT> &&
2025  detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
2026  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read>,
2027  simd<T, N>>
2028 block_load(AccessorT acc, simd_mask<1> pred, PropertyListT /* props */ = {}) {
2029  // Create new properties without the alignment property passed in 'props',
2030  // and add alignment<16> as it is usable and most favourable in this case.
2031  constexpr auto L1Hint =
2032  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(
2033  cache_hint::none);
2034  constexpr auto L2Hint =
2035  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(
2036  cache_hint::none);
2037  static_assert(!PropertyListT::template has_property<cache_hint_L3_key>(),
2038  "L3 cache hint is reserved. The old/experimental L3 LSC cache "
2039  "hint is cache_level::L2 now.");
2040  properties Props{cache_hint_L1<L1Hint>, cache_hint_L2<L2Hint>, alignment<16>};
2041 
2042  simd<T, N> PassThru; // Intentionally uninitialized.
2043  return block_load<T, N>(acc, 0, pred, PassThru, Props);
2044 }

2099 template <typename T, int N,
2100  typename PropertyListT =
2101  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
2102 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<detail::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
2103 block_store(T *ptr, simd<T, N> vals, PropertyListT /* props */ = {}) {
2104  if constexpr (detail::has_cache_hints<PropertyListT>()) {
2105  constexpr size_t DefaultAlignment = (sizeof(T) <= 4) ? 4 : sizeof(T);
2106  using NewPropertyListT =
2107  detail::add_alignment_property_t<PropertyListT, DefaultAlignment>;
2108  simd_mask<1> Mask = 1;
2109  detail::block_store_impl<T, N, NewPropertyListT>(ptr, vals, Mask);
2110  } else {
2111  // If the alignment property is not passed, then assume the pointer
2112  // is OWORD-aligned.
2113  constexpr size_t Alignment =
2114  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, alignment_key>(
2115  detail::OperandSize::OWORD);
2116  block_store<T, N>(ptr, vals, overaligned_tag<Alignment>{});
2117  }
2118 }
2119 
2154 template <typename T, int N,
2155  typename PropertyListT =
2156  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
2157 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
2158  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
2159 block_store(T *ptr, size_t byte_offset, simd<T, N> vals,
2160  PropertyListT props = {}) {
2161  T *AdjustedPtr =
2162  reinterpret_cast<T *>(reinterpret_cast<int8_t *>(ptr) + byte_offset);
2163  block_store<T, N>(AdjustedPtr, vals, props);
2164 }

2198 template <typename T, int N,
2199  typename PropertyListT =
2200  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
2201 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<detail::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
2202 block_store(T *ptr, simd<T, N> vals, simd_mask<1> pred,
2203  PropertyListT /* props */ = {}) {
2204  constexpr size_t DefaultAlignment = (sizeof(T) <= 4) ? 4 : sizeof(T);
2205  using NewPropertyListT =
2206  detail::add_alignment_property_t<PropertyListT, DefaultAlignment>;
2207  detail::block_store_impl<T, N, NewPropertyListT>(ptr, vals, pred);
2208 }
2209 
2230 // the minimally required element-size alignment otherwise.
2246 template <typename T, int N,
2247  typename PropertyListT =
2248  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
2249 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
2250  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
2251 block_store(T *ptr, size_t byte_offset, simd<T, N> vals, simd_mask<1> pred,
2252  PropertyListT props = {}) {
2253  T *AdjustedPtr =
2254  reinterpret_cast<T *>(reinterpret_cast<int8_t *>(ptr) + byte_offset);
2255  block_store<T, N>(AdjustedPtr, vals, pred, props);
2256 }

2266 
2269 
2273 
2276 
2320 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorT,
2321  typename PropertyListT =
2322  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
2323 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
2324  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT> &&
2325  detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
2326  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_write>>
2327 block_store(AccessorT acc, detail::DeviceAccessorOffsetT byte_offset,
2328  simd<T, N> vals, PropertyListT props = {}) {
2329 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
2330  block_store<T, N>(detail::accessorToPointer<T>(acc, byte_offset), vals,
2331  props);
2332 #else
2333  constexpr int DefaultLSCAlignment = (sizeof(T) <= 4) ? 4 : sizeof(T);
2334  constexpr size_t Alignment =
2335  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, alignment_key>(
2336  DefaultLSCAlignment);
2337  constexpr bool AlignmentRequiresLSC =
2338  PropertyListT::template has_property<alignment_key>() && Alignment < 16;
2339  using Tx = detail::__raw_t<T>;
2340  constexpr unsigned Sz = sizeof(Tx) * N;
2341  constexpr bool SzRequiresLSC =
2342  Sz < detail::OperandSize::OWORD || Sz % detail::OperandSize::OWORD != 0 ||
2343  !detail::isPowerOf2(Sz / detail::OperandSize::OWORD) ||
2344  Sz > 8 * detail::OperandSize::OWORD;
2345  if constexpr (detail::has_cache_hints<PropertyListT>() ||
2346  AlignmentRequiresLSC || SzRequiresLSC) {
2347  using NewPropertyListT =
2348  detail::add_alignment_property_t<PropertyListT, DefaultLSCAlignment>;
2349  simd_mask<1> Mask = 1;
2350  detail::block_store_impl<T, N, NewPropertyListT>(acc, byte_offset, vals,
2351  Mask);
2352  } else {
2353  auto surf_ind = __esimd_get_surface_index(
2354  detail::AccessorPrivateProxy::getQualifiedPtrOrImageObj(acc));
2355  __esimd_oword_st<Tx, N>(surf_ind, byte_offset >> 4, vals.data());
2356  }
2357 #endif
2358 }
2359 
2389 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorT,
2390  typename PropertyListT =
2391  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
2392 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
2393  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT> &&
2394  detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
2395  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_write>>
2396 block_store(AccessorT acc, simd<T, N> vals, PropertyListT props = {}) {
2397  // Create new properties without the alignment property passed in 'props',
2398  // and add alignment<16> as it is usable and most favourable in this case.
2399  constexpr auto L1Hint =
2400  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(
2401  cache_hint::none);
2402  constexpr auto L2Hint =
2403  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(
2404  cache_hint::none);
2405  properties Props{cache_hint_L1<L1Hint>, cache_hint_L2<L2Hint>, alignment<16>};
2406  block_store<T, N>(acc, 0, vals, Props);
2407 }

2441  typename PropertyListT =
2442  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
2443 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
2444  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT> &&
2445  detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
2446  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_write>>
2447 block_store(AccessorT acc, detail::DeviceAccessorOffsetT byte_offset,
2448  simd<T, N> vals, simd_mask<1> pred, PropertyListT props = {}) {
2449  constexpr size_t DefaultAlignment = (sizeof(T) <= 4) ? 4 : sizeof(T);
2450  using NewPropertyListT =
2451  detail::add_alignment_property_t<PropertyListT, DefaultAlignment>;
