2480 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorT,
2481  typename PropertyListT =
2482  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
2483 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
2484  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT> &&
2485  detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
2486  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_write>>
2487 block_store(AccessorT acc, simd<T, N> vals, simd_mask<1> pred,
2488  PropertyListT props = {}) {
2489  // Create new properties without the alignment property passed in 'props',
2490  // and add alignment<16> as it is usable and most favourable in this case.
2491  constexpr auto L1Hint =
2492  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(
2493  cache_hint::none);
2494  constexpr auto L2Hint =
2495  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(
2496  cache_hint::none);
2497  properties Props{cache_hint_L1<L1Hint>, cache_hint_L2<L2Hint>, alignment<16>};
2498  block_store<T, N>(acc, 0, vals, pred, Props);
2499 }
2500 
2502 
2504 
2506 
2507 // Implementations of accessor-based gather and scatter functions
2508 namespace detail {
2509 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorTy>
2510 ESIMD_INLINE ESIMD_NODEBUG std::enable_if_t<
2511  std::is_same_v<detail::LocalAccessorMarker, AccessorTy> ||
2512  is_accessor_with_v<AccessorTy, detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_write>>
2513 scatter_impl(AccessorTy acc, simd<T, N> vals, simd<uint32_t, N> offsets,
2514  uint32_t glob_offset, simd_mask<N> mask) {
2515 
2516  static_assert(detail::isPowerOf2(N, 32), "Unexpected vector length");
2517  if constexpr (sizeof(T) == 8) {
2518  scatter_impl<uint32_t, N>(
2519  acc, vals.template bit_cast_view<uint32_t>().template select<N, 2>(0),
2520  offsets, glob_offset, mask);
2521  scatter_impl<uint32_t, N>(
2522  acc, vals.template bit_cast_view<uint32_t>().template select<N, 2>(1),
2523  offsets, glob_offset + sizeof(uint32_t), mask);
2524  } else {
2525  constexpr int TypeSizeLog2 = detail::ElemsPerAddrEncoding<sizeof(T)>();
2526  // TODO (performance) use hardware-supported scale once BE supports it
2527  constexpr int16_t scale = 0;
2528  const auto si = __ESIMD_NS::get_surface_index(acc);
2529 
2530  if constexpr (sizeof(T) < 4) {
2531  using Tint = std::conditional_t<std::is_integral_v<T>, T,
2532  detail::uint_type_t<sizeof(T)>>;
2533  using Treal = __raw_t<T>;
2534  simd<Tint, N> vals_int = bitcast<Tint, Treal, N>(std::move(vals).data());
2535  using PromoT = typename std::conditional_t<std::is_signed<Tint>::value,
2536  int32_t, uint32_t>;
2537  const simd<PromoT, N> promo_vals = convert<PromoT>(std::move(vals_int));
2538  __esimd_scatter_scaled<PromoT, N, decltype(si), TypeSizeLog2, scale>(
2539  mask.data(), si, glob_offset, offsets.data(), promo_vals.data());
2540  } else {
2541  using Treal = __raw_t<T>;
2542  if constexpr (!std::is_same_v<Treal, T>) {
2543  simd<Treal, N> Values = vals.template bit_cast_view<Treal>();
2544  __esimd_scatter_scaled<Treal, N, decltype(si), TypeSizeLog2, scale>(
2545  mask.data(), si, glob_offset, offsets.data(), Values.data());
2546  } else {
2547  __esimd_scatter_scaled<T, N, decltype(si), TypeSizeLog2, scale>(
2548  mask.data(), si, glob_offset, offsets.data(), vals.data());
2549  }
2550  }
2551  }
2552 }
2553 
2554 #ifndef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
2572 template <typename T, int NElts, lsc_data_size DS, typename PropertyListT,
2573  int N, typename AccessorTy, typename OffsetT>
2574 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
2575  is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorTy, accessor_mode_cap::can_write>>
2576 scatter_impl(AccessorTy acc, simd<OffsetT, N> offsets, simd<T, N * NElts> vals,
2577  simd_mask<N> pred) {
2578  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<OffsetT>,
2579  "Scatter must have integral byte_offset type");
2580  static_assert(sizeof(OffsetT) <= 4,
2581  "Implicit truncation of 64-bit byte_offset to 32-bit is "
2582  "disabled. Use -fsycl-esimd-force-stateless-mem or explicitly "
2583  "convert offsets to a 32-bit vector");
2584  check_lsc_vector_size<NElts>();
2585  check_lsc_data_size<T, DS>();
2586  check_cache_hints<cache_action::store, PropertyListT>();
2587  constexpr cache_hint L1H =
2588  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(cache_hint::none);
2589  constexpr cache_hint L2H =
2590  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(cache_hint::none);
2591  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
2592  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
2593  constexpr lsc_data_size EDS = expand_data_size(finalize_data_size<T, DS>());
2594  constexpr lsc_vector_size LSCNElts = to_lsc_vector_size<NElts>();
2595  constexpr lsc_data_order Transposed = lsc_data_order::nontranspose;
2596  using MsgT = typename lsc_expand_type<T>::type;
2597  simd<MsgT, N * NElts> Tmp = lsc_format_input<MsgT, T>(vals);
2598  simd<uint32_t, N> ByteOffsets32 = convert<uint32_t>(offsets);
2599  auto si = get_surface_index(acc);
2600  __esimd_lsc_store_bti<MsgT, L1H, L2H, AddressScale, ImmOffset, EDS, LSCNElts,
2601  Transposed, N>(pred.data(), ByteOffsets32.data(),
2602  Tmp.data(), si);
2603 }
2604 #endif // __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
2605 
2606 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorTy>
2607 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
2608  (std::is_same_v<detail::LocalAccessorMarker, AccessorTy> ||
2609  is_accessor_with_v<AccessorTy, detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read>),
2610  simd<T, N>>
2611 gather_impl(AccessorTy acc, simd<uint32_t, N> offsets, uint32_t glob_offset,
2612  simd_mask<N> mask) {
2613  static_assert(detail::isPowerOf2(N, 32), "Unexpected vector length");
2614 
2615  if constexpr (sizeof(T) == 8) {
2616  simd<T, N> Res;
2617  Res.template bit_cast_view<uint32_t>().template select<N, 2>(0) =
2618  gather_impl<uint32_t, N>(acc, offsets, glob_offset, mask);
2619  Res.template bit_cast_view<uint32_t>().template select<N, 2>(1) =
2620  gather_impl<uint32_t, N>(acc, offsets, glob_offset + sizeof(uint32_t),
2621  mask);
2622  return Res;
2623  } else {
2624  using Treal = __raw_t<T>;
2625  constexpr int TypeSizeLog2 = detail::ElemsPerAddrEncoding<sizeof(T)>();
2626  // TODO (performance) use hardware-supported scale once BE supports it
2627  constexpr uint32_t scale = 0;
2628  const auto si = get_surface_index(acc);
2629  if constexpr (sizeof(T) < 4) {
2630  using Tint = std::conditional_t<std::is_integral_v<T>, T,
2631  detail::uint_type_t<sizeof(T)>>;
2632 
2633  static_assert(std::is_integral<Tint>::value,
2634  "only integral 1- & 2-byte types are supported");
2635  using PromoT = typename std::conditional_t<std::is_signed<Tint>::value,
2636  int32_t, uint32_t>;
2637  simd<PromoT, N> promo_vals =
2638  __esimd_gather_masked_scaled2<PromoT, N, decltype(si), TypeSizeLog2,
2639  scale>(si, glob_offset, offsets.data(),
2640  mask.data());
2641  auto Res = convert<Tint>(promo_vals);
2642 
2643  if constexpr (!std::is_same_v<Tint, T>) {
2644  return detail::bitcast<Treal, Tint, N>(Res.data());
2645  } else {
2646  return Res;
2647  }
2648  } else {
2649  simd<Treal, N> Res = __esimd_gather_masked_scaled2<Treal, N, decltype(si),
2650  TypeSizeLog2, scale>(
2651  si, glob_offset, offsets.data(), mask.data());
2652  if constexpr (!std::is_same_v<Treal, T>) {
2653  return Res.template bit_cast_view<T>();
2654  } else {
2655  return Res;
2656  }
2657  }
2658  }
2659 }
2660 
2661 #ifndef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
2662 template <typename T, int N, int VS, typename PropertyListT, lsc_data_size DS,
2663  typename OffsetT, typename AccessorT>
2664 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
2665  is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorT, accessor_mode_cap::can_read>,
2666  simd<T, N>>
2667 gather_impl(AccessorT acc, simd<OffsetT, N / VS> byte_offsets,
2668  simd_mask<N / VS> pred, simd<T, N> pass_thru) {
2669  static_assert(N / VS >= 1 && N % VS == 0, "N must be divisible by VS");
2670  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<OffsetT>,
2671  "Gather must have integral byte_offset type");
2672  static_assert(sizeof(OffsetT) <= 4,
2673  "Implicit truncation of 64-bit byte_offset to 32-bit is "
2674  "disabled. Use -fsycl-esimd-force-stateless-mem or explicitly "
2675  "convert offsets to a 32-bit vector");
2676  static_assert(VS == 1 || sizeof(T) >= 4,
2677  "VS > 1 is supprted only for 4- and 8-byte elements");
2678  check_lsc_vector_size<VS>();
2679  check_lsc_data_size<T, DS>();
2680  check_cache_hints<cache_action::load, PropertyListT>();
2681  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
2682  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
2683  constexpr lsc_data_size EDS = expand_data_size(finalize_data_size<T, DS>());
2684  constexpr lsc_vector_size LSCVS = to_lsc_vector_size<VS>();
2685  constexpr auto Transposed = lsc_data_order::nontranspose;
2686  using MsgT = typename lsc_expand_type<T>::type;
2687  constexpr cache_hint L1H =
2688  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(cache_hint::none);
2689  constexpr cache_hint L2H =
2690  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(cache_hint::none);
2691  auto SI = get_surface_index(acc);
2692  simd<uint32_t, N / VS> ByteOffsets32 = convert<uint32_t>(byte_offsets);
2693  simd<MsgT, N> PassThruExpanded = lsc_format_input<MsgT>(pass_thru);
2694  simd<MsgT, N> Result =
2695  __esimd_lsc_load_merge_bti<MsgT, L1H, L2H, AddressScale, ImmOffset, EDS,
2696  LSCVS, Transposed, N / VS>(
2697  pred.data(), ByteOffsets32.data(), SI, PassThruExpanded.data());
2698  return lsc_format_ret<T>(Result);
2699 }
2700 #endif // __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
2701 
2719 template <typename T, int NElts, lsc_data_size DS, int N>
2720 __ESIMD_API simd<T, N * NElts> slm_gather_impl(simd<uint32_t, N> offsets,
2721  simd_mask<N> pred,
2722  simd<T, N * NElts> pass_thru) {
2723  check_lsc_vector_size<NElts>();
2724  check_lsc_data_size<T, DS>();
2725  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
2726  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
2727  constexpr lsc_data_size EDS = expand_data_size(finalize_data_size<T, DS>());
2728  constexpr lsc_vector_size LSCVS = to_lsc_vector_size<NElts>();
2729  constexpr lsc_data_order Transposed = lsc_data_order::nontranspose;
2730  using MsgT = typename lsc_expand_type<T>::type;
2731  simd<MsgT, N * NElts> PassThruExpanded = lsc_format_input<MsgT>(pass_thru);
2732  simd<MsgT, N * NElts> Result =
2733  __esimd_lsc_load_merge_slm<MsgT, cache_hint::none, cache_hint::none,
2734  AddressScale, ImmOffset, EDS, LSCVS,
2735  Transposed, N>(pred.data(), offsets.data(),
2736  PassThruExpanded.data());
2737  return lsc_format_ret<T>(Result);
2738 }
2739 
2754 template <typename T, int NElts, lsc_data_size DS, int N>
2755 __ESIMD_API void slm_scatter_impl(simd<uint32_t, N> offsets,
2756  simd<T, N * NElts> vals, simd_mask<N> pred) {
2757  check_lsc_vector_size<NElts>();
2758  check_lsc_data_size<T, DS>();
2759  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
2760  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
2761  constexpr lsc_data_size EDS = expand_data_size(finalize_data_size<T, DS>());
2762  constexpr lsc_vector_size LSCVS = to_lsc_vector_size<NElts>();
2763  constexpr lsc_data_order Transposed = lsc_data_order::nontranspose;
2764  using MsgT = typename lsc_expand_type<T>::type;
2765  simd<MsgT, N * NElts> Tmp = lsc_format_input<MsgT, T>(vals);
2766  __esimd_lsc_store_slm<MsgT, cache_hint::none, cache_hint::none, AddressScale,
2767  ImmOffset, EDS, LSCVS, Transposed, N>(
2768  pred.data(), offsets.data(), Tmp.data());
2769 }
2770 
2786 template <typename T, int NElts, lsc_data_size DS, typename PropertyListT,
2787  int N, typename Toffset>
2788 __ESIMD_API void prefetch_impl(const T *p, simd<Toffset, N> byte_offsets,
2789  simd_mask<N> pred) {
2790  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<Toffset>, "Unsupported offset type");
2791  check_lsc_vector_size<NElts>();
2792  check_lsc_data_size<T, DS>();
2793  check_cache_hints<cache_action::prefetch, PropertyListT>();
2794  constexpr cache_hint L1H =
2795  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(cache_hint::none);
2796  constexpr cache_hint L2H =
2797  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(cache_hint::none);
2798  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
2799  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
2800  constexpr lsc_data_size EDS = expand_data_size(finalize_data_size<T, DS>());
2801  constexpr lsc_vector_size LSCVS = to_lsc_vector_size<NElts>();
2802  constexpr lsc_data_order Transposed = lsc_data_order::nontranspose;
2803  using MsgT = typename lsc_expand_type<T>::type;
2804  simd<uintptr_t, N> addrs = reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(p);
2805  addrs += convert<uintptr_t>(byte_offsets);
2806  __esimd_lsc_prefetch_stateless<MsgT, L1H, L2H, AddressScale, ImmOffset, EDS,
2807  LSCVS, Transposed, N>(pred.data(),
2808  addrs.data());
2809 }
2810 
2811 template <typename T, int NElts, lsc_data_size DS, typename PropertyListT,
2812  typename Toffset>
2813 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<std::is_integral_v<Toffset>>
2814 prefetch_impl(const T *p, Toffset offset, simd_mask<1> pred) {
2815  check_lsc_vector_size<NElts>();
2816  check_lsc_data_size<T, DS>();
2817  check_cache_hints<cache_action::prefetch, PropertyListT>();
2818  constexpr cache_hint L1H =
2819  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(cache_hint::none);
2820  constexpr cache_hint L2H =
2821  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(cache_hint::none);
2822  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
2823  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
2824  constexpr lsc_data_size EDS = finalize_data_size<T, DS>();
2825 
2826  static_assert(
2827  EDS == lsc_data_size::u32 || EDS == lsc_data_size::u64,
2828  "Transposed prefetch is supported only for data size u32 or u64");
2829  constexpr lsc_vector_size LSCVS = to_lsc_vector_size<NElts>();
2830  constexpr lsc_data_order Transposed = lsc_data_order::transpose;
2831  constexpr int N = 1;
2832 
2833  simd<uintptr_t, N> addrs = reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(p) + offset;
2834  __esimd_lsc_prefetch_stateless<T, L1H, L2H, AddressScale, ImmOffset, EDS,
2835  LSCVS, Transposed, N>(pred.data(),
2836  addrs.data());
2837 }
2838 
2839 #ifndef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
2857 
2858 template <typename T, int NElts, lsc_data_size DS, typename PropertyListT,
2859  int N, typename AccessorTy, typename OffsetT>
2860 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
2861  is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorTy, accessor_mode_cap::can_read>>
2862 prefetch_impl(AccessorTy acc, simd<OffsetT, N> byte_offsets,
2863  simd_mask<N> pred) {
2864  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<OffsetT>,
2865  "Prefetch must have integral byte_offset type");
2866  static_assert(sizeof(OffsetT) <= 4,
2867  "Implicit truncation of 64-bit byte_offset to 32-bit is "
2868  "disabled. Use -fsycl-esimd-force-stateless-mem or explicitly "
2869  "convert offsets to a 32-bit vector");
2870  check_lsc_vector_size<NElts>();
2871  check_lsc_data_size<T, DS>();
2872  check_cache_hints<cache_action::prefetch, PropertyListT>();
2873  constexpr cache_hint L1H =
2874  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(cache_hint::none);
2875  constexpr cache_hint L2H =
2876  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(cache_hint::none);
2877  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
2878  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
2879  constexpr lsc_data_size EDS = expand_data_size(finalize_data_size<T, DS>());
2880  constexpr lsc_vector_size LSCVS = to_lsc_vector_size<NElts>();
2881  constexpr lsc_data_order Transposed = lsc_data_order::nontranspose;
2882  using MsgT = typename lsc_expand_type<T>::type;
2883  simd<uint32_t, N> ByteOffsets32 = convert<uint32_t>(byte_offsets);
2884  auto SI = get_surface_index(acc);
2885  __esimd_lsc_prefetch_bti<MsgT, L1H, L2H, AddressScale, ImmOffset, EDS, LSCVS,
2886  Transposed, N>(pred.data(), ByteOffsets32.data(),
2887  SI);
2888 }
2889 
2907 template <typename T, int NElts, lsc_data_size DS, typename PropertyListT,
2908  typename AccessorTy, typename OffsetT>
2909 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
2910  std::is_integral_v<OffsetT> &&
2911  is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorTy, accessor_mode_cap::can_read>>
2912 prefetch_impl(AccessorTy acc, OffsetT byte_offset, simd_mask<1> pred) {
2913  static_assert(sizeof(OffsetT) <= 4,
2914  "Implicit truncation of 64-bit byte_offset to 32-bit is "
2915  "disabled. Use -fsycl-esimd-force-stateless-mem or explicitly "
2916  "convert offsets to a 32-bit vector");
2917  check_lsc_vector_size<NElts>();
2918  check_lsc_data_size<T, DS>();
2919  check_cache_hints<cache_action::prefetch, PropertyListT>();
2920  constexpr cache_hint L1H =
2921  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(cache_hint::none);
2922  constexpr cache_hint L2H =
2923  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(cache_hint::none);
2924  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
2925  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
2926  constexpr lsc_data_size EDS = finalize_data_size<T, DS>();
2927  static_assert(
2928  EDS == lsc_data_size::u32 || EDS == lsc_data_size::u64,
2929  "Transposed prefetch is supported only for data size u32 or u64");
2930  constexpr lsc_vector_size LSCVS = to_lsc_vector_size<NElts>();
2931  constexpr lsc_data_order Transposed = lsc_data_order::transpose;
2932  constexpr int N = 1;
2933  simd<uint32_t, N> offsets = byte_offset;
2934  auto SI = get_surface_index(acc);
2935  __esimd_lsc_prefetch_bti<T, L1H, L2H, AddressScale, ImmOffset, EDS, LSCVS,
2936  Transposed, N>(pred.data(), offsets.data(), SI);
2937 }
2938 #endif // __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
2939 
2940 // Compute the data size for 2d block load or store.
2941 template <typename T, int NBlocks, int Height, int Width, bool Transposed,
2942  bool Transformed>
2943 constexpr int get_lsc_block_2d_data_size() {
2944  if constexpr (Transformed)
2945  return roundUpNextMultiple<Height, 4 / sizeof(T)>() *
2946  getNextPowerOf2<Width>() * NBlocks;
2947  return Width * Height * NBlocks;
2948 }
2949 
2950 #ifndef __ESIMD_DWORD_BLOCK_2D_WIDTH_SCALE
2951 #define __ESIMD_DWORD_BLOCK_2D_WIDTH_SCALE (1)
2952 #endif
2953 
2954 #ifndef __ESIMD_BLOCK_2D_WIDTH_CHECK
2955 #define __ESIMD_BLOCK_2D_WIDTH_CHECK(OP, BLOCK_WIDTH, NBLOCKS, SIZE) \
2956  static_assert((BLOCK_WIDTH) * (NBLOCKS) * (SIZE) <= 64, \
2957  "Unsupported block width");
2958 #endif
2959 
2960 enum class block_2d_op { prefetch, load, store };
2961 
2962 // Compile-time checks for lsc_load_2d/prefetch_2d/store_2d restrictions.
2963 template <typename T, int BlockWidth, int BlockHeight, int NBlocks,
2964  bool Transposed, bool Transformed, block_2d_op Op>
2965 constexpr void check_lsc_block_2d_restrictions() {
2966  constexpr int GRFByteSize = BlockWidth * BlockHeight * NBlocks * sizeof(T);
2967  static_assert(BlockWidth > 0, "Block width must be positive");
2968  static_assert(BlockHeight > 0, "Block height must be positive");
2969  // Restrictions based on documentation.
2970  if constexpr (Op == block_2d_op::store)
2971  static_assert(GRFByteSize <= 512, "2D store supports 512 bytes max");
2972  else
2973  static_assert(GRFByteSize <= 2048,
2974  "2D load/prefetch supports 2048 bytes max");
2975  static_assert(!Transposed || !Transformed,
2976  "Transposed and transformed is not supported");
2977  static_assert((sizeof(T) * BlockWidth) % 4 == 0,
2978  "Block width must be aligned by DW");
2979  if constexpr (Transposed) {
2980  static_assert(NBlocks == 1, "Transposed expected to be 1 block only");
2981  static_assert(sizeof(T) == 4 || sizeof(T) == 8,
2982  "Transposed load is supported only for data size u32 or u64");
2983  static_assert(sizeof(T) == 8 ? BlockHeight == 8
2984  : BlockHeight >= 1 && BlockHeight <= 32,
2985  "Unsupported block height");
2986  static_assert(sizeof(T) == 8
2987  ? __ESIMD_DNS::isPowerOf2(BlockWidth, 4)
2988  : BlockWidth >= 1 &&
2989  BlockWidth <=
2990  8 * __ESIMD_DWORD_BLOCK_2D_WIDTH_SCALE,
2991  "Unsupported block width");
2992  } else if constexpr (Transformed) {
2993  static_assert(sizeof(T) == 1 || sizeof(T) == 2,
2994  "VNNI transform is supported only for data size u8 or u16");
2995  static_assert(__ESIMD_DNS::isPowerOf2(NBlocks, 4),
2996  "Unsupported number of blocks");
2997  static_assert(BlockHeight * sizeof(T) >= 4 && BlockHeight <= 32,
2998  "Unsupported block height");
2999  static_assert(BlockWidth * sizeof(T) >= 4 && BlockWidth <= 16 &&
3000  BlockWidth * NBlocks * sizeof(T) <= 64,
3001  "Unsupported block width");
3002  } else {
3003  if constexpr (Op == block_2d_op::store) {
3004  static_assert(NBlocks == 1, "Unsupported number of blocks for 2D store");
3005  static_assert(BlockHeight <= 8, "Unsupported block height for store");
3006  } else {
3007  static_assert(
3008  __ESIMD_DNS::isPowerOf2(NBlocks, sizeof(T) == 1 ? 4 : 8 / sizeof(T)),
3009  "Unsupported number of blocks for 2D load/prefetch");
3010  static_assert(BlockHeight <= 32, "Unsupported block height for load");
3011  }
3012  static_assert(BlockWidth * sizeof(T) >= 4, "Unsupported block width");
3013  __ESIMD_BLOCK_2D_WIDTH_CHECK(Op, BlockWidth, NBlocks, sizeof(T));
3014  }
3015 }
3016 #undef __ESIMD_DWORD_BLOCK_2D_WIDTH_SCALE
3017 #undef __ESIMD_BLOCK_2D_WIDTH_CHECK
3018 
3049 template <
3050  typename T, int BlockWidth, int BlockHeight, int NBlocks, bool Transposed,
3051  bool Transformed, typename PropertyListT,
3052  int N = get_lsc_block_2d_data_size<__raw_t<T>, NBlocks, BlockHeight,
3053  BlockWidth, Transposed, Transformed>()>
3054 __ESIMD_API simd<T, N> load_2d_impl(const T *Ptr, unsigned SurfaceWidth,
3055  unsigned SurfaceHeight,
3056  unsigned SurfacePitch, int X, int Y) {
3057 
3058  check_cache_hints<cache_action::load, PropertyListT>();
3059  constexpr cache_hint L1H =
3060  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(cache_hint::none);
3061  constexpr cache_hint L2H =
3062  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(cache_hint::none);
3063  using RawT = __raw_t<T>;
3064  check_lsc_block_2d_restrictions<RawT, BlockWidth, BlockHeight, NBlocks,
3065  Transposed, Transformed, block_2d_op::load>();
3066  // For Load BlockWidth is padded up to the next power-of-two value.
3067  // For Load with Transpose the pre-operation BlockHeight is padded up
3068  // to the next power-of-two value.
3069  // For Load with Transform pre-operation BlockHeight is padded up to
3070  // multiple of K, where K = 4B / sizeof(T).
3071  constexpr int ElemsPerDword = 4 / sizeof(RawT);
3072  constexpr int GRFRowSize = Transposed ? BlockHeight
3073  : Transformed ? BlockWidth * ElemsPerDword
3074  : BlockWidth;
3075  constexpr int GRFRowPitch = getNextPowerOf2<GRFRowSize>();
3076  constexpr int GRFColSize =
3077  Transposed
3078  ? BlockWidth
3079  : (Transformed ? (BlockHeight + ElemsPerDword - 1) / ElemsPerDword
3080  : BlockHeight);
3081  constexpr int GRFBlockSize = GRFRowPitch * GRFColSize;
3082  constexpr int GRFBlockPitch =
3083  roundUpNextMultiple<64 / sizeof(RawT), GRFBlockSize>();
3084  constexpr int ActualN = NBlocks * GRFBlockPitch;
3085 
3086  constexpr int DstBlockElements = GRFColSize * GRFRowSize;
3087  constexpr int DstElements = DstBlockElements * NBlocks;
3088 
3089  static_assert(N == ActualN || N == DstElements, "Incorrect element count");
3090  simd_mask<ActualN> Mask = 1;
3091  constexpr lsc_data_size DS =
3092  finalize_data_size<RawT, lsc_data_size::default_size>();
3093  uintptr_t Addr = reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(Ptr);
3094  constexpr lsc_data_order Transpose =
3095  Transposed ? lsc_data_order::transpose : lsc_data_order::nontranspose;
3096  simd<RawT, ActualN> Raw =
3097  __esimd_lsc_load2d_stateless<RawT, L1H, L2H, DS, Transpose, NBlocks,
3098  BlockWidth, BlockHeight, Transformed,
3099  ActualN>(Mask.data(), Addr, SurfaceWidth,
3100  SurfaceHeight, SurfacePitch, X, Y);
3101 
3102  if constexpr (ActualN == N) {
3103  return Raw;
3104  } else {
3105  // HW restrictions force data which is read to contain padding filled with
3106  // zeros for 2d lsc loads. This code eliminates such padding.
3107 
3108  // For example, 2D block load of 5 elements of 1 byte data type will
3109  // take 8 bytes per row for each block.
3110  //
3111  // +----+----+----+----+----+----+-----+-----+
3112  // | 00 | 01 | 02 | 03 | 04 | 05 | 06* | 07* |
3113  // +----+----+----+----+----+----+-----+-----+
3114  // | 10 | 11 | 12 | 13 | 14 | 15 | 16* | 17* |
3115  // +----+----+----+----+----+----+-----+-----+
3116  // | 20 | 21 | 22 | 23 | 24 | 25 | 26* | 27* |
3117  // +----+----+----+----+----+----+-----+-----+
3118  // | 30 | 31 | 32 | 33 | 34 | 35 | 36* | 37* |
3119  // +----+----+----+----+----+----+-----+-----+
3120  // * signifies the padded element.
3121 
3122  simd<RawT, DstElements> Dst;
3123 
3124  for (auto i = 0; i < NBlocks; i++) {
3125  auto DstBlock =
3126  Dst.template select<DstBlockElements, 1>(i * DstBlockElements);
3127 
3128  auto RawBlock = Raw.template select<GRFBlockSize, 1>(i * GRFBlockPitch);
3129  DstBlock =
3130  RawBlock.template bit_cast_view<RawT, GRFColSize, GRFRowPitch>()
3131  .template select<GRFColSize, 1, GRFRowSize, 1>(0, 0)
3132  .template bit_cast_view<RawT>();
3133  }
3134 
3135  return Dst;
3136  }
3137 }
3138 
3161 template <typename T, int BlockWidth, int BlockHeight, int NBlocks,
3162  typename PropertyListT,
3163  int N = get_lsc_block_2d_data_size<__raw_t<T>, NBlocks, BlockHeight,
3164  BlockWidth, false /*Transposed*/,
3165  false /*Transformed*/>()>
3166 __ESIMD_API void prefetch_2d_impl(const T *Ptr, unsigned SurfaceWidth,
3167  unsigned SurfaceHeight, unsigned SurfacePitch,
3168  int X, int Y) {
3169  using RawT = __raw_t<T>;
3170  check_cache_hints<cache_action::prefetch, PropertyListT>();
3171  check_lsc_block_2d_restrictions<RawT, BlockWidth, BlockHeight, NBlocks, false,
3172  false, block_2d_op::prefetch>();
3173  constexpr cache_hint L1H =
3174  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(cache_hint::none);
3175  constexpr cache_hint L2H =
3176  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(cache_hint::none);
3177  constexpr lsc_data_size DS =
3178  finalize_data_size<RawT, lsc_data_size::default_size>();
3179  uintptr_t Addr = reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(Ptr);
3180  constexpr lsc_data_order Transpose = lsc_data_order::nontranspose;
3181  simd_mask<N> Mask = 1;
3182  __esimd_lsc_prefetch2d_stateless<RawT, L1H, L2H, DS, Transpose, NBlocks,
3183  BlockWidth, BlockHeight, false, N>(
3184  Mask.data(), Addr, SurfaceWidth, SurfaceHeight, SurfacePitch, X, Y);
3185 }
3186 
3211 template <typename T, int BlockWidth, int BlockHeight, typename PropertyListT,
3212  int N = detail::get_lsc_block_2d_data_size<
3213  __raw_t<T>, 1u, BlockHeight, BlockWidth, false /*Transposed*/,
3214  false /*Transformed*/>()>
3215 __ESIMD_API void store_2d_impl(T *Ptr, unsigned SurfaceWidth,
3216  unsigned SurfaceHeight, unsigned SurfacePitch,
3217  int X, int Y, simd<T, N> Vals) {
3218  using RawT = __raw_t<T>;
3219  __ESIMD_DNS::check_cache_hints<__ESIMD_DNS::cache_action::store,
3220  PropertyListT>();
3221  constexpr cache_hint L1H =
3222  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(cache_hint::none);
3223  constexpr cache_hint L2H =
3224  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(cache_hint::none);
3225  check_lsc_block_2d_restrictions<RawT, BlockWidth, BlockHeight, 1, false,
3226  false, block_2d_op::store>();
3227  constexpr lsc_data_size DS =
3228  finalize_data_size<RawT, lsc_data_size::default_size>();
3229  uintptr_t Addr = reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(Ptr);
3230  constexpr lsc_data_order Transpose = lsc_data_order::nontranspose;
3231 
3232  constexpr int Pitch = getNextPowerOf2<BlockWidth>();
3233  constexpr int NElts = BlockHeight * Pitch;
3234  simd<RawT, NElts> Raw;
3235  simd_mask<NElts> Mask = 1;
3236 
3237  if constexpr (NElts == N) {
3238  Raw = Vals;
3239  } else {
3240  // For store with padding, allocate the block with padding, and place
3241  // original data there.
3242  auto Data2D = Vals.template bit_cast_view<RawT, BlockHeight, BlockWidth>();
3243  auto Raw2D = Raw.template bit_cast_view<RawT, BlockHeight, Pitch>();
3244  Raw2D.template select<BlockHeight, 1, BlockWidth, 1>(0, 0) = Data2D;
3245  }
3246 
3247  __esimd_lsc_store2d_stateless<RawT, L1H, L2H, DS, Transpose, 1u, BlockWidth,
3248  BlockHeight, false, NElts>(
3249  Mask.data(), Addr, SurfaceWidth, SurfaceHeight, SurfacePitch, X, Y,
3250  Raw.data());
3251 }
3252 
3253 } // namespace detail
3254 
3256 
3259 
3281 // Dev note: the argument \p glob_offset of this function does not have
3282 // a default value to not conflict with more generic variant (acc-ga-3)
3283 // defined below. This restriction though requires adding an additional
3284 // variant: simd<T, N> gather(acc, glob_offset) to support calls that require
3285 // implicit conversion of a scalar offset to a vector of offsets, e.g.
3286 // 'res = gather<T, N>(acc, 0);'
3287 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorT>
3288 __ESIMD_API
3289  std::enable_if_t<detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<
3290  AccessorT, detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read>,
3291  simd<T, N>>
3292  gather(AccessorT acc, simd<detail::DeviceAccessorOffsetT, N> byte_offsets,
3293  detail::DeviceAccessorOffsetT glob_offset, simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
3294 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
3295  return gather<T, N>(__ESIMD_DNS::accessorToPointer<T>(acc, glob_offset),
3296  byte_offsets, mask);
3297 #else
3298  if constexpr (!detail::isPowerOf2(N, 32)) {
3299  // Requires DG2 or PVC.
3300  simd<T, N> PassThru; // Intentionally undefined
3301  byte_offsets += glob_offset;
3302  return detail::gather_impl<T, N, 1,
3303  oneapi::experimental::empty_properties_t,
3304  detail::lsc_data_size::default_size>(
3305  acc, byte_offsets, mask, PassThru);
3306  } else {
3307  return detail::gather_impl<T, N>(acc, byte_offsets, glob_offset, mask);
3308  }
3309 #endif // __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
3310 }
3311 
3325 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorT>
3326 __ESIMD_API
3327  std::enable_if_t<detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<
3328  AccessorT, detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read>,
3329  simd<T, N>>
3330  gather(AccessorT acc, detail::DeviceAccessorOffsetT glob_offset) {
3331  simd<detail::DeviceAccessorOffsetT, N> ByteOffsets = 0;
3332  return gather<T, N>(acc, ByteOffsets, glob_offset);
3333 }
3334 
3335 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
3336 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorTy, typename Toffset>
3337 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
3338  detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorTy,
3339  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
3340  std::is_integral_v<Toffset> && !std::is_same_v<Toffset, uint64_t>,
3341  simd<T, N>>
3342 gather(AccessorTy acc, simd<Toffset, N> offsets, uint64_t glob_offset,
3343  simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
3344  return gather<T, N>(acc, convert<uint64_t>(offsets), glob_offset, mask);
3345 }
3346 #endif
3347 
3377 // typename PropertyListT = empty_properties_t>
3386 
3420 template <typename T, int N, int VS, typename AccessorT, typename OffsetT,
3421  typename PropertyListT =
3422  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
3423 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
3424  (detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
3425  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
3426  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>),
3427  simd<T, N>>
3428 gather(AccessorT acc, simd<OffsetT, N / VS> byte_offsets,
3429  simd_mask<N / VS> mask, simd<T, N> pass_thru, PropertyListT props = {}) {
3430 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
3431  return gather<T, N, VS>(detail::accessorToPointer<T>(acc), byte_offsets, mask,
3432  pass_thru, props);
3433 #else
3434  return detail::gather_impl<T, N, VS, PropertyListT,
3435  detail::lsc_data_size::default_size>(
3436  acc, byte_offsets, mask, pass_thru);
3437 #endif // __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
3438 }
3439 
3469 template <typename T, int N, int VS, typename AccessorT, typename OffsetT,
3470  typename PropertyListT =
3471  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
3472 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
3473  (detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
3474  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
3475  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>),
3476  simd<T, N>>
3477 gather(AccessorT acc, simd<OffsetT, N / VS> byte_offsets,
3478  simd_mask<N / VS> mask, PropertyListT props = {}) {
3479 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
3480  return gather<T, N, VS>(detail::accessorToPointer<T>(acc), byte_offsets, mask,
3481  props);
3482 #else
3483  constexpr size_t Alignment =
3484  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, alignment_key>(sizeof(T));
3485  static_assert(Alignment >= sizeof(T),
3486  "gather() requires at least element-size alignment");
3487 
3488  if constexpr (detail::has_cache_hints<PropertyListT>() || VS > 1 ||
3489  !(detail::isPowerOf2(N, 32))) {
3490  simd<T, N> PassThru; // Intentionally undefined
3491  return detail::gather_impl<T, N, VS, PropertyListT,
3492  detail::lsc_data_size::default_size>(
3493  acc, byte_offsets, mask, PassThru);
3494  } else {
3495  return detail::gather_impl<T, N>(acc, byte_offsets, 0, mask);
3496  }
3497 #endif // __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
3498 }
3499 
3523 template <typename T, int N, int VS, typename AccessorT, typename OffsetT,
3524  typename PropertyListT =
3525  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
3526 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
3527  (detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
3528  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
3529  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>),
3530  simd<T, N>>
3531 gather(AccessorT acc, simd<OffsetT, N / VS> byte_offsets,
3532  PropertyListT props = {}) {
3533  simd_mask<N / VS> Mask = 1;
3534  return gather<T, N, VS>(acc, byte_offsets, Mask, props);
3535 }
3536 
3546 // Dev note: the mask type was turned into template parameter `MaskT` to
3547 // avoid the conflicts of this prototype with the old gather() function
3548 // accepting a 'global_offset' parameter and avoid 'ambiguous call' errors
3549 // for calls like this: gather(acc, byte_offsets_simd, 0, mask);
3550 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorT, typename OffsetT,
3551  typename MaskT,
3552  typename PropertyListT =
3553  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
3554 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
3555  (detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
3556  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
3557  std::is_same_v<MaskT, simd_mask<N>> &&
3558  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>),
3559  simd<T, N>>
3560 gather(AccessorT acc, simd<OffsetT, N> byte_offsets, MaskT mask,
3561  simd<T, N> pass_thru, PropertyListT props = {}) {
3562  return gather<T, N, 1>(acc, byte_offsets, mask, pass_thru, props);
3563 }
3564 
3572 // Dev note: the mask type was turned into template parameter `MaskT` to
3573 // avoid the conflicts of this prototype with the old gather() function
3574 // accepting a 'global_offset' parameter and avoid 'ambiguous call' errors
3575 // for calls like this: gather(acc, byte_offsets_simd, 0);
3576 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorT, typename OffsetT,
3577  typename MaskT,
3578  typename PropertyListT =
3579  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
3580 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
3581  (detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
3582  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
3583  std::is_same_v<MaskT, simd_mask<N>> &&
3584  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>),
3585  simd<T, N>>
3586 gather(AccessorT acc, simd<OffsetT, N> byte_offsets, MaskT mask,
3587  PropertyListT props = {}) {
3588  return gather<T, N, 1>(acc, byte_offsets, mask, props);
3589 }
3590 
3598 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorT, typename OffsetT,
3599  typename PropertyListT =
3600  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
3601 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
3602  (detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
3603  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
3604  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>),
3605  simd<T, N>>
3606 gather(AccessorT acc, simd<OffsetT, N> byte_offsets, PropertyListT props = {}) {
3607  return gather<T, N, 1>(acc, byte_offsets, props);
3608 }

3612 // typename PropertyListT = empty_properties_t>
3618 template <typename T, int N, int VS = 1, typename AccessorT,
3619  typename OffsetSimdViewT,
3620  typename PropertyListT =
3621  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
3622 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
3623  (detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
3624  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
3625  detail::is_simd_view_type_v<OffsetSimdViewT> &&
3626  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>),
3627  simd<T, N>>
3628 gather(AccessorT acc, OffsetSimdViewT byte_offsets, simd_mask<N / VS> mask,
3629  simd<T, N> pass_thru, PropertyListT props = {}) {
3630  return gather<T, N, VS>(acc, byte_offsets.read(), mask, pass_thru, props);
3631 }

3642  typename OffsetSimdViewT,
3643  typename PropertyListT =
3644  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
3645 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
3646  (detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
3647  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
3648  detail::is_simd_view_type_v<OffsetSimdViewT> &&
3649  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>),
3650  simd<T, N>>
3651 gather(AccessorT acc, OffsetSimdViewT byte_offsets, simd_mask<N / VS> mask,
3652  PropertyListT props = {}) {
3653  return gather<T, N, VS>(acc, byte_offsets.read(), mask, props);

3664  typename OffsetSimdViewT,
3665  typename PropertyListT =
3666  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
3667 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
3668  (detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
3669  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
3670  detail::is_simd_view_type_v<OffsetSimdViewT> &&
3671  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>),
3672  simd<T, N>>
3673 gather(AccessorT acc, OffsetSimdViewT byte_offsets, PropertyListT props = {}) {
3674  return gather<T, N, VS>(acc, byte_offsets.read(), props);
3675 }

3693 
3728 template <typename T, int N, int VS = 1, typename AccessorTy, typename OffsetT,
3729  typename PropertyListT =
3730  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
3731 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
3732  detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorTy,
3733  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_write> &&
3734  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
3735 scatter(AccessorTy acc, simd<OffsetT, N / VS> byte_offsets, simd<T, N> vals,
3736  simd_mask<N / VS> mask, PropertyListT props = {}) {
3737 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
3738  scatter<T, N, VS>(__ESIMD_DNS::accessorToPointer<T>(acc), byte_offsets, vals,
3739  mask, props);
3740 #else
3741  constexpr size_t Alignment =
3742  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, alignment_key>(sizeof(T));
3743  static_assert(Alignment >= sizeof(T),
3744  "gather() requires at least element-size alignment");
3745 
3746  if constexpr (detail::has_cache_hints<PropertyListT>() || VS > 1 ||
3747  !detail::isPowerOf2(N, 32)) {
3748  detail::scatter_impl<T, VS, detail::lsc_data_size::default_size,
3749  PropertyListT>(acc, byte_offsets, vals, mask);
3750  } else {
3751  detail::scatter_impl<T, N, AccessorTy>(acc, vals, byte_offsets, 0, mask);
3752  }
3753 
3754 #endif // __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
3755 }
3775 template <typename T, int N, int VS = 1, typename AccessorTy, typename OffsetT,
3776  typename PropertyListT =
3777  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
3778 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
3779  detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorTy,
3780  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_write> &&
3781  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
3782 scatter(AccessorTy acc, simd<OffsetT, N / VS> byte_offsets, simd<T, N> vals,
3783  PropertyListT props = {}) {
3784  simd_mask<N / VS> Mask = 1;
3785  scatter<T, N, VS>(acc, byte_offsets, vals, Mask, props);
3786 }
3787 
3813 template <typename T, int N, int VS = 1, typename AccessorTy,
3814  typename OffsetSimdViewT,
3815  typename PropertyListT =
3816  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
3817 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
3818  detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorTy,
3819  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_write> &&
3820  detail::is_simd_view_type_v<OffsetSimdViewT> &&
3821  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
3822 scatter(AccessorTy acc, OffsetSimdViewT byte_offsets, simd<T, N> vals,
3823  simd_mask<N / VS> mask, PropertyListT props = {}) {
3824  scatter<T, N, VS>(acc, byte_offsets.read(), vals, mask, props);
3825 }
3826 
3847 template <typename T, int N, int VS = 1, typename AccessorTy,
3848  typename OffsetSimdViewT,
3849  typename PropertyListT =
3850  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
3851 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
3852  detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorTy,
3853  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_write> &&
3854  detail::is_simd_view_type_v<OffsetSimdViewT> &&
3855  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
3856 scatter(AccessorTy acc, OffsetSimdViewT byte_offsets, simd<T, N> vals,
3857  PropertyListT props = {}) {
3858  simd_mask<N / VS> Mask = 1;
3859  scatter<T, N, VS>(acc, byte_offsets.read(), vals, Mask, props);
3860 }

3878 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorTy>
3879 __ESIMD_API
3880  std::enable_if_t<(detail::isPowerOf2(N, 32)) &&
3881  detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<
3882  AccessorTy, detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_write>>
3883  scatter(AccessorTy acc, simd<detail::DeviceAccessorOffsetT, N> offsets,
3884  simd<T, N> vals, detail::DeviceAccessorOffsetT glob_offset,
3885  simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
3886  offsets += glob_offset;
3887  scatter<T, N>(acc, offsets, vals, mask);
3888 }
3889 
3890 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorTy>
3891 __ESIMD_API
3892  std::enable_if_t<(detail::isPowerOf2(N, 32)) &&
3893  detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<
3894  AccessorTy, detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_write>>
3895  scatter(AccessorTy acc, detail::DeviceAccessorOffsetT glob_offset,
3896  simd<T, N> vals, simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
3897  simd<detail::DeviceAccessorOffsetT, N> ByteOffsets = 0;
3898  scatter<T, N>(acc, ByteOffsets, vals, glob_offset, mask);
3899 }
3900 
3901 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
3902 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorTy, typename Toffset>
3903 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
3904  detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorTy,
3905  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_write> &&
3906  std::is_integral_v<Toffset> && !std::is_same_v<Toffset, uint64_t>>
3907 scatter(AccessorTy acc, simd<Toffset, N> offsets, simd<T, N> vals,
3908  uint64_t glob_offset, simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
3909  scatter<T, N, AccessorTy>(acc, convert<uint64_t>(offsets), vals, glob_offset,
3910  mask);
3911 }
3912 #endif
3913 
3921 template <typename T, typename AccessorTy>
3922 __ESIMD_API T scalar_load(AccessorTy acc,
3923  detail::DeviceAccessorOffsetT offset) {
3924  const simd<T, 1> Res =
3925  gather<T, 1, AccessorTy>(acc, simd<decltype(offset), 1>(offset));
3926  return Res[0];
3927 }
3928 
3936 template <typename T, typename AccessorTy>
3937 __ESIMD_API void scalar_store(AccessorTy acc,
3938  detail::DeviceAccessorOffsetT offset, T val) {
3939  scatter<T, 1, AccessorTy>(acc, simd<decltype(offset), 1>(offset),
3940  simd<T, 1>(val));
3941 }
3942 
3976 template <rgba_channel_mask RGBAMask = rgba_channel_mask::ABGR, typename T,
3977  int N, typename Toffset>
3978 __ESIMD_API simd<T, N * get_num_channels_enabled(RGBAMask)>
3979 gather_rgba(const T *p, simd<Toffset, N> offsets, simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
3980  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<Toffset>, "Unsupported offset type");
3981  static_assert((N == 8 || N == 16 || N == 32), "Unsupported value of N");
3982  static_assert(sizeof(T) == 4, "Unsupported size of type T");
3983  simd<uint64_t, N> offsets_i = convert<uint64_t>(offsets);
3984  simd<uint64_t, N> addrs(reinterpret_cast<uint64_t>(p));
3985  addrs = addrs + offsets_i;
3986  return __esimd_svm_gather4_scaled<detail::__raw_t<T>, N, RGBAMask>(
3987  addrs.data(), mask.data());
3988 }
3989 
4005 template <rgba_channel_mask RGBAMask = rgba_channel_mask::ABGR, typename T,
4006  int N, typename OffsetObjT, typename RegionTy>
4007 __ESIMD_API simd<T, N * get_num_channels_enabled(RGBAMask)>
4008 gather_rgba(const T *p, simd_view<OffsetObjT, RegionTy> offsets,
4009  simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
4010  return gather_rgba<RGBAMask, T, N>(p, offsets.read(), mask);
4011 }
4012 
4028 template <rgba_channel_mask RGBAMask = rgba_channel_mask::ABGR, typename T,
4029  int N, typename Toffset>
4030 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<std::is_integral_v<Toffset>,
4031  simd<T, N * get_num_channels_enabled(RGBAMask)>>
4032 gather_rgba(const T *p, Toffset offset, simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
4033  return gather_rgba<RGBAMask, T, N>(p, simd<Toffset, N>(offset), mask);
4034 }
4035 
4036 namespace detail {
4037 template <rgba_channel_mask M> static void validate_rgba_write_channel_mask() {
4038  using CM = rgba_channel_mask;
4039  static_assert(
4040  (M == CM::ABGR || M == CM::BGR || M == CM::GR || M == CM::R) &&
4041  "Only ABGR, BGR, GR, R channel masks are valid in write operations");
4042 }
4043 } // namespace detail
4044 
4066 template <rgba_channel_mask RGBAMask = rgba_channel_mask::ABGR, typename T,
4067  int N, typename Toffset>
4068 __ESIMD_API void
4069 scatter_rgba(T *p, simd<Toffset, N> offsets,
4070  simd<T, N * get_num_channels_enabled(RGBAMask)> vals,
4071  simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
4072  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<Toffset>, "Unsupported offset type");
4073  static_assert((N == 8 || N == 16 || N == 32), "Unsupported value of N");
4074  static_assert(sizeof(T) == 4, "Unsupported size of type T");
4075  detail::validate_rgba_write_channel_mask<RGBAMask>();
4076  simd<uint64_t, N> offsets_i = convert<uint64_t>(offsets);
4077  simd<uint64_t, N> addrs(reinterpret_cast<uint64_t>(p));
4078  addrs = addrs + offsets_i;
4079  __esimd_svm_scatter4_scaled<detail::__raw_t<T>, N, RGBAMask>(
4080  addrs.data(), vals.data(), mask.data());
4081 }
4082 
4098 template <rgba_channel_mask RGBAMask = rgba_channel_mask::ABGR, typename T,
4099  int N, typename OffsetObjT, typename RegionTy>
4100 __ESIMD_API void
4101 scatter_rgba(T *p, simd_view<OffsetObjT, RegionTy> offsets,
4102  simd<T, N * get_num_channels_enabled(RGBAMask)> vals,
4103  simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
4104  scatter_rgba<RGBAMask, T, N>(p, offsets.read(), vals, mask);
4105 }
4106 
4122 template <rgba_channel_mask RGBAMask = rgba_channel_mask::ABGR, typename T,
4123  int N, typename Toffset>
4124 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<std::is_integral_v<Toffset> && N == 1>
4125 scatter_rgba(T *p, Toffset offset,
4126  simd<T, N * get_num_channels_enabled(RGBAMask)> vals,
4127  simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
4128  scatter_rgba<RGBAMask, T, N>(p, simd<Toffset, N>(offset), vals, mask);
4129 }
4130 
4131 template <typename T, int N, rgba_channel_mask RGBAMask>
4132 __SYCL_DEPRECATED("use scatter_rgba<rgba_channel_mask>()")
4133 __ESIMD_API std::
4134  enable_if_t<(N == 8 || N == 16 || N == 32) && sizeof(T) == 4> scatter_rgba(
4135  T *p, simd<uint32_t, N> offsets,
4136  simd<T, N * get_num_channels_enabled(RGBAMask)> vals,
4137  simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
4138  scatter_rgba<RGBAMask>(p, offsets, vals, mask);
4139 }
4140 
4163 template <rgba_channel_mask RGBAMask = rgba_channel_mask::ABGR,
4164  typename AccessorT, int N,
4165  typename T = typename AccessorT::value_type>
4166 __ESIMD_API
4167  std::enable_if_t<((N == 8 || N == 16 || N == 32) && sizeof(T) == 4 &&
4168  detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<
4169  AccessorT, detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read>),
4170  simd<T, N * get_num_channels_enabled(RGBAMask)>>
4171  gather_rgba(AccessorT acc, simd<detail::DeviceAccessorOffsetT, N> offsets,
4172  detail::DeviceAccessorOffsetT global_offset = 0,
4173  simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
4174 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
4175  return gather_rgba<RGBAMask>(
4176  __ESIMD_DNS::accessorToPointer<T>(acc, global_offset), offsets, mask);
4177 #else
4178  // TODO (performance) use hardware-supported scale once BE supports it
4179  constexpr uint32_t Scale = 0;
4180  const auto SI = get_surface_index(acc);
4181  return __esimd_gather4_masked_scaled2<detail::__raw_t<T>, N, RGBAMask,
4182  decltype(SI), Scale>(
4183  SI, global_offset, offsets.data(), mask.data());
4184 #endif
4185 }
4186 
4187 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
4188 template <rgba_channel_mask RGBAMask = rgba_channel_mask::ABGR,
4189  typename AccessorT, int N,
4190  typename T = typename AccessorT::value_type, typename Toffset>
4191 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
4192  ((N == 8 || N == 16 || N == 32) && sizeof(T) == 4 &&
4193  detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
4194  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
4195  std::is_integral_v<Toffset> && !std::is_same_v<Toffset, uint64_t>),
4196  simd<T, N * get_num_channels_enabled(RGBAMask)>>
4197 gather_rgba(AccessorT acc, simd<Toffset, N> offsets, uint64_t global_offset = 0,
4198  simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
4199  return gather_rgba<RGBAMask, AccessorT, N, T>(acc, convert<uint64_t>(offsets),
4200  global_offset, mask);
4201 }
4202 #endif
4203 
4218 template <rgba_channel_mask RGBAMask = rgba_channel_mask::ABGR,
4219  typename AccessorT, int N,
4220  typename T = typename AccessorT::value_type>
4221 __ESIMD_API
4222  std::enable_if_t<(N == 8 || N == 16 || N == 32) && sizeof(T) == 4 &&
4223  detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<
4224  AccessorT, detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_write>>
4225  scatter_rgba(AccessorT acc, simd<detail::DeviceAccessorOffsetT, N> offsets,
4226  simd<T, N * get_num_channels_enabled(RGBAMask)> vals,
4227  detail::DeviceAccessorOffsetT global_offset = 0,
4228  simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
4229  detail::validate_rgba_write_channel_mask<RGBAMask>();
4230 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
4231  scatter_rgba<RGBAMask>(__ESIMD_DNS::accessorToPointer<T>(acc, global_offset),
4232  offsets, vals, mask);
4233 #else
4234  // TODO (performance) use hardware-supported scale once BE supports it
4235  constexpr uint32_t Scale = 0;
4236  const auto SI = get_surface_index(acc);
4237  __esimd_scatter4_scaled<T, N, decltype(SI), RGBAMask, Scale>(
4238  mask.data(), SI, global_offset, offsets.data(), vals.data());
4239 #endif
4240 }
4241 
4242 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
4243 template <rgba_channel_mask RGBAMask = rgba_channel_mask::ABGR,
4244  typename AccessorT, int N,
4245  typename T = typename AccessorT::value_type, typename Toffset>
4246 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
4247  (N == 8 || N == 16 || N == 32) && sizeof(T) == 4 &&
4248  detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
4249  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_write> &&
4250  std::is_integral_v<Toffset> && !std::is_same_v<Toffset, uint64_t>>
4251 scatter_rgba(AccessorT acc, simd<Toffset, N> offsets,
4252  simd<T, N * get_num_channels_enabled(RGBAMask)> vals,
4253  uint64_t global_offset = 0, simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
4254  scatter_rgba<RGBAMask, AccessorT, N, T>(acc, convert<uint64_t>(offsets), vals,
4255  global_offset, mask);
4256 }
4257 #endif
4259 
4260 namespace detail {
4261 
4262 #ifndef __ESIMD_FP_ATOMIC_OP_TYPE_CHECK
4263 #define __ESIMD_FP_ATOMIC_OP_TYPE_CHECK(T) \
4264  static_assert(is_type<T, float, sycl::half, double>(), \
4265  "float, double or sycl::half type is expected");
4266 #endif // __ESIMD_FP_ATOMIC_OP_TYPE_CHECK
4267 
4270 template <__ESIMD_NS::atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, unsigned NumSrc,
4271  bool IsLSC = false>
4272 constexpr void check_atomic() {
4273 
4274  static_assert(sizeof(T) > 1, "Unsupported data type");
4275 
4276  // LSC atomic operation is supported for any width.
4277  if constexpr (!IsLSC)
4278  static_assert((detail::isPowerOf2(N, 32)),
4279  "Execution size 1, 2, 4, 8, 16, 32 are supported");
4280 
4281  static_assert(NumSrc == __ESIMD_DNS::get_num_args<Op>(),
4282  "Wrong number of operands");
4283  constexpr bool IsInt2BytePlus =
4284  std::is_integral_v<T> && (sizeof(T) >= sizeof(uint16_t));
4285 
4286  if constexpr (Op == __ESIMD_NS::atomic_op::xchg ||
4287  Op == __ESIMD_NS::atomic_op::cmpxchg ||
4288  Op == __ESIMD_NS::atomic_op::predec ||
4289  Op == __ESIMD_NS::atomic_op::inc ||
4290  Op == __ESIMD_NS::atomic_op::dec) {
4291 
4292  static_assert(IsInt2BytePlus, "Integral 16-bit or wider type is expected");
4293  }
4294  // FP ops (are always delegated to native::lsc::<Op>)
4295  if constexpr (Op == __ESIMD_NS::atomic_op::fmax ||
4296  Op == __ESIMD_NS::atomic_op::fmin ||
4297  Op == __ESIMD_NS::atomic_op::fadd ||
4298  Op == __ESIMD_NS::atomic_op::fsub ||
4299  Op == __ESIMD_NS::atomic_op::fcmpxchg) {
4300  __ESIMD_FP_ATOMIC_OP_TYPE_CHECK(T);
4301  }
4302  if constexpr (Op == __ESIMD_NS::atomic_op::add ||
4303  Op == __ESIMD_NS::atomic_op::sub ||
4304  Op == __ESIMD_NS::atomic_op::umin ||
4305  Op == __ESIMD_NS::atomic_op::umax ||
4306  Op == __ESIMD_NS::atomic_op::bit_and ||
4307  Op == __ESIMD_NS::atomic_op::bit_or ||
4308  Op == __ESIMD_NS::atomic_op::bit_xor ||
4309  Op == __ESIMD_NS::atomic_op::smin ||
4310  Op == __ESIMD_NS::atomic_op::smax) {
4311  static_assert(IsInt2BytePlus, "Integral 16-bit or wider type is expected");
4312  constexpr bool IsSignedMinmax = (Op == __ESIMD_NS::atomic_op::smin) ||
4313  (Op == __ESIMD_NS::atomic_op::smax);
4314  constexpr bool IsUnsignedMinmax = (Op == __ESIMD_NS::atomic_op::umin) ||
4315  (Op == __ESIMD_NS::atomic_op::umax);
4316 
4317  if constexpr (IsSignedMinmax || IsUnsignedMinmax) {
4318  constexpr bool SignOK = std::is_signed_v<T> == IsSignedMinmax;
4319  static_assert(SignOK, "Signed/unsigned integer type expected for "
4320  "signed/unsigned min/max operation");
4321  }
4322  }
4323 }
4324 #undef __ESIMD_FP_ATOMIC_OP_TYPE_CHECK
4325 } // namespace detail
4326 
4329 
4342 template <uint32_t SLMSize> __ESIMD_API void slm_init() {
4343  __esimd_slm_init(SLMSize);
4344 }
4345 
4351 // with esimd::slm_allocator() class.
4354 __ESIMD_API void slm_init(uint32_t size) { __esimd_slm_init(size); }
4355 
4392 
4398 #ifndef __ESIMD_GATHER_SCATTER_LLVM_IR
4401 #endif // __ESIMD_GATHER_SCATTER_LLVM_IR
4422 template <typename T, int N, int VS,
4423  typename PropertyListT =
4424  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
4425 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
4426  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>, simd<T, N>>
4427 slm_gather(simd<uint32_t, N / VS> byte_offsets, simd_mask<N / VS> mask,
4428  simd<T, N> pass_thru, PropertyListT props = {}) {
4429  static_assert(N / VS >= 1 && N % VS == 0, "N must be divisible by VS");
4430 
4431  constexpr size_t Alignment =
4432  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, alignment_key>(sizeof(T));
4433  static_assert(Alignment >= sizeof(T),
4434  "slm_gather() requires at least element-size alignment");
4435 
4436  // Use LSC lowering if VS > 1. Also, if masked gather is
4437  // not available, then LSC is the only lowering option.
4438  if constexpr (VS > 1 || !detail::isMaskedGatherScatterLLVMAvailable()) {
4439  return __ESIMD_DNS::slm_gather_impl<T, VS,
4440  detail::lsc_data_size::default_size>(
4441  byte_offsets, mask, pass_thru);
4442  } else {
4443  if constexpr (sizeof(T) == 8) {
4444  simd<T, N> Res;
4445  Res.template bit_cast_view<uint32_t>().template select<N, 2>(0) =
4446  __esimd_slm_gather_ld<uint32_t, N, Alignment>(
4447  byte_offsets.data(), mask.data(),
4448  (pass_thru.template bit_cast_view<uint32_t>()
4449  .template select<N, 2>(0))
4450  .data());
4451  simd<uint32_t, N / VS> Offset = byte_offsets + sizeof(uint32_t);
4452  Res.template bit_cast_view<uint32_t>().template select<N, 2>(1) =
4453  __esimd_slm_gather_ld<uint32_t, N, sizeof(uint32_t)>(
4454  Offset.data(), mask.data(),
4455  (pass_thru.template bit_cast_view<uint32_t>()
4456  .template select<N, 2>(1))
4457  .data());
4458  return Res;
4459  } else {
4460  using MsgT = detail::__raw_t<T>;
4461  return __esimd_slm_gather_ld<MsgT, N, Alignment>(
4462  byte_offsets.data(), mask.data(), pass_thru.data());
4463  }
4464  }
4465 }
4466 
4490 template <typename T, int N, int VS,
4491  typename PropertyListT =
4492  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
4493 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
4494  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>, simd<T, N>>
4495 slm_gather(simd<uint32_t, N / VS> byte_offsets, simd_mask<N / VS> mask,
4496  PropertyListT props = {}) {
4497  constexpr size_t Alignment =
4498  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, alignment_key>(sizeof(T));
4499  static_assert(Alignment >= sizeof(T),
4500  "slm_gather() requires at least element-size alignment");
4501 
4502  if constexpr (VS > 1 || (!detail::isPowerOf2(N, 32) &&
4503  !detail::isMaskedGatherScatterLLVMAvailable())) {
4504  simd<T, N> PassThru; // Intentionally undefined
4505  return detail::slm_gather_impl<T, VS, detail::lsc_data_size::default_size>(
4506  byte_offsets, mask, PassThru);
4507  } else if constexpr (detail::isMaskedGatherScatterLLVMAvailable()) {
4508  if constexpr (sizeof(T) == 8) {
4509  simd<T, N> Res;
4510  simd<uint32_t, N> PassThru; // it is intentionally undefined
4511 
4512  Res.template bit_cast_view<uint32_t>().template select<N, 2>(0) =
4513  __esimd_slm_gather_ld<uint32_t, N, Alignment>(
4514  byte_offsets.data(), mask.data(), PassThru.data());
4515  simd<uint32_t, N / VS> Offset = byte_offsets + sizeof(uint32_t);
4516  Res.template bit_cast_view<uint32_t>().template select<N, 2>(1) =
4517  __esimd_slm_gather_ld<uint32_t, N, sizeof(uint32_t)>(
4518  Offset.data(), mask.data(), PassThru.data());
4519  return Res;
4520  } else {
4521  using MsgT = detail::__raw_t<T>;
4522  simd<MsgT, N> PassThru; // it is intentionally undefined
4523  return __esimd_slm_gather_ld<MsgT, N, Alignment>(
4524  byte_offsets.data(), mask.data(), PassThru.data());
4525  }
4526  } else {
4527  detail::LocalAccessorMarker acc;
4528  return detail::gather_impl<T, N>(acc, byte_offsets, 0, mask);
4529  }
4530 }
4531 
4549 template <typename T, int N, int VS,
4550  typename PropertyListT =
4551  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
4552 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
4553  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>, simd<T, N>>
4554 slm_gather(simd<uint32_t, N / VS> byte_offsets, PropertyListT props = {}) {
4555  simd_mask<N / VS> Mask = 1;
4556  return slm_gather<T, N, VS>(byte_offsets, Mask, props);
4557 }
4558 
4581 template <typename T, int N,
4582  typename PropertyListT =
4583  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
4584 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
4585  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>, simd<T, N>>
4586 slm_gather(simd<uint32_t, N> byte_offsets, simd_mask<N> mask,
4587  simd<T, N> pass_thru, PropertyListT props = {}) {
4588  constexpr int VS = 1;
4589  return slm_gather<T, N, VS>(byte_offsets, mask, pass_thru, props);
4590 }
4591 
4611 template <typename T, int N,
4612  typename PropertyListT =
4613  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
4614 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
4615  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>, simd<T, N>>
4616 slm_gather(simd<uint32_t, N> byte_offsets, simd_mask<N> mask,
4617  PropertyListT props = {}) {
4618  constexpr int VS = 1;
4619  return slm_gather<T, N, VS>(byte_offsets, mask, props);
4620 }

4636 template <typename T, int N,
4637  typename PropertyListT =
4638  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
4639 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
4640  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>, simd<T, N>>
4641 slm_gather(simd<uint32_t, N> byte_offsets, PropertyListT props = {}) {
4642  constexpr int VS = 1;
4643  return slm_gather<T, N, VS>(byte_offsets, props);
4644 }

4672 template <typename T, int N, int VS = 1, typename OffsetSimdViewT,
4673  typename PropertyListT =
4674  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
4675 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
4676  detail::is_simd_view_type_v<OffsetSimdViewT> &&
4677  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
4678  simd<T, N>>
4679 slm_gather(OffsetSimdViewT byte_offsets, simd_mask<N / VS> mask,
4680  simd<T, N> pass_thru, PropertyListT props = {}) {
4681  return slm_gather<T, N, VS>(byte_offsets.read(), mask, pass_thru, props);
4682 }
4683 
4705 template <typename T, int N, int VS = 1, typename OffsetSimdViewT,
4706  typename PropertyListT =
4707  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
4708 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
4709  detail::is_simd_view_type_v<OffsetSimdViewT> &&
4710  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
4711  simd<T, N>>
4712 slm_gather(OffsetSimdViewT byte_offsets, simd_mask<N / VS> mask,
4713  PropertyListT props = {}) {
4714  return slm_gather<T, N, VS>(byte_offsets.read(), mask, props);
4715 }

4733 template <typename T, int N, int VS = 1, typename OffsetSimdViewT,
4734  typename PropertyListT =
4735  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
4736 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
4737  detail::is_simd_view_type_v<OffsetSimdViewT> &&
4738  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
4739  simd<T, N>>
4740 slm_gather(OffsetSimdViewT byte_offsets, PropertyListT props = {}) {
4741  return slm_gather<T, N, VS>(byte_offsets.read(), props);
4742 }

4749 template <typename T> __ESIMD_API T slm_scalar_load(uint32_t offset) {
4750  const simd<T, 1> Res = slm_gather<T, 1>(simd<uint32_t, 1>(offset));
4751  return Res[0];
4752 }
4753 
4771 
4794 template <typename T, int N, int VS = 1,
4795  typename PropertyListT =
4796  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
4797 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
4798  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
4799 slm_scatter(simd<uint32_t, N / VS> byte_offsets, simd<T, N> vals,
4800  simd_mask<N / VS> mask, PropertyListT props = {}) {
4801  static_assert(N / VS >= 1 && N % VS == 0, "N must be divisible by VS");
4802 
4803  constexpr size_t Alignment =
4804  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, alignment_key>(sizeof(T));
4805  static_assert(Alignment >= sizeof(T),
4806  "slm_scatter() requires at least element-size alignment");
4807 
4808  // Use LSC lowering if VS > 1.
4809  if constexpr (VS > 1 || (!detail::isPowerOf2(N, 32) &&
4810  !detail::isMaskedGatherScatterLLVMAvailable())) {
4811  __ESIMD_DNS::slm_scatter_impl<T, VS, detail::lsc_data_size::default_size>(
4812  byte_offsets, vals, mask);
4813  } else if constexpr (detail::isMaskedGatherScatterLLVMAvailable()) {
4814  if constexpr (sizeof(T) == 8) {
4815  __esimd_slm_scatter_st<uint32_t, N, Alignment>(
4816  vals.template bit_cast_view<uint32_t>()
4817  .template select<N, 2>(0)
4818  .data(),
4819  byte_offsets.data(), mask.data());
4820  simd<uint32_t, N / VS> Offset = byte_offsets + sizeof(uint32_t);
4821  __esimd_slm_scatter_st<uint32_t, N, sizeof(uint32_t)>(
4822  vals.template bit_cast_view<uint32_t>()
4823  .template select<N, 2>(1)
4824  .data(),
4825  Offset.data(), mask.data());
4826 
4827  } else {
4828  using MsgT = detail::__raw_t<T>;
4829  __esimd_slm_scatter_st<MsgT, N, Alignment>(
4830  sycl::bit_cast<__ESIMD_DNS::vector_type_t<MsgT, N>>(vals.data()),
4831  byte_offsets.data(), mask.data());
4832  }
4833  } else {
4834  detail::LocalAccessorMarker acc;
4835  detail::scatter_impl<T, N>(acc, vals, byte_offsets, 0, mask);
4836  }
4837 }
4838 
4855 template <typename T, int N, int VS = 1,
4856  typename PropertyListT =
4857  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
4858 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
4859  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
4860 slm_scatter(simd<uint32_t, N / VS> byte_offsets, simd<T, N> vals,
4861  PropertyListT props = {}) {
4862  simd_mask<N / VS> Mask = 1;
4863  slm_scatter<T, N, VS>(byte_offsets, vals, Mask, props);
4864 }
4865 
4889 template <typename T, int N, int VS = 1, typename OffsetSimdViewT,
4890  typename PropertyListT =
4891  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
4892 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
4893  detail::is_simd_view_type_v<OffsetSimdViewT> &&
4894  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
4895 slm_scatter(OffsetSimdViewT byte_offsets, simd<T, N> vals,
4896  simd_mask<N / VS> mask, PropertyListT props = {}) {
4897  slm_scatter<T, N, VS>(byte_offsets.read(), vals, mask, props);
4898 }
4899 
4915 template <typename T, int N, int VS = 1, typename OffsetSimdViewT,
4916  typename PropertyListT =
4917  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
4918 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
4919  detail::is_simd_view_type_v<OffsetSimdViewT> &&
4920  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
4921 slm_scatter(OffsetSimdViewT byte_offsets, simd<T, N> vals,
4922  PropertyListT props = {}) {
4923  return slm_scatter<T, N, VS>(byte_offsets.read(), vals, props);
4924 }

4931 template <typename T>
4932 __ESIMD_API void slm_scalar_store(uint32_t offset, T val) {
4933  slm_scatter<T, 1>(simd<uint32_t, 1>(offset), simd<T, 1>(val), 1);
4934 }
4935 
4946 template <typename T, int N, rgba_channel_mask RGBAMask>
4947 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<(N == 8 || N == 16 || N == 32) && (sizeof(T) == 4),
4948  simd<T, N * get_num_channels_enabled(RGBAMask)>>
4949 slm_gather_rgba(simd<uint32_t, N> offsets, simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
4950  const auto SI = __ESIMD_NS::get_surface_index(detail::LocalAccessorMarker());
4951  return __esimd_gather4_masked_scaled2<T, N, RGBAMask>(
4952  SI, 0 /*global_offset*/, offsets.data(), mask.data());
4953 }
4954 
4965 template <typename T, int N, rgba_channel_mask Mask>
4966 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<(N == 8 || N == 16 || N == 32) && (sizeof(T) == 4)>
4967 slm_scatter_rgba(simd<uint32_t, N> offsets,
4968  simd<T, N * get_num_channels_enabled(Mask)> vals,
4969  simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
4970  detail::validate_rgba_write_channel_mask<Mask>();
4971  const auto si = __ESIMD_NS::get_surface_index(detail::LocalAccessorMarker());
4972  constexpr int16_t Scale = 0;
4973  constexpr int global_offset = 0;
4974  __esimd_scatter4_scaled<T, N, decltype(si), Mask, Scale>(
4975  mask.data(), si, global_offset, offsets.data(), vals.data());
4976 }
4977 
4993 template <typename T, int N,
4994  typename Flags = overaligned_tag<detail::OperandSize::OWORD>>
4995 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<is_simd_flag_type_v<Flags>, simd<T, N>>
4996 slm_block_load(uint32_t byte_offset, Flags) {
4997  constexpr size_t Align = Flags::template alignment<simd<T, N>>;
4998  return __esimd_slm_block_ld<detail::__raw_t<T>, N, Align>(byte_offset);
4999 }

5009 
5016 
5034 
5049 template <typename T, int N,
5050  typename PropertyListT =
5051  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
5052 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
5053  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>, simd<T, N>>
5054 slm_block_load(uint32_t byte_offset, PropertyListT props = {}) {
5055  constexpr size_t DefaultAlignment = detail::OperandSize::OWORD;
5056  constexpr size_t Alignment =
5057  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, alignment_key>(DefaultAlignment);
5058  return __esimd_slm_block_ld<detail::__raw_t<T>, N, Alignment>(byte_offset);
5059 }
5060 
5087 template <typename T, int N,
5088  typename PropertyListT =
5089  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
5090 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
5091  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>, simd<T, N>>
5092 slm_block_load(uint32_t byte_offset, simd_mask<1> pred,
5093  PropertyListT props = {}) {
5094  // Verify input template arguments.
5095  constexpr size_t DefaultAlignment = sizeof(T) <= 4 ? 4 : sizeof(T);
5096  constexpr size_t Alignment =
5097  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, alignment_key>(DefaultAlignment);
5098  static_assert(
5099  (Alignment >= __ESIMD_DNS::OperandSize::DWORD && sizeof(T) <= 4) ||
5100  (Alignment >= __ESIMD_DNS::OperandSize::QWORD && sizeof(T) > 4),
5101  "Incorrect alignment for the data type");
5102 
5103  constexpr int SmallIntFactor64Bit = sizeof(uint64_t) / sizeof(T);
5104  constexpr int SmallIntFactor32Bit =
5105  sizeof(uint32_t) / sizeof(T) > 1 ? sizeof(uint32_t) / sizeof(T) : 1;
5106  static_assert(N > 0 && N % SmallIntFactor32Bit == 0,
5107  "Number of elements is not supported by Transposed load");
5108 
5109  // If alignment >= 8 and (N * sizeof(T)) % 8 == 0) we can load QWORDs.
5110  // Don't do it for 4-byte vectors (unless it is greater than 256-bytes),
5111  // because it would require a bit-cast, which is supposed to be NO-OP, but
5112  // might confuse GPU BE sometimes. 1- and 2-byte vectors are casted anyways.
5113  constexpr bool Use64BitData =
5114  Alignment >= __ESIMD_DNS::OperandSize::QWORD &&
5115  (N * sizeof(T)) % sizeof(uint64_t) == 0 &&
5116  (sizeof(T) != sizeof(uint32_t) || N * sizeof(T) > 256);
5117  constexpr int SmallIntFactor =
5118  Use64BitData ? SmallIntFactor64Bit : SmallIntFactor32Bit;
5119  constexpr int FactoredN = N / SmallIntFactor;
5120  detail::check_lsc_vector_size<FactoredN>();
5121 
5122  // Prepare template arguments for the call of intrinsic.
5123  using LoadElemT = __ESIMD_DNS::__raw_t<
5124  std::conditional_t<SmallIntFactor == 1, T,
5125  std::conditional_t<Use64BitData, uint64_t, uint32_t>>>;
5126 
5127  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
5128  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
5129  constexpr detail::lsc_data_size DS =
5130  Use64BitData ? detail::lsc_data_size::u64 : detail::lsc_data_size::u32;
5131  constexpr auto VS = detail::to_lsc_vector_size<FactoredN>();
5132  constexpr auto Transposed = detail::lsc_data_order::transpose;
5133  constexpr int NLanes = 1;
5134 
5135  // Prepare non-template arguments and call the intrinsic.
5136  simd<uint32_t, NLanes> Offsets = byte_offset;
5137  simd<LoadElemT, FactoredN> Result =
5138  __esimd_lsc_load_slm<LoadElemT, cache_hint::none, cache_hint::none,
5139  AddressScale, ImmOffset, DS, VS, Transposed, NLanes>(
5140  pred.data(), Offsets.data());
5141  return Result.template bit_cast_view<T>();
5142 }
5143 
5173 template <typename T, int N,
5174  typename PropertyListT =
5175  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
5176 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
5177  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>, simd<T, N>>
5178 slm_block_load(uint32_t offset, simd_mask<1> pred, simd<T, N> pass_thru,
5179  PropertyListT props = {}) {
5180  // Verify input template arguments.
5181  constexpr size_t DefaultAlignment = sizeof(T) <= 4 ? 4 : sizeof(T);
5182  constexpr size_t Alignment =
5183  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, alignment_key>(DefaultAlignment);
5184  static_assert(
5185  (Alignment >= __ESIMD_DNS::OperandSize::DWORD && sizeof(T) <= 4) ||
5186  (Alignment >= __ESIMD_DNS::OperandSize::QWORD && sizeof(T) > 4),
5187  "Incorrect alignment for the data type");
5188 
5189  constexpr int SmallIntFactor64Bit = sizeof(uint64_t) / sizeof(T);
5190  constexpr int SmallIntFactor32Bit =
5191  sizeof(uint32_t) / sizeof(T) > 1 ? sizeof(uint32_t) / sizeof(T) : 1;
5192  static_assert(N > 0 && N % SmallIntFactor32Bit == 0,
5193  "Number of elements is not supported by Transposed load");
5194 
5195  // If alignment >= 8 and (N * sizeof(T)) % 8 == 0) we can load QWORDs.
5196  // Don't do it for 4-byte vectors (unless it is greater than 256-bytes),
5197  // because it would require a bit-cast, which is supposed to be NO-OP, but
5198  // might confuse GPU BE sometimes. 1- and 2-byte vectors are casted anyways.
5199  constexpr bool Use64BitData =
5200  Alignment >= __ESIMD_DNS::OperandSize::QWORD &&
5201  (N * sizeof(T)) % sizeof(uint64_t) == 0 &&
5202  (sizeof(T) != sizeof(uint32_t) || N * sizeof(T) > 256);
5203  constexpr int SmallIntFactor =
5204  Use64BitData ? SmallIntFactor64Bit : SmallIntFactor32Bit;
5205  constexpr int FactoredN = N / SmallIntFactor;
5206  detail::check_lsc_vector_size<FactoredN>();
5207 
5208  // Prepare template arguments for the call of intrinsic.
5209  using LoadElemT = __ESIMD_DNS::__raw_t<
5210  std::conditional_t<SmallIntFactor == 1, T,
5211  std::conditional_t<Use64BitData, uint64_t, uint32_t>>>;
5212 
5213  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
5214  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
5215  constexpr detail::lsc_data_size DS =
5216  Use64BitData ? detail::lsc_data_size::u64 : detail::lsc_data_size::u32;
5217  constexpr auto VS = detail::to_lsc_vector_size<FactoredN>();
5218  constexpr auto Transposed = detail::lsc_data_order::transpose;
5219  constexpr int NLanes = 1;
5220 
5221  // Prepare non-template arguments and call the intrinsic.
5222  simd<uint32_t, NLanes> Offsets = offset;
5223  simd<LoadElemT, FactoredN> PassThru =
5224  pass_thru.template bit_cast_view<LoadElemT>();
5225  simd<LoadElemT, FactoredN> Result =
5226  __esimd_lsc_load_merge_slm<LoadElemT, cache_hint::none, cache_hint::none,
5227  AddressScale, ImmOffset, DS, VS, Transposed,
5228  NLanes>(pred.data(), Offsets.data(),
5229  PassThru.data());
5230  return Result.template bit_cast_view<T>();
5231 }
5232 
5256 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorT,
5257  typename PropertyListT =
5258  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
5259 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
5260  detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
5261  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
5262  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
5263  simd<T, N>>
5264 block_load(AccessorT lacc, uint32_t byte_offset, PropertyListT props = {}) {
5265  byte_offset += detail::localAccessorToOffset(lacc);
5266  return slm_block_load<T, N>(byte_offset, props);
5267 }
5268

5292  typename PropertyListT =

5295  detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
5296  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
5297  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
5298  simd<T, N>>
5299 block_load(AccessorT lacc, PropertyListT props = {}) {
5300  return slm_block_load<T, N>(detail::localAccessorToOffset(lacc), props);
5301 }
5302 
5330 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorT,
5331  typename PropertyListT =
5332  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
5333 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
5334  detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
5335  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
5336  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
5337  simd<T, N>>
5338 block_load(AccessorT lacc, uint32_t byte_offset, simd_mask<1> pred,
5339  PropertyListT props = {}) {
5340  byte_offset += detail::localAccessorToOffset(lacc);
5341  return slm_block_load<T, N>(byte_offset, pred, props);
5342 }

5373  detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,

5375  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
5376  simd<T, N>>

5409  typename PropertyListT =
5410  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
5411 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
5412  detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
5413  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
5414  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
5415  simd<T, N>>
5416 block_load(AccessorT lacc, uint32_t byte_offset, simd_mask<1> pred,

5419  return slm_block_load<T, N>(byte_offset, pred, pass_thru, props);

5449  typename PropertyListT =
5450  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
5451 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
5452  detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
5453  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
5454  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
5455  simd<T, N>>

5477 template <typename T, int N, typename Flags>
5478 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<is_simd_flag_type_v<Flags>>
5479 slm_block_store(uint32_t offset, simd<T, N> vals, Flags) {
5480  constexpr size_t Align = Flags::template alignment<simd<T, N>>;
5481  __esimd_slm_block_st<detail::__raw_t<T>, N, Align>(offset, vals.data());
5482 }
5483 
5491 
5539 template <typename T, int N,
5540  typename PropertyListT =
5541  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
5542 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
5543  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
5544 slm_block_store(uint32_t byte_offset, simd<T, N> vals, simd_mask<1> pred,
5545  PropertyListT props = {}) {
5546  // Verify input template arguments.
5547  constexpr size_t DefaultAlignment = sizeof(T) <= 4 ? 4 : sizeof(T);
5548  constexpr size_t Alignment =
5549  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, alignment_key>(DefaultAlignment);
5550  static_assert(
5551  (Alignment >= __ESIMD_DNS::OperandSize::DWORD && sizeof(T) <= 4) ||
5552  (Alignment >= __ESIMD_DNS::OperandSize::QWORD && sizeof(T) > 4),
5553  "Incorrect alignment for the data type");
5554 
5555  constexpr int SmallIntFactor64Bit = sizeof(uint64_t) / sizeof(T);
5556  constexpr int SmallIntFactor32Bit =
5557  sizeof(uint32_t) / sizeof(T) > 1 ? sizeof(uint32_t) / sizeof(T) : 1;
5558 
5559  static_assert(N > 0 && N % SmallIntFactor32Bit == 0,
5560  "Number of elements is not supported by Transposed store");
5561 
5562  // If alignment >= 8 and (N * sizeof(T)) % 8 == 0) we can store QWORDs.
5563  // Don't do it for 4-byte vectors (unless it is greater than 256-bytes),
5564  // because it would require a bit-cast, which is supposed to be NO-OP, but
5565  // might confuse GPU BE sometimes. 1- and 2-byte vectors are casted anyways.
5566  constexpr bool Use64BitData =
5567  Alignment >= __ESIMD_DNS::OperandSize::QWORD &&
5568  (N * sizeof(T)) % sizeof(uint64_t) == 0 &&
5569  (sizeof(T) != sizeof(uint32_t) || N * sizeof(T) > 256);
5570  constexpr int SmallIntFactor =
5571  Use64BitData ? SmallIntFactor64Bit : SmallIntFactor32Bit;
5572  constexpr int FactoredN = N / SmallIntFactor;
5573  detail::check_lsc_vector_size<FactoredN>();
5574 
5575  // Prepare template arguments for the call of intrinsic.
5576  using StoreElemT = __ESIMD_DNS::__raw_t<
5577  std::conditional_t<SmallIntFactor == 1, T,
5578  std::conditional_t<Use64BitData, uint64_t, uint32_t>>>;
5579 
5580  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
5581  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
5582  constexpr detail::lsc_data_size DS =
5583  Use64BitData ? detail::lsc_data_size::u64 : detail::lsc_data_size::u32;
5584  constexpr auto VS = detail::to_lsc_vector_size<FactoredN>();
5585  constexpr auto Transposed = detail::lsc_data_order::transpose;
5586  constexpr int NLanes = 1;
5587 
5588  // Prepare non-template arguments and call the intrinsic.
5589  simd<uint32_t, NLanes> Offsets = byte_offset;
5590  __esimd_lsc_store_slm<StoreElemT, cache_hint::none, cache_hint::none,
5591  AddressScale, ImmOffset, DS, VS, Transposed, NLanes>(
5592  pred.data(), Offsets.data(),
5593  sycl::bit_cast<__ESIMD_DNS::vector_type_t<StoreElemT, FactoredN>>(
5594  vals.data()));
5595 }
5596 
5612 template <typename T, int N,
5613  typename PropertyListT =
5614  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
5615 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
5616  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
5617 slm_block_store(uint32_t byte_offset, simd<T, N> vals,
5618  PropertyListT props = {}) {
5619  constexpr size_t DefaultAlignment = detail::OperandSize::OWORD;
5620  constexpr size_t Alignment =
5621  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, alignment_key>(DefaultAlignment);
5622  using StoreElemT = detail::__raw_t<T>;
5623  __esimd_slm_block_st<StoreElemT, N, Alignment>(
5624  byte_offset,
5625  sycl::bit_cast<__ESIMD_DNS::vector_type_t<StoreElemT, N>>(vals.data()));
5626 }

5644 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorT,
5645  typename PropertyListT =
5646  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
5647 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
5648  detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
5649  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_write> &&
5650  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
5651 block_store(AccessorT lacc, uint32_t byte_offset, simd<T, N> vals,
5652  PropertyListT props = {}) {
5653  byte_offset += detail::localAccessorToOffset(lacc);
5654  slm_block_store<T, N>(byte_offset, vals, props);
5655 }

5676  detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
5677  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_write> &&
5678  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
5679 block_store(AccessorT lacc, simd<T, N> vals, PropertyListT props = {}) {
5680  slm_block_store<T, N>(detail::localAccessorToOffset(lacc), vals, props);
