5713 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
5714  detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
5715  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_write> &&
5716  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
5717 block_store(AccessorT lacc, uint32_t byte_offset, simd<T, N> vals,
5718  simd_mask<1> pred, PropertyListT props = {}) {
5719  byte_offset += detail::localAccessorToOffset(lacc);
5720  slm_block_store<T, N>(byte_offset, vals, pred, props);

5748 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorT,
5749  typename PropertyListT =
5750  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
5751 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
5752  detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
5753  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_write> &&
5754  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
5755 block_store(AccessorT lacc, simd<T, N> vals, simd_mask<1> pred,
5756  PropertyListT props = {}) {
5757  slm_block_store<T, N>(detail::localAccessorToOffset(lacc), vals, pred, props);
5758 }
5759 namespace detail {
5760 
5761 // lsc_atomic_update() operations may share atomic_op values for data types
5762 // of the same (fp vs integral) class for convenience (e.g. re-use 'fmax' for
5763 // all FP types). In fact those data types may require using different internal
5764 // opcodes. This function returns the corresponding internal opcode for
5765 // the input type 'T' and operation 'Op'.
5766 template <typename T, __ESIMD_NS::atomic_op Op>
5767 constexpr int lsc_to_internal_atomic_op() {
5768  constexpr __ESIMD_NS::native::lsc::atomic_op LSCOp =
5769  __ESIMD_DNS::to_lsc_atomic_op<Op>();
5770  return static_cast<int>(LSCOp);
5771 }
5772 
5786 
5787 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, lsc_data_size DS>
5788 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<get_num_args<Op>() == 0, simd<T, N>>
5789 slm_atomic_update_impl(simd<uint32_t, N> offsets, simd_mask<N> pred) {
5790  check_lsc_data_size<T, DS>();
5791  check_atomic<Op, T, N, 0, /*IsLSC*/ true>();
5792  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
5793  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
5794  constexpr lsc_data_size EDS = expand_data_size(finalize_data_size<T, DS>());
5795  constexpr lsc_vector_size VS = to_lsc_vector_size<1>();
5796  constexpr lsc_data_order Transposed = lsc_data_order::nontranspose;
5797  using MsgT = typename lsc_expand_type<T>::type;
5798  constexpr int IOp = lsc_to_internal_atomic_op<T, Op>();
5799  simd<MsgT, N> Tmp =
5800  __esimd_lsc_xatomic_slm_0<MsgT, IOp, cache_hint::none, cache_hint::none,
5801  AddressScale, ImmOffset, EDS, VS, Transposed,
5802  N>(pred.data(), offsets.data());
5803  return lsc_format_ret<T>(Tmp);
5804 }
5805 
5820 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, lsc_data_size DS>
5821 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<get_num_args<Op>() == 1, simd<T, N>>
5822 slm_atomic_update_impl(simd<uint32_t, N> offsets, simd<T, N> src0,
5823  simd_mask<N> pred) {
5824  check_lsc_data_size<T, DS>();
5825  check_atomic<Op, T, N, 1, /*IsLSC*/ true>();
5826  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
5827  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
5828  constexpr lsc_data_size EDS = expand_data_size(finalize_data_size<T, DS>());
5829  constexpr lsc_vector_size VS = to_lsc_vector_size<1>();
5830  constexpr lsc_data_order Transposed = lsc_data_order::nontranspose;
5831  constexpr int IOp = lsc_to_internal_atomic_op<T, Op>();
5832  if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, double>) {
5833  return __esimd_lsc_xatomic_slm_1<T, IOp, cache_hint::none, cache_hint::none,
5834  AddressScale, ImmOffset, EDS, VS,
5835  Transposed, N>(pred.data(), offsets.data(),
5836  src0.data());
5837  } else {
5838  using MsgT = typename lsc_expand_type<T>::type;
5839  simd<MsgT, N> Msg_data = lsc_format_input<MsgT>(src0);
5840  simd<MsgT, N> Tmp =
5841  __esimd_lsc_xatomic_slm_1<MsgT, IOp, cache_hint::none, cache_hint::none,
5842  AddressScale, ImmOffset, EDS, VS, Transposed,
5843  N>(pred.data(), offsets.data(),
5844  Msg_data.data());
5845  return lsc_format_ret<T>(Tmp);
5846  }
5847 }
5848 
5864 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, lsc_data_size DS>
5865 __ESIMD_API simd<T, N> slm_atomic_update_impl(simd<uint32_t, N> offsets,
5866  simd<T, N> src0, simd<T, N> src1,
5867  simd_mask<N> pred) {
5868  check_lsc_data_size<T, DS>();
5869  check_atomic<Op, T, N, 2, /*IsLSC*/ true>();
5870  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
5871  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
5872  constexpr lsc_data_size EDS = expand_data_size(finalize_data_size<T, DS>());
5873  constexpr lsc_vector_size VS = to_lsc_vector_size<1>();
5874  constexpr lsc_data_order Transposed = lsc_data_order::nontranspose;
5875  constexpr int IOp = lsc_to_internal_atomic_op<T, Op>();
5876  if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, double>) {
5877  return __esimd_lsc_xatomic_slm_2<T, IOp, cache_hint::none, cache_hint::none,
5878  AddressScale, ImmOffset, EDS, VS,
5879  Transposed, N>(pred.data(), offsets.data(),
5880  src0.data(), src1.data());
5881  } else {
5882  using MsgT = typename lsc_expand_type<T>::type;
5883  simd<MsgT, N> Msg_data0 = lsc_format_input<MsgT>(src0);
5884  simd<MsgT, N> Msg_data1 = lsc_format_input<MsgT>(src1);
5885  simd<MsgT, N> Tmp =
5886  __esimd_lsc_xatomic_slm_2<MsgT, IOp, cache_hint::none, cache_hint::none,
5887  AddressScale, ImmOffset, EDS, VS, Transposed,
5888  N>(pred.data(), offsets.data(),
5889  Msg_data0.data(), Msg_data1.data());
5890  return lsc_format_ret<T>(Tmp);
5891  }
5892 }
5893 
5894 } // namespace detail

5899 
5903 
5908 
5913 
5915 
5933 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N>
5934 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<__ESIMD_DNS::get_num_args<Op>() == 0, simd<T, N>>
5935 slm_atomic_update(simd<uint32_t, N> byte_offset, simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
5936  // 2 byte, 8 byte types, non-power of two, and operations wider than 32 are
5937  // supported only by LSC.
5938  if constexpr (sizeof(T) == 2 || sizeof(T) == 8 ||
5939  !__ESIMD_DNS::isPowerOf2(N, 32)) {
5940  return slm_atomic_update_impl<Op, T, N,
5941  detail::lsc_data_size::default_size>(
5942  byte_offset, mask);
5943  } else if constexpr (Op == atomic_op::load) {
5944  if constexpr (std::is_integral_v<T>) {
5945  return slm_atomic_update<atomic_op::bit_or, T, N>(byte_offset,
5946  simd<T, N>(0), mask);
5947  } else {
5948  using Tint = detail::uint_type_t<sizeof(T)>;
5949  simd<Tint, N> Res = slm_atomic_update<atomic_op::bit_or, Tint, N>(
5950  byte_offset, simd<Tint, N>(0), mask);
5951  return Res.template bit_cast_view<T>();
5952  }
5953  } else {
5954  detail::check_atomic<Op, T, N, 0>();
5955  const auto si = get_surface_index(detail::LocalAccessorMarker());
5956  return __esimd_dword_atomic0<Op, T, N>(mask.data(), si, byte_offset.data());
5957  }
5958 }
5959 
5968 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, typename AccessorT>
5969 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<__ESIMD_DNS::get_num_args<Op>() == 0 &&
5970  __ESIMD_DNS::is_rw_local_accessor_v<AccessorT>,
5971  simd<T, N>>
5972 atomic_update(AccessorT lacc, simd<uint32_t, N> byte_offset,
5973  simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
5974  byte_offset += detail::localAccessorToOffset(lacc);
5975  return slm_atomic_update<Op, T, N>(byte_offset, mask);
5976 }
5977 
5979 
5985 
5992 
5994 
6012 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N>
6013 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<__ESIMD_DNS::get_num_args<Op>() == 1, simd<T, N>>
6014 slm_atomic_update(simd<uint32_t, N> byte_offset, simd<T, N> src0,
6015  simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
6016  // 2 byte, 8 byte types, non-power of two, and operations wider than 32 are
6017  // supported only by LSC.
6018  if constexpr (sizeof(T) == 2 || sizeof(T) == 8 ||
6019  !__ESIMD_DNS::isPowerOf2(N, 32)) {
6020  // half and short are supported in LSC.
6021  return slm_atomic_update_impl<Op, T, N,
6022  detail::lsc_data_size::default_size>(
6023  byte_offset, src0, mask);
6024  } else if constexpr (Op == atomic_op::store) {
6025  if constexpr (std::is_integral_v<T>) {
6026  return slm_atomic_update<atomic_op::xchg, T, N>(byte_offset, src0, mask);
6027  } else {
6028  using Tint = detail::uint_type_t<sizeof(T)>;
6029  simd<Tint, N> Res = slm_atomic_update<atomic_op::xchg, Tint, N>(
6030  byte_offset, src0.template bit_cast_view<Tint>(), mask);
6031  return Res.template bit_cast_view<T>();
6032  }
6033  } else {
6034  detail::check_atomic<Op, T, N, 1>();
6035  const auto si = get_surface_index(detail::LocalAccessorMarker());
6036  return __esimd_dword_atomic1<Op, T, N>(mask.data(), si, byte_offset.data(),
6037  src0.data());
6038  }
6039 }
6040 
6059 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, typename AccessorT>
6060 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<__ESIMD_DNS::get_num_args<Op>() == 1 &&
6061  __ESIMD_DNS::is_rw_local_accessor_v<AccessorT>,
6062  simd<T, N>>
6063 atomic_update(AccessorT lacc, simd<uint32_t, N> byte_offset, simd<T, N> src0,
6064  simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
6065  byte_offset += detail::localAccessorToOffset(lacc);
6066  return slm_atomic_update<Op, T, N>(byte_offset, src0, mask);
6067 }
6068 
6070 
6075 
6083 
6101 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N>
6102 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<__ESIMD_DNS::get_num_args<Op>() == 2, simd<T, N>>
6103 slm_atomic_update(simd<uint32_t, N> byte_offset, simd<T, N> src0,
6104  simd<T, N> src1, simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
6105  // 2 byte, 8 byte types, non-power of two, and operations wider than 32 are
6106  // supported only by LSC.
6107  if constexpr (sizeof(T) == 2 || sizeof(T) == 8 ||
6108  !__ESIMD_DNS::isPowerOf2(N, 32)) {
6109  // 2-argument lsc_atomic_update arguments order matches the standard one -
6110  // expected value first, then new value. But atomic_update uses reverse
6111  // order, hence the src1/src0 swap.
6112  return detail::slm_atomic_update_impl<Op, T, N,
6113  detail::lsc_data_size::default_size>(
6114  byte_offset, src1, src0, mask);
6115  } else {
6116  detail::check_atomic<Op, T, N, 2>();
6117  const auto si = get_surface_index(detail::LocalAccessorMarker());
6118  return __esimd_dword_atomic2<Op, T, N>(mask.data(), si, byte_offset.data(),
6119  src0.data(), src1.data());
6120  }
6121 }
6122 
6129 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, typename AccessorT>
6130 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<__ESIMD_DNS::get_num_args<Op>() == 2 &&
6131  __ESIMD_DNS::is_rw_local_accessor_v<AccessorT>,
6132  simd<T, N>>
6133 atomic_update(AccessorT lacc, simd<uint32_t, N> byte_offset, simd<T, N> src0,
6134  simd<T, N> src1, simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
6135  byte_offset += detail::localAccessorToOffset(lacc);
6136  return slm_atomic_update<Op, T, N>(byte_offset, src0, src1, mask);
6137 }
6138 
6140 
6141 namespace detail {
6142 
6156 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, lsc_data_size DS,
6157  typename PropertyListT, typename Toffset>
6158 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<get_num_args<Op>() == 0, simd<T, N>>
6159 atomic_update_impl(T *p, simd<Toffset, N> offsets, simd_mask<N> pred) {
6160  static_assert(sizeof(T) > 1, "Unsupported data type");
6161  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<Toffset>, "Unsupported offset type");
6162  check_atomic<Op, T, N, 0, /*IsLSC*/ true>();
6163  check_lsc_data_size<T, DS>();
6164  check_cache_hints<cache_action::atomic, PropertyListT>();
6165  constexpr cache_hint L1H =
6166  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(cache_hint::none);
6167  constexpr cache_hint L2H =
6168  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(cache_hint::none);
6169  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
6170  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
6171  constexpr lsc_data_size EDS = expand_data_size(finalize_data_size<T, DS>());
6172  constexpr lsc_vector_size VS = to_lsc_vector_size<1>();
6173  constexpr lsc_data_order Transposed = lsc_data_order::nontranspose;
6174  using MsgT = typename lsc_expand_type<T>::type;
6175  constexpr int IOp = lsc_to_internal_atomic_op<T, Op>();
6176  simd<uintptr_t, N> addrs = reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(p);
6177  addrs += convert<uintptr_t>(offsets);
6178  simd<MsgT, N> Tmp =
6179  __esimd_lsc_xatomic_stateless_0<MsgT, IOp, L1H, L2H, AddressScale,
6180  ImmOffset, EDS, VS, Transposed, N>(
6181  pred.data(), addrs.data());
6182  return lsc_format_ret<T>(Tmp);
6183 }
6184 
6199 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, lsc_data_size DS,
6200  typename PropertyListT, typename Toffset>
6201 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<get_num_args<Op>() == 1, simd<T, N>>
6202 atomic_update_impl(T *p, simd<Toffset, N> offsets, simd<T, N> src0,
6203  simd_mask<N> pred) {
6204  static_assert(sizeof(T) > 1, "Unsupported data type");
6205  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<Toffset>, "Unsupported offset type");
6206  check_lsc_data_size<T, DS>();
6207  check_atomic<Op, T, N, 1, /*IsLSC*/ true>();
6208  check_cache_hints<cache_action::atomic, PropertyListT>();
6209  constexpr cache_hint L1H =
6210  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(cache_hint::none);
6211  constexpr cache_hint L2H =
6212  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(cache_hint::none);
6213  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
6214  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
6215  constexpr lsc_data_size EDS = expand_data_size(finalize_data_size<T, DS>());
6216  constexpr lsc_vector_size VS = to_lsc_vector_size<1>();
6217  constexpr lsc_data_order Transposed = lsc_data_order::nontranspose;
6218  using MsgT = typename lsc_expand_type<T>::type;
6219  constexpr int IOp = lsc_to_internal_atomic_op<T, Op>();
6220  simd<MsgT, N> Msg_data = lsc_format_input<MsgT>(src0);
6221  simd<uintptr_t, N> addrs = reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(p);
6222  addrs += convert<uintptr_t>(offsets);
6223  simd<MsgT, N> Tmp =
6224  __esimd_lsc_xatomic_stateless_1<MsgT, IOp, L1H, L2H, AddressScale,
6225  ImmOffset, EDS, VS, Transposed, N>(
6226  pred.data(), addrs.data(), Msg_data.data());
6227  return lsc_format_ret<T>(Tmp);
6228 }
6229 
6245 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, lsc_data_size DS,
6246  typename PropertyListT, typename Toffset>
6247 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<get_num_args<Op>() == 2, simd<T, N>>
6248 atomic_update_impl(T *p, simd<Toffset, N> offsets, simd<T, N> src0,
6249  simd<T, N> src1, simd_mask<N> pred) {
6250  static_assert(sizeof(T) > 1, "Unsupported data type");
6251  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<Toffset>, "Unsupported offset type");
6252  check_lsc_data_size<T, DS>();
6253  check_atomic<Op, T, N, 2, /*IsLSC*/ true>();
6254  check_cache_hints<cache_action::atomic, PropertyListT>();
6255  constexpr cache_hint L1H =
6256  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(cache_hint::none);
6257  constexpr cache_hint L2H =
6258  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(cache_hint::none);
6259  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
6260  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
6261  constexpr lsc_data_size EDS = expand_data_size(finalize_data_size<T, DS>());
6262  constexpr lsc_vector_size VS = to_lsc_vector_size<1>();
6263  constexpr lsc_data_order Transposed = lsc_data_order::nontranspose;
6264  using MsgT = typename lsc_expand_type<T>::type;
6265  constexpr int IOp = lsc_to_internal_atomic_op<T, Op>();
6266  simd<MsgT, N> Msg_data0 = lsc_format_input<MsgT>(src0);
6267  simd<MsgT, N> Msg_data1 = lsc_format_input<MsgT>(src1);
6268  simd<uintptr_t, N> addrs = reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(p);
6269  addrs += convert<uintptr_t>(offsets);
6270  simd<MsgT, N> Tmp =
6271  __esimd_lsc_xatomic_stateless_2<MsgT, IOp, L1H, L2H, AddressScale,
6272  ImmOffset, EDS, VS, Transposed, N>(
6273  pred.data(), addrs.data(), Msg_data0.data(), Msg_data1.data());
6274  return lsc_format_ret<T>(Tmp);
6275 }
6276 
6292 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N,
6293  lsc_data_size DS = lsc_data_size::default_size,
6294  typename PropertyListT, typename AccessorTy, typename Toffset>
6295 __ESIMD_API
6296  std::enable_if_t<get_num_args<Op>() == 0 &&
6297  __ESIMD_DNS::is_rw_device_accessor_v<AccessorTy>,
6298  simd<T, N>>
6299  atomic_update_impl(AccessorTy acc, simd<Toffset, N> byte_offsets,
6300  simd_mask<N> pred) {
6301 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
6302  return atomic_update_impl<Op, T, N, DS, PropertyListT>(
6303  accessorToPointer<T>(acc), byte_offsets, pred);
6304 #else
6305  static_assert(sizeof(T) > 1, "Unsupported data type");
6306  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<Toffset> && sizeof(Toffset) == 4,
6307  "Unsupported offset type");
6308  check_lsc_data_size<T, DS>();
6309  check_atomic<Op, T, N, 0, /*IsLSC*/ true>();
6310  check_cache_hints<cache_action::atomic, PropertyListT>();
6311  constexpr cache_hint L1H =
6312  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(cache_hint::none);
6313  constexpr cache_hint L2H =
6314  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(cache_hint::none);
6315  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
6316  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
6317  constexpr lsc_data_size EDS = expand_data_size(finalize_data_size<T, DS>());
6318  constexpr lsc_vector_size VS = to_lsc_vector_size<1>();
6319  constexpr lsc_data_order Transposed = lsc_data_order::nontranspose;
6320  using MsgT = typename lsc_expand_type<T>::type;
6321  constexpr int IOp = lsc_to_internal_atomic_op<T, Op>();
6322  auto si = get_surface_index(acc);
6323  simd<MsgT, N> Tmp =
6324  __esimd_lsc_xatomic_bti_0<MsgT, IOp, L1H, L2H, AddressScale, ImmOffset,
6325  EDS, VS, Transposed, N>(
6326  pred.data(), byte_offsets.data(), si);
6327  return lsc_format_ret<T>(Tmp);
6328 #endif
6329 }
6330 
6348 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, lsc_data_size DS,
6349  typename PropertyListT, typename AccessorTy, typename Toffset>
6350 __ESIMD_API
6351  std::enable_if_t<get_num_args<Op>() == 1 &&
6352  __ESIMD_DNS::is_rw_device_accessor_v<AccessorTy>,
6353  simd<T, N>>
6354  atomic_update_impl(AccessorTy acc, simd<Toffset, N> byte_offset,
6355  simd<T, N> src0, simd_mask<N> pred) {
6356 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
6357  return atomic_update_impl<Op, T, N, DS, PropertyListT>(
6358  accessorToPointer<T>(acc), byte_offset, src0, pred);
6359 #else
6360  static_assert(sizeof(T) > 1, "Unsupported data type");
6361  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<Toffset> && sizeof(Toffset) == 4,
6362  "Unsupported offset type");
6363  check_lsc_data_size<T, DS>();
6364  check_atomic<Op, T, N, 1, /*IsLSC*/ true>();
6365  check_cache_hints<cache_action::atomic, PropertyListT>();
6366  constexpr cache_hint L1H =
6367  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(cache_hint::none);
6368  constexpr cache_hint L2H =
6369  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(cache_hint::none);
6370  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
6371  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
6372  constexpr lsc_data_size EDS = expand_data_size(finalize_data_size<T, DS>());
6373  constexpr lsc_vector_size VS = to_lsc_vector_size<1>();
6374  constexpr lsc_data_order Transposed = lsc_data_order::nontranspose;
6375  using MsgT = typename lsc_expand_type<T>::type;
6376  constexpr int IOp = lsc_to_internal_atomic_op<T, Op>();
6377  simd<MsgT, N> Src0Msg = lsc_format_input<MsgT>(src0);
6378  auto si = get_surface_index(acc);
6379  simd<MsgT, N> Tmp =
6380  __esimd_lsc_xatomic_bti_1<MsgT, IOp, L1H, L2H, AddressScale, ImmOffset,
6381  EDS, VS, Transposed, N>(
6382  pred.data(), byte_offset.data(), Src0Msg.data(), si);
6383  return lsc_format_ret<T>(Tmp);
6384 #endif
6385 }
6386 
6405 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, lsc_data_size DS,
6406  typename PropertyListT, typename AccessorTy, typename Toffset>
6407 __ESIMD_API
6408  std::enable_if_t<get_num_args<Op>() == 2 &&
6409  __ESIMD_DNS::is_rw_device_accessor_v<AccessorTy>,
6410  simd<T, N>>
6411  atomic_update_impl(AccessorTy acc, simd<Toffset, N> byte_offset,
6412  simd<T, N> src0, simd<T, N> src1, simd_mask<N> pred) {
6413 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
6414  return atomic_update_impl<Op, T, N, DS, PropertyListT>(
6415  __ESIMD_DNS::accessorToPointer<T>(acc), byte_offset, src0, src1, pred);
6416 #else
6417  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<Toffset> && sizeof(Toffset) == 4,
6418  "Unsupported offset type");
6419  check_lsc_vector_size<1>();
6420  check_lsc_data_size<T, DS>();
6421  check_atomic<Op, T, N, 2, /*IsLSC*/ true>();
6422  check_cache_hints<cache_action::atomic, PropertyListT>();
6423  constexpr cache_hint L1H =
6424  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(cache_hint::none);
6425  constexpr cache_hint L2H =
6426  getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(cache_hint::none);
6427  constexpr uint16_t AddressScale = 1;
6428  constexpr int ImmOffset = 0;
6429  constexpr lsc_data_size EDS = expand_data_size(finalize_data_size<T, DS>());
6430  constexpr lsc_vector_size VS = to_lsc_vector_size<1>();
6431  constexpr lsc_data_order Transposed = lsc_data_order::nontranspose;
6432  using MsgT = typename lsc_expand_type<T>::type;
6433  constexpr int IOp = lsc_to_internal_atomic_op<T, Op>();
6434  simd<MsgT, N> Msg_data0 = lsc_format_input<MsgT>(src0);
6435  simd<MsgT, N> Msg_data1 = lsc_format_input<MsgT>(src1);
6436  auto si = get_surface_index(acc);
6437  simd<MsgT, N> Tmp =
6438  __esimd_lsc_xatomic_bti_2<MsgT, IOp, L1H, L2H, AddressScale, ImmOffset,
6439  EDS, VS, Transposed, N>(
6440  pred.data(), byte_offset.data(), Msg_data0.data(), Msg_data1.data(),
6441  si);
6442  return lsc_format_ret<T>(Tmp);
6443 #endif
6444 }
6445 } // namespace detail
6446 
6449 
6487 // Other properties are ignored.
6491 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, typename Toffset,
6492  typename PropertyListT =
6493  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
6494 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
6495  __ESIMD_DNS::get_num_args<Op>() == 0 &&
6496  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
6497  simd<T, N>>
6498 atomic_update(T *p, simd<Toffset, N> byte_offset, simd_mask<N> mask,
6499  PropertyListT props = {}) {
6500  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<Toffset>, "Unsupported offset type");
6501 
6502  if constexpr (detail::has_cache_hints<PropertyListT>() ||
6503  !__ESIMD_DNS::isPowerOf2(N, 32)) {
6504  return detail::atomic_update_impl<
6505  Op, T, N, detail::lsc_data_size::default_size, PropertyListT, Toffset>(
6506  p, byte_offset, mask);
6507  } else if constexpr (N == 16 || N == 32) {
6508  // TODO: In fact GPU BE supports legalization for any N, even for
6509  // non-power-of-2, but it is implemented with an error now. For example,
6510  // N=17 is emulated as 2 calls (N=16 and N=1), while it must be 3 calls:
6511  // (N=8, N=8, N=1). I.e. Gen12 atomic instruction supports only N up to 8
6512  // and GPU thinks now it is up to 16.
6513  // Thus we emulate N=16 with 2 calls with N=8 each.
6514  // N=32 is emulated with 4 calls with N=8 each.
6515  // Task1: Remove the special-case emulation for N=16 and N=32 below when
6516  // GPU driver fixes the error.
6517  // Task2: remove the condition "!__ESIMD_DNS::isPowerOf2(N, 32)" above
6518  // and let svm.atomic for any N.
6519 
6520  simd<T, N> Res;
6521  for (int I = 0; I < N; I += 8) {
6522  simd_mask<8> Mask8 = mask.template select<8, 1>(I);
6523  simd<Toffset, 8> ByteOffset8 = byte_offset.template select<8, 1>(I);
6524  Res.template select<8, 1>(I) =
6525  atomic_update<Op, T, 8>(p, ByteOffset8, Mask8, props);
6526  }
6527  return Res;
6528  } else if constexpr (Op == atomic_op::load) {
6529  if constexpr (std::is_integral_v<T>) {
6530  return atomic_update<atomic_op::bit_or, T, N>(p, byte_offset,
6531  simd<T, N>(0), mask, props);
6532  } else {
6533  using Tint = detail::uint_type_t<sizeof(T)>;
6534  simd<Tint, N> Res = atomic_update<atomic_op::bit_or, Tint, N>(
6535  reinterpret_cast<Tint *>(p), byte_offset, simd<Tint, N>(0), mask,
6536  props);
6537  return Res.template bit_cast_view<T>();
6538  }
6539  } else {
6540  detail::check_atomic<Op, T, N, 0>();
6541  simd<uintptr_t, N> vAddr(reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(p));
6542  simd<uintptr_t, N> offset_i1 = convert<uintptr_t>(byte_offset);
6543  vAddr += offset_i1;
6544  using Tx = typename detail::__raw_t<T>;
6545  return __esimd_svm_atomic0<Op, Tx, N>(vAddr.data(), mask.data());
6546  }
6547 }
6548 
6567 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, typename Toffset,
6568  typename PropertyListT =
6569  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
6570 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
6571  __ESIMD_DNS::get_num_args<Op>() == 0 &&
6572  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
6573  simd<T, N>>
6574 atomic_update(T *p, simd<Toffset, N> byte_offset, PropertyListT props = {}) {
6575  simd_mask<N> mask = 1;
6576  return atomic_update<Op, T, N>(p, byte_offset, mask, props);
6577 }
6578 
6599 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, typename OffsetObjT,
6600  typename RegionTy,
6601  typename PropertyListT =
6602  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
6603 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
6604  __ESIMD_DNS::get_num_args<Op>() == 0 &&
6605  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
6606  simd<T, N>>
6607 atomic_update(T *p, simd_view<OffsetObjT, RegionTy> offsets, simd_mask<N> mask,
6608  PropertyListT props = {}) {
6609  return atomic_update<Op, T, N>(p, offsets.read(), mask, props);
6610 }
6611 
6630 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, typename OffsetObjT,
6631  typename RegionTy,
6632  typename PropertyListT =
6633  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
6634 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
6635  __ESIMD_DNS::get_num_args<Op>() == 0 &&
6636  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
6637  simd<T, N>>
6638 atomic_update(T *p, simd_view<OffsetObjT, RegionTy> byte_offset,
6639  PropertyListT props = {}) {
6640  simd_mask<N> mask = 1;
6641  return atomic_update<Op, T, N>(p, byte_offset.read(), mask, props);
6642 }
6643 
6658 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, typename Toffset>
6659 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<std::is_integral_v<Toffset>, simd<T, N>>
6660 atomic_update(T *p, Toffset byte_offset, simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
6661  return atomic_update<Op, T, N>(p, simd<Toffset, N>(byte_offset), mask);
6662 }
6663 
6683 
6712 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, typename Toffset,
6713  typename PropertyListT =
6714  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
6715 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
6716  __ESIMD_DNS::get_num_args<Op>() == 1 &&
6717  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
6718  simd<T, N>>
6719 atomic_update(T *p, simd<Toffset, N> byte_offset, simd<T, N> src0,
6720  simd_mask<N> mask, PropertyListT props = {}) {
6721  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<Toffset>, "Unsupported offset type");
6722 
6723  // Auto-convert FP atomics to LSC version.
6724  if constexpr (detail::has_cache_hints<PropertyListT>() ||
6725  (Op == atomic_op::fmin) || (Op == atomic_op::fmax) ||
6726  (Op == atomic_op::fadd) || (Op == atomic_op::fsub) ||
6727  !__ESIMD_DNS::isPowerOf2(N, 32)) {
6728  return detail::atomic_update_impl<
6729  Op, T, N, detail::lsc_data_size::default_size, PropertyListT, Toffset>(
6730  p, byte_offset, src0, mask);
6731  } else if constexpr (N == 16 || N == 32) {
6732  // TODO: In fact GPU BE supports legalization for any N, even for
6733  // non-power-of-2, but it is implemented with an error now. For example,
6734  // N=17 is emulated as 2 calls (N=16 and N=1), while it must be 3 calls:
6735  // (N=8, N=8, N=1). I.e. Gen12 atomic instruction supports only N up to 8
6736  // and GPU thinks now it is up to 16.
6737  // Thus we emulate N=16 with 2 calls with N=8 each.
6738  // N=32 is emulated with 4 calls with N=8 each.
6739  // Task1: Remove the special-case emulation for N=16 and N=32 below when
6740  // GPU driver fixes the error.
6741  // Task2: remove the condition "!__ESIMD_DNS::isPowerOf2(N, 32)" above
6742  // and let svm.atomic for any N.
6743  simd<T, N> Res;
6744  for (int I = 0; I < N; I += 8) {
6745  simd_mask<8> Mask8 = mask.template select<8, 1>(I);
6746  simd<Toffset, 8> ByteOffset8 = byte_offset.template select<8, 1>(I);
6747  simd<T, 8> Src08 = src0.template select<8, 1>(I);
6748  Res.template select<8, 1>(I) =
6749  atomic_update<Op, T, 8>(p, ByteOffset8, Src08, Mask8, props);
6750  }
6751  return Res;
6752  } else if constexpr (Op == atomic_op::store) {
6753  if constexpr (std::is_integral_v<T>) {
6754  return atomic_update<atomic_op::xchg, T, N>(p, byte_offset, src0, mask,
6755  props);
6756  } else {
6757  using Tint = detail::uint_type_t<sizeof(T)>;
6758  simd<Tint, N> Res = atomic_update<atomic_op::xchg, Tint, N>(
6759  reinterpret_cast<Tint *>(p), byte_offset,
6760  src0.template bit_cast_view<Tint>(), mask, props);
6761  return Res.template bit_cast_view<T>();
6762  }
6763  } else {
6764  detail::check_atomic<Op, T, N, 1>();
6765  simd<uintptr_t, N> vAddr(reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(p));
6766  simd<uintptr_t, N> offset_i1 = convert<uintptr_t>(byte_offset);
6767  vAddr += offset_i1;
6768 
6769  using Tx = typename detail::__raw_t<T>;
6770  return __esimd_svm_atomic1<Op, Tx, N>(vAddr.data(), src0.data(),
6771  mask.data());
6772  }
6773 }
6774 
6778 
6780 
6798 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, typename Toffset,
6799  typename PropertyListT =
6800  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
6801 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
6802  __ESIMD_DNS::get_num_args<Op>() == 1 &&
6803  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
6804  simd<T, N>>
6805 atomic_update(T *p, simd<Toffset, N> byte_offset, simd<T, N> src0,
6806  PropertyListT props = {}) {
6807  simd_mask<N> mask = 1;
6808  return atomic_update<Op, T, N>(p, byte_offset, src0, mask, props);
6809 }

6839  typename RegionTy,
6840  typename PropertyListT =
6841  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
6842 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
6843  __ESIMD_DNS::get_num_args<Op>() == 1 &&
6844  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
6845  simd<T, N>>
6846 atomic_update(T *p, simd_view<OffsetObjT, RegionTy> offsets, simd<T, N> src0,
6847  simd_mask<N> mask, PropertyListT props = {}) {
6848  return atomic_update<Op, T, N>(p, offsets.read(), src0, mask, props);
6849 }

6877  typename RegionTy,
6878  typename PropertyListT =
6879  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
6880 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
6881  __ESIMD_DNS::get_num_args<Op>() == 1 &&
6882  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
6883  simd<T, N>>
6884 atomic_update(T *p, simd_view<OffsetObjT, RegionTy> offsets, simd<T, N> src0,
6885  PropertyListT props = {}) {
6886  simd_mask<N> mask = 1;
6887  return atomic_update<Op, T, N>(p, offsets.read(), src0, mask, props);
6888 }

6908 template <atomic_op Op, typename Tx, int N, typename Toffset>
6909 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
6910  std::is_integral_v<Toffset> &&
6911  ((Op != atomic_op::store && Op != atomic_op::xchg) || N == 1),
6912  simd<Tx, N>>
6913 atomic_update(Tx *p, Toffset byte_offset, simd<Tx, N> src0, simd_mask<N> mask) {
6914  return atomic_update<Op, Tx, N>(p, simd<Toffset, N>(byte_offset), src0, mask);
6915 }
6916 
6941 
6959 // Other properties are ignored.
6963 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, typename Toffset,
6964  typename PropertyListT =
6965  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
6966 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
6967  __ESIMD_DNS::get_num_args<Op>() == 2 &&
6968  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
6969  simd<T, N>>
6970 atomic_update(T *p, simd<Toffset, N> byte_offset, simd<T, N> src0,
6971  simd<T, N> src1, simd_mask<N> mask, PropertyListT props = {}) {
6972  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<Toffset>, "Unsupported offset type");
6973 
6974  // Use LSC atomic when cache hints are present, FP atomics is used,
6975  // non-power of two length is used, or operation width greater than 32.
6976  if constexpr (detail::has_cache_hints<PropertyListT>() ||
6977  Op == atomic_op::fcmpxchg || !__ESIMD_DNS::isPowerOf2(N, 32)) {
6978  // 2-argument lsc_atomic_update arguments order matches the standard one -
6979  // expected value first, then new value. But atomic_update uses reverse
6980  // order, hence the src1/src0 swap.
6981  return detail::atomic_update_impl<
6982  Op, T, N, detail::lsc_data_size::default_size, PropertyListT, Toffset>(
6983  p, byte_offset, src1, src0, mask);
6984  } else if constexpr (N == 16 || N == 32) {
6985  // TODO: In fact GPU BE supports legalization for any N, even for
6986  // non-power-of-2, but it is implemented with an error now. For example,
6987  // N=17 is emulated as 2 calls (N=16 and N=1), while it must be 3 calls:
6988  // (N=8, N=8, N=1). I.e. Gen12 atomic instruction supports only N up to 8
6989  // and GPU thinks now it is up to 16.
6990  // Thus we emulate N=16 with 2 calls with N=8 each.
6991  // N=32 is emulated with 4 calls with N=8 each.
6992  // Task1: Remove the special-case emulation for N=16 and N=32 below when
6993  // GPU driver fixes the error.
6994  // Task2: remove the condition "!__ESIMD_DNS::isPowerOf2(N, 32)" above
6995  // and let svm.atomic for any N.
6996  simd<T, N> Res;
6997  for (int I = 0; I < N; I += 8) {
6998  simd_mask<8> Mask8 = mask.template select<8, 1>(I);
6999  simd<Toffset, 8> ByteOffset8 = byte_offset.template select<8, 1>(I);
7000  simd<T, 8> Src08 = src0.template select<8, 1>(I);
7001  simd<T, 8> Src18 = src1.template select<8, 1>(I);
7002  Res.template select<8, 1>(I) =
7003  atomic_update<Op, T, 8>(p, ByteOffset8, Src08, Src18, Mask8, props);
7004  }
7005  return Res;
7006  } else {
7007  detail::check_atomic<Op, T, N, 2>();
7008  simd<uintptr_t, N> vAddr(reinterpret_cast<uintptr_t>(p));
7009  simd<uintptr_t, N> offset_i1 = convert<uintptr_t>(byte_offset);
7010  vAddr += offset_i1;
7011  using Tx = typename detail::__raw_t<T>;
7012  return __esimd_svm_atomic2<Op, Tx, N>(vAddr.data(), src0.data(),
7013  src1.data(), mask.data());
7014  }
7015 }
7016 
7021 //
7032 // Other properties are ignored.
7036 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, typename Toffset,
7037  typename PropertyListT =
7038  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
7039 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
7040  __ESIMD_DNS::get_num_args<Op>() == 2 &&
7041  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
7042  simd<T, N>>
7043 atomic_update(T *p, simd<Toffset, N> byte_offset, simd<T, N> src0,
7044  simd<T, N> src1, PropertyListT props = {}) {
7045  simd_mask<N> mask = 1;
7046  return atomic_update<Op, T, N>(p, byte_offset, src0, src1, mask, props);
7047 }

7071  typename PropertyListT =

7073 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<

7081  props);

7134 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<std::is_integral_v<Toffset>, simd<Tx, N>>
7135 atomic_update(Tx *p, Toffset byte_offset, simd<Tx, N> src0, simd<Tx, N> src1,

7157 
7182 // Other properties are ignored.
7186 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, typename Toffset,
7187  typename AccessorTy,
7188  typename PropertyListT =
7189  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
7190 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
7191  __ESIMD_DNS::get_num_args<Op>() == 0 &&
7192  __ESIMD_DNS::is_rw_device_accessor_v<AccessorTy> &&
7193  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
7194  simd<T, N>>
7195 atomic_update(AccessorTy acc, simd<Toffset, N> byte_offset, simd_mask<N> mask,
7196  PropertyListT props = {}) {
7197 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
7198  return atomic_update<Op, T, N>(__ESIMD_DNS::accessorToPointer<T>(acc),
7199  byte_offset, mask, props);
7200 #else
7201  constexpr auto L1Hint =
7202  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L1_key>(
7203  cache_hint::none);
7204  constexpr auto L2Hint =
7205  detail::getPropertyValue<PropertyListT, cache_hint_L2_key>(
7206  cache_hint::none);
7207  static_assert(!PropertyListT::template has_property<cache_hint_L3_key>(),
7208  "L3 cache hint is reserved. The old/experimental L3 LSC cache "
7209  "hint is cache_level::L2 now.");
7210 
7211  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<Toffset>, "Unsupported offset type");
7212 
7213  if constexpr (detail::has_cache_hints<PropertyListT>() ||
7214  !detail::isPowerOf2(N, 32)) {
7215  return detail::atomic_update_impl<
7216  Op, T, N, detail::lsc_data_size::default_size, PropertyListT>(
7217  acc, byte_offset, mask);
7218  } else {
7219  if constexpr (Op == atomic_op::load) {
7220  if constexpr (std::is_integral_v<T>) {
7221  return atomic_update<atomic_op::bit_or, T, N>(
7222  acc, byte_offset, simd<T, N>(0), mask, props);
7223  } else {
7224  using Tint = detail::uint_type_t<sizeof(T)>;
7225  simd<Tint, N> Res = atomic_update<atomic_op::bit_or, Tint, N>(
7226  acc, byte_offset, simd<Tint, N>(0), mask, props);
7227  return Res.template bit_cast_view<T>();
7228  }
7229  } else {
7230  detail::check_atomic<Op, T, N, 0>();
7231  static_assert(sizeof(Toffset) == 4, "Only 32 bit offset is supported");
7232 
7233  static_assert(sizeof(T) == 4, "Only 32 bit data is supported");
7234  const auto si = get_surface_index(acc);
7235  using Tx = typename detail::__raw_t<T>;
7236  return __esimd_dword_atomic0<Op, Tx, N>(mask.data(), si,
7237  byte_offset.data());
7238  }
7239  }
7240 #endif
7241 }
7242 
7259 // Other properties are ignored.
7263 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, typename Toffset,
7264  typename AccessorTy,
7265  typename PropertyListT =
7266  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
7267 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<

7269  __ESIMD_DNS::is_rw_device_accessor_v<AccessorTy> &&
7270  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
7271  simd<T, N>>
7272 atomic_update(AccessorTy acc, simd<Toffset, N> byte_offset,
7273  PropertyListT props = {}) {
7274  simd_mask<N> mask = 1;
7275  return atomic_update<Op, T, N>(acc, byte_offset, mask, props);
7276 }

7399  __ESIMD_DNS::is_rw_local_accessor_v<AccessorTy>,

7459 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, typename Toffset,
7460  typename AccessorTy,
7461  typename PropertyListT =
7462  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
7463 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
7464  __ESIMD_DNS::get_num_args<Op>() == 1 &&
7465  __ESIMD_DNS::is_rw_device_accessor_v<AccessorTy> &&
7466  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
7467  simd<T, N>>
7468 atomic_update(AccessorTy acc, simd<Toffset, N> byte_offset, simd<T, N> src0,
7469  simd_mask<N> mask, PropertyListT props = {}) {
7470 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
7471  return atomic_update<Op, T, N>(__ESIMD_DNS::accessorToPointer<T>(acc),
7472  byte_offset, src0, mask, props);
7473 #else
7474  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<Toffset>, "Unsupported offset type");
7475  static_assert(sizeof(Toffset) == 4, "Only 32 bit offset is supported");
7476  // Auto-convert FP atomics to LSC version.
7477  if constexpr (detail::has_cache_hints<PropertyListT>() ||
7478  Op == atomic_op::fmin || Op == atomic_op::fmax ||
7479  Op == atomic_op::fadd || Op == atomic_op::fsub ||
7480  !__ESIMD_DNS::isPowerOf2(N, 32)) {
7481  return detail::atomic_update_impl<
7482  Op, T, N, detail::lsc_data_size::default_size, PropertyListT>(
7483  acc, byte_offset, src0, mask);
7484  } else if constexpr (Op == atomic_op::store) {
7485  if constexpr (std::is_integral_v<T>) {
7486  return atomic_update<atomic_op::xchg, T, N>(acc, byte_offset, src0, mask,
7487  props);
7488  } else {
7489  using Tint = detail::uint_type_t<sizeof(T)>;
7490  simd<Tint, N> Res = atomic_update<atomic_op::xchg, Tint, N>(
7491  acc, byte_offset, src0.template bit_cast_view<Tint>(), mask, props);
7492  return Res.template bit_cast_view<T>();
7493  }
7494  } else {
7495  detail::check_atomic<Op, T, N, 1>();
7496  static_assert(sizeof(T) == 4, "Only 32 bit data is supported");
7497  const auto si = __ESIMD_NS::get_surface_index(acc);
7498  using Tx = typename detail::__raw_t<T>;
7499  return __esimd_dword_atomic1<Op, Tx, N>(
7500  mask.data(), si, byte_offset.data(),
7501  sycl::bit_cast<__ESIMD_DNS::vector_type_t<Tx, N>>(src0.data()));
7502  }
7503 #endif
7504 }

7538  typename AccessorTy,
7539  typename PropertyListT =
7540  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
7541 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
7542  __ESIMD_DNS::get_num_args<Op>() == 1 &&
7543  __ESIMD_DNS::is_rw_device_accessor_v<AccessorTy> &&
7544  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
7545  simd<T, N>>
7546 atomic_update(AccessorTy acc, simd<Toffset, N> byte_offset, simd<T, N> src0,
7547  PropertyListT props = {}) {
7548  simd_mask<N> mask = 1;
7549  return atomic_update<Op, T, N>(acc, byte_offset, src0, mask, props);
7550 }
7551 
7584 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, typename OffsetObjT,
7585  typename AccessorTy, typename RegionTy,
7586  typename PropertyListT =
7587  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
7588 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
7589  __ESIMD_DNS::get_num_args<Op>() == 1 &&
7590  __ESIMD_DNS::is_rw_device_accessor_v<AccessorTy> &&
7591  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
7592  simd<T, N>>
7593 atomic_update(AccessorTy acc, simd_view<OffsetObjT, RegionTy> byte_offset,
7594  simd<T, N> src0, simd_mask<N> mask, PropertyListT props = {}) {
7595  return atomic_update<Op, T, N>(acc, byte_offset.read(), src0, mask, props);
7596 }
7597 
7628 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, typename OffsetObjT,
7629  typename AccessorTy, typename RegionTy,
7630  typename PropertyListT =
7631  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
7632 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
7633  __ESIMD_DNS::get_num_args<Op>() == 1 &&
7634  __ESIMD_DNS::is_rw_device_accessor_v<AccessorTy> &&
7635  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
7636  simd<T, N>>
7637 atomic_update(AccessorTy acc, simd_view<OffsetObjT, RegionTy> byte_offset,
7638  simd<T, N> src0, PropertyListT props = {}) {
7639  simd_mask<N> mask = 1;
7640  return atomic_update<Op, T, N>(acc, byte_offset.read(), src0, mask, props);
7641 }
7642 
7664 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, typename Toffset,
7665  typename AccessorTy>
7666 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
7667  __ESIMD_DNS::is_rw_device_accessor_v<AccessorTy> &&
7668  ((Op != atomic_op::store && Op != atomic_op::xchg) || N == 1),
7669  simd<T, N>>
7670 atomic_update(AccessorTy acc, Toffset offset, simd<T, N> src0,
7671  simd_mask<N> mask) {
7672  return atomic_update<Op, T, N>(acc, simd<Toffset, N>(offset), src0, mask);
7673 }
7674 
7694 template <atomic_op Op, typename Tx, int N, typename AccessorTy>
7695 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
7696  __ESIMD_DNS::is_rw_local_accessor_v<AccessorTy> &&
7697  ((Op != atomic_op::store && Op != atomic_op::xchg) || N == 1),
7698  simd<Tx, N>>
7699 atomic_update(AccessorTy acc, uint32_t offset, simd<Tx, N> src0,
7700  simd_mask<N> mask) {
7701  return atomic_update<Op, Tx, N>(acc, simd<uint32_t, N>(offset), src0, mask);
7702 }
7703 
7710 // simd_mask<N> mask,props = {}); // (acc-au2-1)
7726 
7730 // simd_mask<N> mask,props = {}); // (acc-au2-1)
7753 // Other properties are ignored.
7757 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, typename Toffset,
7758  typename AccessorTy,
7759  typename PropertyListT =
7760  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
7761 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
7762  __ESIMD_DNS::get_num_args<Op>() == 2 && std::is_integral_v<Toffset> &&
7763  __ESIMD_DNS::is_rw_device_accessor_v<AccessorTy> &&
7764  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
7765  simd<T, N>>
7766 atomic_update(AccessorTy acc, simd<Toffset, N> byte_offset, simd<T, N> src0,
7767  simd<T, N> src1, simd_mask<N> mask, PropertyListT props = {}) {
7768 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
7769  return atomic_update<Op, T, N>(__ESIMD_DNS::accessorToPointer<T>(acc),
7770  byte_offset, src0, src1, mask, props);
7771 #else
7772  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<Toffset>, "Unsupported offset type");
7773  static_assert(sizeof(Toffset) == 4, "Only 32 bit offset is supported");
7774  // Use LSC atomic when cache hints are present, FP atomics is used,
7775  // non-power of two length is used, or operation width greater than 32.
7776  if constexpr (detail::has_cache_hints<PropertyListT>() ||
7777  Op == atomic_op::fcmpxchg || !__ESIMD_DNS::isPowerOf2(N, 32)) {
7778  // 2-argument lsc_atomic_update arguments order matches the standard one -
7779  // expected value first, then new value. But atomic_update uses reverse
7780  // order, hence the src1/src0 swap.
7781  return detail::atomic_update_impl<
7782  Op, T, N, detail::lsc_data_size::default_size, PropertyListT>(
7783  acc, byte_offset, src1, src0, mask);
7784  } else {
7785  detail::check_atomic<Op, T, N, 2>();
7786  static_assert(sizeof(T) == 4, "Only 32 bit data is supported");
7787  const auto si = __ESIMD_NS::get_surface_index(acc);
7788  using Tx = typename detail::__raw_t<T>;
7789  return __esimd_dword_atomic2<Op, Tx, N>(
7790  mask.data(), si, byte_offset.data(),
7791  sycl::bit_cast<__ESIMD_DNS::vector_type_t<Tx, N>>(src0.data()),
7792  sycl::bit_cast<__ESIMD_DNS::vector_type_t<Tx, N>>(src1.data()));
7793  }
7794 #endif
7795 }
7796 
7814 // Other properties are ignored.
7818 template <atomic_op Op, typename T, int N, typename Toffset,
7819  typename AccessorTy,
7820  typename PropertyListT =
7821  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
7822 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
7823  __ESIMD_DNS::get_num_args<Op>() == 2 &&
7824  __ESIMD_DNS::is_rw_device_accessor_v<AccessorTy> &&
7825  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
7826  simd<T, N>>
7827 atomic_update(AccessorTy acc, simd<Toffset, N> byte_offset, simd<T, N> src0,
7828  simd<T, N> src1, PropertyListT props = {}) {
7829  simd_mask<N> mask = 1;
7830  return atomic_update<Op, T, N>(acc, byte_offset, src0, src1, mask, props);
7831 }

7863  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
7864  simd<T, N>>

7866  simd<T, N> src0, simd<T, N> src1, simd_mask<N> mask,
7867  PropertyListT props = {}) {
7868  return atomic_update<Op, T, N>(acc, byte_offset.read(), src0, src1, mask,
7869  props);

7900  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>,
7901  simd<T, N>>

7930  typename AccessorTy>
7931 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<__ESIMD_DNS::is_rw_device_accessor_v<AccessorTy>,
7932  simd<Tx, N>>
7933 atomic_update(AccessorTy acc, Toffset offset, simd<Tx, N> src0,

7956 template <atomic_op Op, typename Tx, int N, typename AccessorTy>
7957 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<__ESIMD_DNS::is_rw_local_accessor_v<AccessorTy>,
7958  simd<Tx, N>>
7959 atomic_update(AccessorTy acc, uint32_t offset, simd<Tx, N> src0,
7960  simd<Tx, N> src1, simd_mask<N> mask) {

7962  mask);

7966 
7969 
7972 enum fence_mask : uint8_t {
7974  global_coherent_fence = 0x1,
7976  l2_flush_instructions = 0x2,
7977  l3_flush_instructions __SYCL_DEPRECATED(
7978  "it means L2 here, use l2_flush_instructions") = l2_flush_instructions,
7980  l2_flush_texture_data = 0x4,
7981  l3_flush_texture_data __SYCL_DEPRECATED(
7982  "it means L2 here, use l2_flush_texture_data") = l2_flush_texture_data,
7984  l2_flush_constant_data = 0x8,
7985  l3_flush_constant_data __SYCL_DEPRECATED(
7986  "it means L2 here, use l2_flush_constant_data") = l2_flush_constant_data,
7988  l2_flush_rw_data = 0x10,
7989  l3_flush_rw_data __SYCL_DEPRECATED("it means L2 here, use l2_flush_rw_data") =
7990  l2_flush_rw_data,
7992  local_barrier = 0x20,
7994  l1_flush_ro_data = 0x40,
7998  sw_barrier __SYCL_DEPRECATED("reserved - this enum is ignored") = 0x80
7999 };
8000 
8004 template <uint8_t cntl> __ESIMD_API void fence() { __esimd_fence(cntl); }
8005 
8006 __SYCL_DEPRECATED("use fence<fence_mask>()")
8007 __ESIMD_API void fence(fence_mask cntl) { __esimd_fence(cntl); }
8008 
8015 template <memory_kind Kind = memory_kind::global,
8016  fence_flush_op FenceOp = fence_flush_op::none,
8017  fence_scope Scope = fence_scope::group>
8018 __ESIMD_API void fence() {
8019  static_assert(
8020  Kind != memory_kind::local ||
8021  (FenceOp == fence_flush_op::none && Scope == fence_scope::group),
8022  "SLM fence must have 'none' lsc_fence_op and 'group' scope");
8023  constexpr int N = 16;
8024  simd_mask<N> Mask = 1;
8025  __esimd_lsc_fence<static_cast<uint8_t>(Kind), static_cast<uint8_t>(FenceOp),
8026  static_cast<uint8_t>(Scope), N>(Mask.data());
8027 }
8028 
8037 __ESIMD_API void barrier() {
8038  __esimd_fence(fence_mask::global_coherent_fence | fence_mask::local_barrier);
8039  __esimd_barrier();
8040 }
8042 
8045 
8058 template <typename T, int m, int N, typename AccessorTy, unsigned plane = 0>
8059 __ESIMD_API simd<T, m * N> media_block_load(AccessorTy acc, unsigned x,
8060  unsigned y) {
8061  constexpr unsigned Width = N * sizeof(T);
8062  static_assert(Width * m <= 256u,
8063  "data does not fit into a single dataport transaction");
8064  static_assert(Width <= 64u, "valid block width is in range [1, 64]");
8065  static_assert(m <= 64u, "valid block height is in range [1, 64]");
8066  static_assert(plane <= 3u, "valid plane index is in range [0, 3]");
8067 
8068  const auto si = __ESIMD_NS::get_surface_index(acc);
8069  using SurfIndTy = decltype(si);
8070  constexpr unsigned int RoundedWidth =
8071  Width < 4 ? 4 : detail::getNextPowerOf2<Width>();
8072  constexpr int BlockWidth = sizeof(T) * N;
8073  constexpr int Mod = 0;
8074 
8075  if constexpr (Width < RoundedWidth) {
8076  constexpr unsigned int n1 = RoundedWidth / sizeof(T);
8077  simd<T, m * n1> temp =
8078  __esimd_media_ld<T, m, n1, Mod, SurfIndTy, (int)plane, BlockWidth>(
8079  si, x, y);
8080  return temp.template select<m, 1, N, 1>(0, 0);
8081  } else {
8082  return __esimd_media_ld<T, m, N, Mod, SurfIndTy, (int)plane, BlockWidth>(
8083  si, x, y);
8084  }
8085 }
8086 
8099 template <typename T, int m, int N, typename AccessorTy, unsigned plane = 0>
8100 __ESIMD_API void media_block_store(AccessorTy acc, unsigned x, unsigned y,
8101  simd<T, m * N> vals) {
8102  constexpr unsigned Width = N * sizeof(T);
8103  static_assert(Width * m <= 256u,
8104  "data does not fit into a single dataport transaction");
8105  static_assert(Width <= 64u, "valid block width is in range [1, 64]");
8106  static_assert(m <= 64u, "valid block height is in range [1, 64]");
8107  static_assert(plane <= 3u, "valid plane index is in range [0, 3]");
8108  const auto si = __ESIMD_NS::get_surface_index(acc);
8109  using SurfIndTy = decltype(si);
8110  constexpr unsigned int RoundedWidth =
8111  Width < 4 ? 4 : detail::getNextPowerOf2<Width>();
8112  constexpr unsigned int n1 = RoundedWidth / sizeof(T);
8113  constexpr int BlockWidth = sizeof(T) * N;
8114  constexpr int Mod = 0;
8115 
8116  if constexpr (Width < RoundedWidth) {
8117  simd<T, m * n1> temp;
8118  auto temp_ref = temp.template bit_cast_view<T, m, n1>();
8119  auto vals_ref = vals.template bit_cast_view<T, m, N>();
8120  temp_ref.template select<m, 1, N, 1>() = vals_ref;
8121  __esimd_media_st<T, m, n1, Mod, SurfIndTy, plane, BlockWidth>(si, x, y,
8122  temp.data());
8123  } else {
8124  __esimd_media_st<T, m, N, Mod, SurfIndTy, plane, BlockWidth>(si, x, y,
8125  vals.data());
8126  }
8127 }
8128 
8147 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorTy,
8148  typename Flags = overaligned_tag<detail::OperandSize::OWORD>>
8149 __ESIMD_API
8150  std::enable_if_t<detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<
8151  AccessorTy, detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
8152  is_simd_flag_type_v<Flags>,
8153  simd<T, N>>
8154  block_load(AccessorTy acc, uint32_t byte_offset, Flags flags) {
8155  return slm_block_load<T, N>(byte_offset + detail::localAccessorToOffset(acc),
8156  flags);
8157 }
8158 
8176 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorT, typename Flags>
8177 __ESIMD_API
8178  std::enable_if_t<detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<
8179  AccessorT, detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_write> &&
8180  is_simd_flag_type_v<Flags>>
8181  block_store(AccessorT acc, uint32_t offset, simd<T, N> vals, Flags flags) {
8182  slm_block_store<T, N>(offset + __ESIMD_DNS::localAccessorToOffset(acc), vals,
8183  flags);
8184 }
8185 
8216 // typename PropertyListT = empty_properties_t>
8225 
8257 template <typename T, int N, int VS, typename AccessorT,
8258  typename PropertyListT =
8259  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
8260 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
8261  (detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
8262  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
8263  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>),
8264  simd<T, N>>
8265 gather(AccessorT acc, simd<uint32_t, N / VS> byte_offsets,
8266  simd_mask<N / VS> mask, simd<T, N> pass_thru, PropertyListT props = {}) {
8267  return slm_gather<T, N, VS>(byte_offsets +
8268  __ESIMD_DNS::localAccessorToOffset(acc),
8269  mask, pass_thru, props);
8270 }
8271 
8302 template <typename T, int N, int VS, typename AccessorT,
8303  typename PropertyListT =
8304  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
8305 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
8306  (detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
8307  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
8308  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>),
8309  simd<T, N>>
8310 gather(AccessorT acc, simd<uint32_t, N / VS> byte_offsets,
8311  simd_mask<N / VS> mask, PropertyListT props = {}) {
8312  return slm_gather<T, N, VS>(
8313  byte_offsets + __ESIMD_DNS::localAccessorToOffset(acc), mask, props);
8314 }
8315 
8340 template <typename T, int N, int VS, typename AccessorT,
8341  typename PropertyListT =
8342  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
8343 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
8344  (detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
8345  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
8346  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>),
8347  simd<T, N>>
8348 gather(AccessorT acc, simd<uint32_t, N / VS> byte_offsets,
8349  PropertyListT props = {}) {
8350  return slm_gather<T, N, VS>(
8351  byte_offsets + __ESIMD_DNS::localAccessorToOffset(acc), props);
8352 }
8353 
8363 // Dev note: the mask type was turned into template parameter `MaskT` to
8364 // avoid the conflicts of this prototype with the old gather() function
8365 // accepting a 'global_offset' parameter and avoid 'ambiguous call' errors
8366 // for calls like this: gather(acc, byte_offsets_simd, 0, mask);
8367 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorT, typename MaskT,
8368  typename PropertyListT =
8369  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
8370 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
8371  (detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
8372  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
8373  std::is_same_v<MaskT, simd_mask<N>> &&
8374  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>),
8375  simd<T, N>>
8376 gather(AccessorT acc, simd<uint32_t, N> byte_offsets, MaskT mask,
8377  simd<T, N> pass_thru, PropertyListT props = {}) {
8378  return slm_gather<T, N>(byte_offsets +
8379  __ESIMD_DNS::localAccessorToOffset(acc),
8380  mask, pass_thru, props);
8381 }
8382 
8390 // Dev note: the mask type was turned into template parameter `MaskT` to
8391 // avoid the conflicts of this prototype with the old gather() function
8392 // accepting a 'global_offset' parameter and avoid 'ambiguous call' errors
8393 // for calls like this: gather(acc, byte_offsets_simd, 0);
8394 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorT, typename MaskT,
8395  typename PropertyListT =
8396  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
8397 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
8398  (detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
8399  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
8400  std::is_same_v<MaskT, simd_mask<N>> &&
8401  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>),
8402  simd<T, N>>
8403 gather(AccessorT acc, simd<uint32_t, N> byte_offsets, MaskT mask,
8404  PropertyListT props = {}) {
8405  return slm_gather<T, N>(
8406  byte_offsets + __ESIMD_DNS::localAccessorToOffset(acc), mask, props);
8407 }
8408 
8416 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorT,
8417  typename PropertyListT =
8418  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
8419 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
8420  (detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
8421  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
8422  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>),
8423  simd<T, N>>
8424 gather(AccessorT acc, simd<uint32_t, N> byte_offsets,
8425  PropertyListT props = {}) {
8426  return slm_gather<T, N>(
8427  byte_offsets + __ESIMD_DNS::localAccessorToOffset(acc), props);
8428 }

8432 // typename PropertyListT = empty_properties_t>
8438 template <typename T, int N, int VS = 1, typename AccessorT,
8439  typename OffsetSimdViewT,
8440  typename PropertyListT =
8441  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
8442 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
8443  (detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
8444  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
8445  detail::is_simd_view_type_v<OffsetSimdViewT> &&
8446  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>),
8447  simd<T, N>>
8448 gather(AccessorT acc, OffsetSimdViewT byte_offsets, simd_mask<N / VS> mask,
8449  simd<T, N> pass_thru, PropertyListT props = {}) {
8450  return gather<T, N, VS>(acc, byte_offsets.read(), mask, pass_thru, props);
8451 }

8462  typename OffsetSimdViewT,

8465 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
8466  (detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
8467  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&

8514 template <typename T, int N, typename AccessorTy>
8515 __ESIMD_API
8516  std::enable_if_t<detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<
8517  AccessorTy, detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read>,
8518  simd<T, N>>
8519  gather(AccessorTy acc, simd<uint32_t, N> offsets, uint32_t glob_offset,
8520  simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
8521  return slm_gather<T, N>(
8522  offsets + glob_offset + __ESIMD_DNS::localAccessorToOffset(acc), mask);
8523 }

8588  typename PropertyListT =
8589  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
8590 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
8591  detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
8592  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_write> &&
8593  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
8594 scatter(AccessorT acc, simd<uint32_t, N / VS> byte_offsets, simd<T, N> vals,
8595  simd_mask<N / VS> mask, PropertyListT props = {}) {
8596  slm_scatter<T, N, VS>(byte_offsets + __ESIMD_DNS::localAccessorToOffset(acc),
8597  vals, mask, props);
8598 }

8735  AccessorTy, detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_write>>

8806 template <typename T, int N, int VS, typename OffsetT,
8807  typename PropertyListT =
8808  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
8809 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
8810  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
8811 prefetch(const T *p, simd<OffsetT, N / VS> byte_offsets, simd_mask<N / VS> mask,
8812  PropertyListT props = {}) {
8813  static_assert(N / VS >= 1 && N % VS == 0, "N must be divisible by VS");
8814  detail::prefetch_impl<T, VS, detail::lsc_data_size::default_size,
8815  PropertyListT>(p, byte_offsets, mask);
8816 }

9123 template <typename T, int N, int VS, typename AccessorT, typename OffsetT,
9124  typename PropertyListT =
9125  ext::oneapi::experimental::detail::empty_properties_t>
9126 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
9127  detail::is_device_accessor_with_v<AccessorT,
9128  detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read> &&
9129  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
9130 prefetch(AccessorT acc, simd<OffsetT, N / VS> byte_offsets,
9131  simd_mask<N / VS> mask, PropertyListT props = {}) {
9132 #ifdef __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
9133  prefetch<T, N, VS>(detail::accessorToPointer<T>(acc), byte_offsets, mask,
9134  props);
9135 #else
9136  static_assert(N / VS >= 1 && N % VS == 0, "N must be divisible by VS");
9137  detail::prefetch_impl<T, VS, detail::lsc_data_size::default_size,
9138  PropertyListT>(acc, byte_offsets, mask);
9139 #endif // __ESIMD_FORCE_STATELESS_MEM
9140 }

9454 template <typename T, int BlockWidth, int BlockHeight = 1, int NBlocks = 1,
9455  bool Transposed = false, bool Transformed = false,
9456  int N = detail::get_lsc_block_2d_data_size<
9457  T, NBlocks, BlockHeight, BlockWidth, Transposed, Transformed>(),
9458  typename PropertyListT = oneapi::experimental::empty_properties_t>
9459 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
9460  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>, simd<T, N>>
9461 load_2d(const T *Ptr, unsigned SurfaceWidth, unsigned SurfaceHeight,
9462  unsigned SurfacePitch, int X, int Y, PropertyListT props = {}) {
9463  return detail::load_2d_impl<T, BlockWidth, BlockHeight, NBlocks, Transposed,
9464  Transformed, PropertyListT>(
9465  Ptr, SurfaceWidth, SurfaceHeight, SurfacePitch, X, Y);
9466 }

9499  T, NBlocks, BlockHeight, BlockWidth, false /*Transposed*/,
9500  false /*Transformed*/>(),
9501  typename PropertyListT = oneapi::experimental::empty_properties_t>
9502 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
9503  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
9504 prefetch_2d(const T *Ptr, unsigned SurfaceWidth, unsigned SurfaceHeight,
9505  unsigned SurfacePitch, int X, int Y, PropertyListT props = {}) {

9507  Ptr, SurfaceWidth, SurfaceHeight, SurfacePitch, X, Y);
9508 }

9535  T, 1u, BlockHeight, BlockWidth, false /*Transposed*/,
9536  false /*Transformed*/>(),
9537  typename PropertyListT = oneapi::experimental::empty_properties_t>
9538 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<
9539  ext::oneapi::experimental::is_property_list_v<PropertyListT>>
9540 store_2d(T *Ptr, unsigned SurfaceWidth, unsigned SurfaceHeight,
9541  unsigned SurfacePitch, int X, int Y, simd<T, N> Vals,
9542  PropertyListT props = {}) {

9544  Ptr, SurfaceWidth, SurfaceHeight, SurfacePitch, X, Y, Vals);
