9571 template <rgba_channel_mask RGBAMask = rgba_channel_mask::ABGR,
9572  typename AccessorT, int N,
9573  typename T = typename AccessorT::value_type>
9574 __ESIMD_API
9575  std::enable_if_t<detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<
9576  AccessorT, detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_read>,
9577  simd<T, N * get_num_channels_enabled(RGBAMask)>>
9578  gather_rgba(AccessorT acc, simd<uint32_t, N> offsets,
9579  uint32_t global_offset = 0, simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
9580  return slm_gather_rgba<T, N, RGBAMask>(
9581  offsets + global_offset + __ESIMD_DNS::localAccessorToOffset(acc), mask);
9582 }
9583 
9600 template <rgba_channel_mask RGBAMask = rgba_channel_mask::ABGR,
9601  typename AccessorT, int N,
9602  typename T = typename AccessorT::value_type>
9603 __ESIMD_API std::enable_if_t<detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<
9604  AccessorT, detail::accessor_mode_cap::can_write>>
9605 scatter_rgba(AccessorT acc, simd<uint32_t, N> offsets,
9606  simd<T, N * get_num_channels_enabled(RGBAMask)> vals,
9607  uint32_t global_offset = 0, simd_mask<N> mask = 1) {
9608  detail::validate_rgba_write_channel_mask<RGBAMask>();
9609  slm_scatter_rgba<T, N, RGBAMask>(offsets + global_offset +
9610  __ESIMD_DNS::localAccessorToOffset(acc),
9611  vals, mask);
9612 }
9613 
9616 
9637 template <uint8_t exec_size, uint8_t sfid, uint8_t num_src0, uint8_t num_src1,
9638  uint8_t num_dst, raw_send_eot eot = raw_send_eot::not_eot,
9639  raw_send_sendc sendc = raw_send_sendc::not_sendc, typename T1, int n1,
9640  typename T2, int n2, typename T3, int n3>
9641 __ESIMD_API __ESIMD_NS::simd<T1, n1>
9642 raw_sends(__ESIMD_NS::simd<T1, n1> msg_dst, __ESIMD_NS::simd<T2, n2> msg_src0,
9643  __ESIMD_NS::simd<T3, n3> msg_src1, uint32_t ex_desc,
9644  uint32_t msg_desc, __ESIMD_NS::simd_mask<exec_size> mask = 1) {
9645  constexpr unsigned _Width1 = n1 * sizeof(T1);
9646  static_assert(_Width1 % 32 == 0, "Invalid size for raw send rspVar");
9647  constexpr unsigned _Width2 = n2 * sizeof(T2);
9648  static_assert(_Width2 % 32 == 0, "Invalid size for raw send msg_src0");
9649  constexpr unsigned _Width3 = n3 * sizeof(T3);
9650  static_assert(_Width3 % 32 == 0, "Invalid size for raw send msg_src1");
9651 
9652  using ElemT1 = __ESIMD_DNS::__raw_t<T1>;
9653  using ElemT2 = __ESIMD_DNS::__raw_t<T2>;
9654  using ElemT3 = __ESIMD_DNS::__raw_t<T3>;
9655 
9656  constexpr uint8_t modifier =
9657  ((eot == raw_send_eot::eot) << 1) | (sendc == raw_send_sendc::sendc);
9658 
9659  return __esimd_raw_sends2<ElemT1, n1, ElemT2, n2, ElemT3, n3, exec_size>(
9660  modifier, exec_size, mask.data(), num_src0, num_src1, num_dst, sfid,
9661  ex_desc, msg_desc, msg_src0.data(), msg_src1.data(), msg_dst.data());
9662 }
9663 
9681 template <uint8_t exec_size, uint8_t sfid, uint8_t num_src0, uint8_t num_dst,
9682  raw_send_eot eot = raw_send_eot::not_eot,
9683  raw_send_sendc sendc = raw_send_sendc::not_sendc, typename T1, int n1,
9684  typename T2, int n2>
9685 __ESIMD_API __ESIMD_NS::simd<T1, n1>
9686 raw_send(__ESIMD_NS::simd<T1, n1> msg_dst, __ESIMD_NS::simd<T2, n2> msg_src0,
9687  uint32_t ex_desc, uint32_t msg_desc,
9688  __ESIMD_NS::simd_mask<exec_size> mask = 1) {
9689  constexpr unsigned _Width1 = n1 * sizeof(T1);
9690  static_assert(_Width1 % 32 == 0, "Invalid size for raw send rspVar");
9691  constexpr unsigned _Width2 = n2 * sizeof(T2);
9692  static_assert(_Width2 % 32 == 0, "Invalid size for raw send msg_src0");
9693 
9694  using ElemT1 = __ESIMD_DNS::__raw_t<T1>;
9695  using ElemT2 = __ESIMD_DNS::__raw_t<T2>;
9696 
9697  constexpr uint8_t modifier =
9698  ((eot == raw_send_eot::eot) << 1) | (sendc == raw_send_sendc::sendc);
9699  return __esimd_raw_send2<ElemT1, n1, ElemT2, n2, exec_size>(
9700  modifier, exec_size, mask.data(), num_src0, num_dst, sfid, ex_desc,
9701  msg_desc, msg_src0.data(), msg_dst.data());
9702 }
9703 
9721 template <uint8_t exec_size, uint8_t sfid, uint8_t num_src0, uint8_t num_src1,
9722  raw_send_eot eot = raw_send_eot::not_eot,
9723  raw_send_sendc sendc = raw_send_sendc::not_sendc, typename T1, int n1,
9724  typename T2, int n2>
9725 __ESIMD_API void raw_sends(__ESIMD_NS::simd<T1, n1> msg_src0,
9726  __ESIMD_NS::simd<T2, n2> msg_src1, uint32_t ex_desc,
9727  uint32_t msg_desc,
9728  __ESIMD_NS::simd_mask<exec_size> mask = 1) {
9729  constexpr unsigned _Width1 = n1 * sizeof(T1);
9730  static_assert(_Width1 % 32 == 0, "Invalid size for raw send msg_src0");
9731  constexpr unsigned _Width2 = n2 * sizeof(T2);
9732  static_assert(_Width2 % 32 == 0, "Invalid size for raw send msg_src1");
9733 
9734  using ElemT1 = __ESIMD_DNS::__raw_t<T1>;
9735  using ElemT2 = __ESIMD_DNS::__raw_t<T2>;
9736 
9737  constexpr uint8_t modifier =
9738  ((eot == raw_send_eot::eot) << 1) | (sendc == raw_send_sendc::sendc);
9739  __esimd_raw_sends2_noresult<ElemT1, n1, ElemT2, n2, exec_size>(
9740  modifier, exec_size, mask.data(), num_src0, num_src1, sfid, ex_desc,
9741  msg_desc, msg_src0.data(), msg_src1.data());
9742 }
9743 
9759 template <uint8_t exec_size, uint8_t sfid, uint8_t num_src0,
9760  raw_send_eot eot = raw_send_eot::not_eot,
9761  raw_send_sendc sendc = raw_send_sendc::not_sendc, typename T1, int n1>
9762 __ESIMD_API void raw_send(__ESIMD_NS::simd<T1, n1> msg_src0, uint32_t ex_desc,
9763  uint32_t msg_desc,
9764  __ESIMD_NS::simd_mask<exec_size> mask = 1) {
9765  constexpr unsigned _Width1 = n1 * sizeof(T1);
9766  static_assert(_Width1 % 32 == 0, "Invalid size for raw send msg_src0");
9767  using ElemT1 = __ESIMD_DNS::__raw_t<T1>;
9768  constexpr uint8_t modifier =
9769  ((eot == raw_send_eot::eot) << 1) | (sendc == raw_send_sendc::sendc);
9770  __esimd_raw_send2_noresult<ElemT1, n1, exec_size>(
9771  modifier, exec_size, mask.data(), num_src0, sfid, ex_desc, msg_desc,
9772  msg_src0.data());
9773 }
9774 
9776 
9778 
9780 
9781 namespace detail {
9782 // -- Outlined implementations of simd_obj_impl class memory access APIs.
9783 
9784 template <typename T, int N, class T1, class SFINAE>
9785 template <typename Flags, int ChunkSize, typename>
9786 void simd_obj_impl<T, N, T1, SFINAE>::copy_from(
9787  const simd_obj_impl<T, N, T1, SFINAE>::element_type *Addr,
9788  Flags) SYCL_ESIMD_FUNCTION {
9789  using UT = simd_obj_impl<T, N, T1, SFINAE>::element_type;
9790  constexpr unsigned Size = sizeof(T) * N;
9791  constexpr unsigned Align = Flags::template alignment<T1>;
9792 
9793  constexpr unsigned BlockSize = OperandSize::OWORD * 8;
9794  constexpr unsigned NumBlocks = Size / BlockSize;
9795  constexpr unsigned RemSize = Size % BlockSize;
9796 
9797  if constexpr (Align >= OperandSize::DWORD && Size % OperandSize::OWORD == 0 &&
9798  detail::isPowerOf2(RemSize / OperandSize::OWORD)) {
9799  if constexpr (NumBlocks > 0) {
9800  constexpr unsigned BlockN = BlockSize / sizeof(T);
9801  ForHelper<NumBlocks>::unroll([BlockN, Addr, this](unsigned Block) {
9802  select<BlockN, 1>(Block * BlockN) =
9803  block_load<UT, BlockN, Flags>(Addr + (Block * BlockN), Flags{});
9804  });
9805  }
9806  if constexpr (RemSize > 0) {
9807  constexpr unsigned RemN = RemSize / sizeof(T);
9808  constexpr unsigned BlockN = BlockSize / sizeof(T);
9809  select<RemN, 1>(NumBlocks * BlockN) =
9810  block_load<UT, RemN, Flags>(Addr + (NumBlocks * BlockN), Flags{});
9811  }
9812  } else if constexpr (sizeof(T) == 8) {
9813  simd<int32_t, N * 2> BC(reinterpret_cast<const int32_t *>(Addr), Flags{});
9814  bit_cast_view<int32_t>() = BC;
9815  } else {
9816  constexpr unsigned NumChunks = N / ChunkSize;
9817  if constexpr (NumChunks > 0) {
9818  simd<uint32_t, ChunkSize> Offsets(0u, sizeof(T));
9819  ForHelper<NumChunks>::unroll([Addr, &Offsets, this](unsigned Block) {
9820  select<ChunkSize, 1>(Block * ChunkSize) =
9821  gather<UT, ChunkSize>(Addr + (Block * ChunkSize), Offsets);
9822  });
9823  }
9824  constexpr unsigned RemN = N % ChunkSize;
9825  if constexpr (RemN > 0) {
9826  if constexpr (RemN == 1) {
9827  select<1, 1>(NumChunks * ChunkSize) = Addr[NumChunks * ChunkSize];
9828  } else if constexpr (RemN == 8 || RemN == 16) {
9829  simd<uint32_t, RemN> Offsets(0u, sizeof(T));
9830  select<RemN, 1>(NumChunks * ChunkSize) =
9831  gather<UT, RemN>(Addr + (NumChunks * ChunkSize), Offsets);
9832  } else {
9833  constexpr int N1 = RemN < 8 ? 8 : RemN < 16 ? 16 : 32;
9834  simd_mask_type<N1> Pred(0);
9835  Pred.template select<RemN, 1>() = 1;
9836  simd<uint32_t, N1> Offsets(0u, sizeof(T));
9837  simd<UT, N1> Vals =
9838  gather<UT, N1>(Addr + (NumChunks * ChunkSize), Offsets, Pred);
9839  select<RemN, 1>(NumChunks * ChunkSize) =
9840  Vals.template select<RemN, 1>();
9841  }
9842  }
9843  }
9844 }
9845 
9846 template <typename T, int N, class T1, class SFINAE>
9847 template <int ChunkSize, typename Flags, typename AccessorT, typename TOffset>
9848 ESIMD_INLINE void simd_obj_impl<T, N, T1, SFINAE>::copy_to_impl(
9849  AccessorT acc, TOffset offset) const SYCL_ESIMD_FUNCTION {
9850  using UT = simd_obj_impl<T, N, T1, SFINAE>::element_type;
9851  constexpr unsigned Size = sizeof(T) * N;
9852  constexpr unsigned Align = Flags::template alignment<T1>;
9853 
9854  constexpr unsigned BlockSize = OperandSize::OWORD * 8;
9855  constexpr unsigned NumBlocks = Size / BlockSize;
9856  constexpr unsigned RemSize = Size % BlockSize;
9857 
9858  simd<UT, N> Tmp{data()};
9859  if constexpr (Align >= OperandSize::OWORD && Size % OperandSize::OWORD == 0 &&
9860  detail::isPowerOf2(RemSize / OperandSize::OWORD)) {
9861  if constexpr (NumBlocks > 0) {
9862  constexpr unsigned BlockN = BlockSize / sizeof(T);
9863  ForHelper<NumBlocks>::unroll([BlockN, acc, offset, &Tmp](unsigned Block) {
9864  block_store<UT, BlockN, AccessorT>(
9865  acc, offset + (Block * BlockSize),
9866  Tmp.template select<BlockN, 1>(Block * BlockN));
9867  });
9868  }
9869  if constexpr (RemSize > 0) {
9870  constexpr unsigned RemN = RemSize / sizeof(T);
9871  constexpr unsigned BlockN = BlockSize / sizeof(T);
9872  block_store<UT, RemN, AccessorT>(
9873  acc, offset + (NumBlocks * BlockSize),
9874  Tmp.template select<RemN, 1>(NumBlocks * BlockN));
9875  }
9876  } else if constexpr (sizeof(T) == 8) {
9877  simd<int32_t, N * 2> BC = Tmp.template bit_cast_view<int32_t>();
9878  BC.copy_to(acc, offset, Flags{});
9879  } else {
9880  constexpr unsigned NumChunks = N / ChunkSize;
9881  if constexpr (NumChunks > 0) {
9882  simd<TOffset, ChunkSize> Offsets(0u, sizeof(T));
9883  ForHelper<NumChunks>::unroll([acc, offset, &Offsets,
9884  &Tmp](unsigned Block) {
9885  scatter<UT, ChunkSize, AccessorT>(
9886  acc, Offsets, Tmp.template select<ChunkSize, 1>(Block * ChunkSize),
9887  offset + (Block * ChunkSize * sizeof(T)));
9888  });
9889  }
9890  constexpr unsigned RemN = N % ChunkSize;
9891  if constexpr (RemN > 0) {
9892  if constexpr (RemN == 1 || RemN == 8 || RemN == 16) {
9893  simd<TOffset, RemN> Offsets(0u, sizeof(T));
9894  scatter<UT, RemN, AccessorT>(
9895  acc, Offsets, Tmp.template select<RemN, 1>(NumChunks * ChunkSize),
9896  offset + (NumChunks * ChunkSize * sizeof(T)));
9897  } else {
9898  constexpr int N1 = RemN < 8 ? 8 : RemN < 16 ? 16 : 32;
9899  simd_mask_type<N1> Pred(0);
9900  Pred.template select<RemN, 1>() = 1;
9901  simd<UT, N1> Vals;
9902  Vals.template select<RemN, 1>() =
9903  Tmp.template select<RemN, 1>(NumChunks * ChunkSize);
9904  simd<TOffset, N1> Offsets(0u, sizeof(T));
9905  scatter<UT, N1, AccessorT>(acc, Offsets, Vals,
9906  offset + (NumChunks * ChunkSize * sizeof(T)),
9907  Pred);
9908  }
9909  }
9910  }
9911 }
9912 
9913 template <typename T, int N, class T1, class SFINAE>
9914 template <int ChunkSize, typename Flags, typename AccessorT, typename TOffset>
9915 ESIMD_INLINE void simd_obj_impl<T, N, T1, SFINAE>::copy_from_impl(
9916  AccessorT acc, TOffset offset) SYCL_ESIMD_FUNCTION {
9917  using UT = simd_obj_impl<T, N, T1, SFINAE>::element_type;
9918  static_assert(sizeof(UT) == sizeof(T));
9919  constexpr unsigned Size = sizeof(T) * N;
9920  constexpr unsigned Align = Flags::template alignment<T1>;
9921 
9922  constexpr unsigned BlockSize = OperandSize::OWORD * 8;
9923  constexpr unsigned NumBlocks = Size / BlockSize;
9924  constexpr unsigned RemSize = Size % BlockSize;
9925 
9926  if constexpr (Align >= OperandSize::DWORD && Size % OperandSize::OWORD == 0 &&
9927  detail::isPowerOf2(RemSize / OperandSize::OWORD)) {
9928  if constexpr (NumBlocks > 0) {
9929  constexpr unsigned BlockN = BlockSize / sizeof(T);
9930  ForHelper<NumBlocks>::unroll([BlockN, acc, offset, this](unsigned Block) {
9931  select<BlockN, 1>(Block * BlockN) =
9932  block_load<UT, BlockN, AccessorT, Flags>(
9933  acc, offset + (Block * BlockSize), Flags{});
9934  });
9935  }
9936  if constexpr (RemSize > 0) {
9937  constexpr unsigned RemN = RemSize / sizeof(T);
9938  constexpr unsigned BlockN = BlockSize / sizeof(T);
9939  select<RemN, 1>(NumBlocks * BlockN) =
9940  block_load<UT, RemN, AccessorT, Flags>(
9941  acc, offset + (NumBlocks * BlockSize), Flags{});
9942  }
9943  } else if constexpr (sizeof(T) == 8) {
9944  simd<int32_t, N * 2> BC(acc, offset, Flags{});
9945  bit_cast_view<int32_t>() = BC;
9946  } else {
9947  constexpr unsigned NumChunks = N / ChunkSize;
9948  if constexpr (NumChunks > 0) {
9949  simd<TOffset, ChunkSize> Offsets(0u, sizeof(T));
9950  ForHelper<NumChunks>::unroll(
9951  [acc, offset, &Offsets, this](unsigned Block) {
9952  select<ChunkSize, 1>(Block * ChunkSize) =
9953  gather<UT, ChunkSize, AccessorT>(
9954  acc, Offsets, offset + (Block * ChunkSize * sizeof(T)));
9955  });
9956  }
9957  constexpr unsigned RemN = N % ChunkSize;
9958  if constexpr (RemN > 0) {
9959  if constexpr (RemN == 1 || RemN == 8 || RemN == 16) {
9960  simd<TOffset, RemN> Offsets(0u, sizeof(T));
9961  select<RemN, 1>(NumChunks * ChunkSize) = gather<UT, RemN, AccessorT>(
9962  acc, Offsets, offset + (NumChunks * ChunkSize * sizeof(T)));
9963  } else {
9964  constexpr int N1 = RemN < 8 ? 8 : RemN < 16 ? 16 : 32;
9965  simd_mask_type<N1> Pred(0);
9966  Pred.template select<RemN, 1>() = 1;
9967  simd<TOffset, N1> Offsets(0u, sizeof(T));
9968  simd<UT, N1> Vals = gather<UT, N1>(
9969  acc, Offsets, offset + (NumChunks * ChunkSize * sizeof(T)), Pred);
9970  select<RemN, 1>(NumChunks * ChunkSize) =
9971  Vals.template select<RemN, 1>();
9972  }
9973  }
9974  }
9975 }
9976 
9977 template <typename T, int N, class T1, class SFINAE>
9978 template <typename AccessorT, typename Flags, int ChunkSize, typename>
9979 ESIMD_INLINE EnableIfAccessor<AccessorT, accessor_mode_cap::can_read, void>
9980 simd_obj_impl<T, N, T1, SFINAE>::copy_from(AccessorT acc,
9981  detail::DeviceAccessorOffsetT offset,
9982  Flags) SYCL_ESIMD_FUNCTION {
9983 
9984  copy_from_impl<ChunkSize, Flags>(acc, offset);
9985 }
9986 
9987 template <typename T, int N, class T1, class SFINAE>
9988 template <typename AccessorT, typename Flags, int ChunkSize, typename>
9989 ESIMD_INLINE std::enable_if_t<
9990  detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<AccessorT, accessor_mode_cap::can_read>,
9991  void>
9992 simd_obj_impl<T, N, T1, SFINAE>::copy_from(AccessorT acc, uint32_t offset,
9993  Flags) SYCL_ESIMD_FUNCTION {
9994 
9995  copy_from_impl<ChunkSize, Flags>(acc, offset);
9996 }
9997 
9998 template <typename T, int N, class T1, class SFINAE>
9999 template <typename Flags, int ChunkSize, typename>
10000 void simd_obj_impl<T, N, T1, SFINAE>::copy_to(
10001  simd_obj_impl<T, N, T1, SFINAE>::element_type *Addr,
10002  Flags) const SYCL_ESIMD_FUNCTION {
10003  using UT = simd_obj_impl<T, N, T1, SFINAE>::element_type;
10004  constexpr unsigned Size = sizeof(T) * N;
10005  constexpr unsigned Align = Flags::template alignment<T1>;
10006 
10007  constexpr unsigned BlockSize = OperandSize::OWORD * 8;
10008  constexpr unsigned NumBlocks = Size / BlockSize;
10009  constexpr unsigned RemSize = Size % BlockSize;
10010 
10011  simd<UT, N> Tmp{data()};
10012  if constexpr (Align >= OperandSize::OWORD && Size % OperandSize::OWORD == 0 &&
10013  detail::isPowerOf2(RemSize / OperandSize::OWORD)) {
10014  if constexpr (NumBlocks > 0) {
10015  constexpr unsigned BlockN = BlockSize / sizeof(T);
10016  ForHelper<NumBlocks>::unroll([BlockN, Addr, &Tmp](unsigned Block) {
10017  block_store<UT, BlockN>(Addr + (Block * BlockN),
10018  Tmp.template select<BlockN, 1>(Block * BlockN));
10019  });
10020  }
10021  if constexpr (RemSize > 0) {
10022  constexpr unsigned RemN = RemSize / sizeof(T);
10023  constexpr unsigned BlockN = BlockSize / sizeof(T);
10024  block_store<UT, RemN>(Addr + (NumBlocks * BlockN),
10025  Tmp.template select<RemN, 1>(NumBlocks * BlockN));
10026  }
10027  } else if constexpr (sizeof(T) == 8) {
10028  simd<int32_t, N * 2> BC = Tmp.template bit_cast_view<int32_t>();
10029  BC.copy_to(reinterpret_cast<int32_t *>(Addr), Flags{});
10030  } else {
10031  constexpr unsigned NumChunks = N / ChunkSize;
10032  if constexpr (NumChunks > 0) {
10033  simd<uint32_t, ChunkSize> Offsets(0u, sizeof(T));
10034  ForHelper<NumChunks>::unroll([Addr, &Offsets, &Tmp](unsigned Block) {
10035  scatter<UT, ChunkSize>(
10036  Addr + (Block * ChunkSize), Offsets,
10037  Tmp.template select<ChunkSize, 1>(Block * ChunkSize));
10038  });
10039  }
10040  constexpr unsigned RemN = N % ChunkSize;
10041  if constexpr (RemN > 0) {
10042  if constexpr (RemN == 1) {
10043  Addr[NumChunks * ChunkSize] = Tmp[NumChunks * ChunkSize];
10044  } else if constexpr (RemN == 8 || RemN == 16) {
10045  // TODO: GPU runtime may handle scatter of 16 byte elements
10046  // incorrectly. The code below is a workaround which must be deleted
10047  // once GPU runtime is fixed.
10048  if constexpr (sizeof(T) == 1 && RemN == 16) {
10049  if constexpr (Align % OperandSize::DWORD > 0) {
10050  ForHelper<RemN>::unroll([Addr, &Tmp](unsigned Index) {
10051  Addr[Index + NumChunks * ChunkSize] =
10052  Tmp[Index + NumChunks * ChunkSize];
10053  });
10054  } else {
10055  simd_mask_type<8> Pred(0);
10056  simd<int32_t, 8> Vals;
10057  Pred.template select<4, 1>() = 1;
10058  Vals.template select<4, 1>() =
10059  Tmp.template bit_cast_view<int32_t>().template select<4, 1>(
10060  NumChunks * ChunkSize);
10061 
10062  simd<uint32_t, 8> Offsets(0u, sizeof(int32_t));
10063  scatter<int32_t, 8>(
10064  reinterpret_cast<int32_t *>(Addr + (NumChunks * ChunkSize)),
10065  Offsets, Vals, Pred);
10066  }
10067  } else {
10068  simd<uint32_t, RemN> Offsets(0u, sizeof(T));
10069  scatter<UT, RemN>(
10070  Addr + (NumChunks * ChunkSize), Offsets,
10071  Tmp.template select<RemN, 1>(NumChunks * ChunkSize));
10072  }
10073  } else {
10074  constexpr int N1 = RemN < 8 ? 8 : RemN < 16 ? 16 : 32;
10075  simd_mask_type<N1> Pred(0);
10076  Pred.template select<RemN, 1>() = 1;
10077  simd<UT, N1> Vals;
10078  Vals.template select<RemN, 1>() =
10079  Tmp.template select<RemN, 1>(NumChunks * ChunkSize);
10080  simd<uint32_t, N1> Offsets(0u, sizeof(T));
10081  scatter<UT, N1>(Addr + (NumChunks * ChunkSize), Offsets, Vals, Pred);
10082  }
10083  }
10084  }
10085 }
10086 
10087 template <typename T, int N, class T1, class SFINAE>
10088 template <typename AccessorT, typename Flags, int ChunkSize, typename>
10089 ESIMD_INLINE EnableIfAccessor<AccessorT, accessor_mode_cap::can_write, void>
10090 simd_obj_impl<T, N, T1, SFINAE>::copy_to(AccessorT acc,
10091  detail::DeviceAccessorOffsetT offset,
10092  Flags) const SYCL_ESIMD_FUNCTION {
10093  copy_to_impl<ChunkSize, Flags>(acc, offset);
10094 }
10095 
10096 template <typename T, int N, class T1, class SFINAE>
10097 template <typename AccessorT, typename Flags, int ChunkSize, typename>
10098 ESIMD_INLINE std::enable_if_t<
10099  detail::is_local_accessor_with_v<AccessorT, accessor_mode_cap::can_write>,
10100  void>
10101 simd_obj_impl<T, N, T1, SFINAE>::copy_to(AccessorT acc, uint32_t offset,
10102  Flags) const SYCL_ESIMD_FUNCTION {
10103  copy_to_impl<ChunkSize, Flags>(acc, offset);
10104 }
10105

@ xchg

sycl::_V1::ext::intel::esimd::atomic_op::fmin
@ fmin
ACM/PVC: Maximum (floating point): *addr = max(*addr, src0).
sycl::_V1::ext::intel::esimd::atomic_op::fcmpxchg
@ fcmpxchg
ACM/PVC: Compare and exchange (floating point).
